name: Cliff
subject: It's important that you respond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Your custom link is enclosed.
Hey team -- It’s Cliff, the head of digital fundraising at the DSCC.

President Biden is _officially_ running for re-election, so I wanted to make sure you saw Diana’s message. It’s _crucial_ that we have up-to-the-minute information from every Democrat to inform our campaign strategy. **So please, let us know if you approve of President Biden ASAP.**

**Here's your custom link:[www.dscc.org/BidenApproval#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230503-Cliff-DianaBidenSurgeBump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230503-Cliff-DianaBidenSurgeBump-ETG-sl1&akid=10655%2E9716520%2ENy6aml)**

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being an important part of our team,

Cliff, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Diana
Subject: I don't see your response... -
---
| | | Hi team -- it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because President Biden's approval hit its highest point in almost a YEAR, **_and that could be a leading indicator of a MASSIVE blue wave!_**

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s **_critical_** that we have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But I just checked our President Biden approval poll and didn’t see your response -- in fact, without hearing your answers, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll in Pennsylvania!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12323?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230503-Cliff-DianaBidenSurgeBump-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230503-Cliff-DianaBidenSurgeBump-ETG-sl1&akid=10655%2E9716520%2ENy6aml)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**

we’re losing critical ground to the MAGA mob
| Folks, this is a hard email to write.

But we just checked our Senate Battleground Fund, and hardly anyone has donated to save vulnerable Democrats like Sherrod Brown...** _donations are PLUMMETING!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44434?t=6&akid=7467%2E878179%2EBTOdLR) | [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE: RUSH $7 TO SAVE THE SENATE FROM A TOTAL MAGA TAKEOVER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44434?t=7&akid=7467%2E878179%2EBTOdLR)

Team, we’re panicking... and right now, you only have **two options:**

**OPTION 1:** Do nothing as Republicans flood toss-up states like Ohio with dark money attack ads, SINKING any chance we have of keeping the Senate blue.

**OPTION 2:** Step up and chip in $7 to help us close our $9,189 gap and do your part to save Democrats like Sherrod Brown — **_securing our fragile majority, protecting abortion rights, and defending Pres. Biden’s agenda!_**
[REMEMBER: The GOP named Sherrod Brown’s seat a TOP target to seize Senate control! It’s up to grassroots supporters like YOU to help us stop them: Rush $7 before midnight →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44435?t=8&akid=7467%2E878179%2EBTOdLR)

name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: Your support means so much to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62762746/404471164/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230503TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYzZmNkYS0xM2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ZmRpnuvvnuyb_RwgXAOb7KiBuUGvU7MCdTHxwO-dw=)
---
Look, a lot happened in April. We saw House Republicans push through legislation targeting trans youth, rolling back environmental protections, and cutting critical assistance to working families.

**Your support helped me sustain the resources to fight back and tell the people of VA-10 what's at stake.** As the spring turns into summer, it's going to be critical that we keep countering GOP extremism at every possible turn.

My month was also defined by our work on two important issues: protecting communities from sexual assault and supporting survivors, and promoting awareness of Parkinson's disease so that the nearly 90,000 Americans impacted by it can find resources and care (April is both Sexual Assault Awareness Month and Parkinson's Awareness Month).

Since coming to Congress, I've worked extensively to raise awareness of teen dating violence — a major source of sexual assault among young people. Last month, I continued using my platform to help teens in need know that they can find hope and connect them with support channels.

I also made the decision last month to announce my own diagnosis with Parkinson's (you can watch an interview I did on MSNBC [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62762747/404471165/-1799136169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYzZmNkYS0xM2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ZmRpnuvvnuyb_RwgXAOb7KiBuUGvU7MCdTHxwO-dw=&emci=dbf1f460-f6e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=11f3fcda-13ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)). I did so to help raise awareness of the disease, and to show that it does not have to stop us from living the lives we want to live. **I plan to keep serving my constituents for many years to come — and I'll keep working to give visibility to the issues that affect so many of us.**

Months like this put a lot into perspective, and they make me appreciate even more that the work I do wouldn't be possible without supporters like you. So I want to emphasize again just how grateful I am to have you on the team.

Thank you so much,

Jennifer | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62762748/404471166/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230503TY_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWYzZmNkYS0xM2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8ZmRpnuvvnuyb_RwgXAOb7KiBuUGvU7MCdTHxwO-dw=)****
---

Sterling, VA 20165

Your support helped me sustain the resources to fight back and tell the people of VA-10 what's at stake. As the spring turns into summer, it's going to be critical that we keep countering GOP extremism at every possible turn. My month was also defined by our work on two important issues: protecting communities from sexual assault and supporting survivors, and promoting awareness of Parkinson's disease so that the nearly 90,000 Americans impacted by it can find resources and care (April is both Sexual Assault Awareness Month and Parkinson's Awareness Month). Since coming to Congress, I've worked extensively to raise awareness of teen dating violence — a major source of sexual assault among young people. Last month, I continued using my platform to help teens in need know that they can find hope and connect them with support channels. I also made the decision last month to announce my own diagnosis with Parkinson's (you can watch an interview I did on MSNBC ). I did so to help raise awareness of the disease, and to show that it does not have to stop us from living the lives we want to live. I plan to keep serving my constituents for many years to come — and I'll keep working to give visibility to the issues that affect so many of us. Months like this put a lot into perspective, and they make me appreciate even more that the work I do wouldn't be possible without supporters like you. So I want to emphasize again just how grateful I am to have you on the team. Thank you so much, Jennifer | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters... | | BREAKING: New CBS News Poll The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence. Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the Ramaswamy TSUNAMI. Peter, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate. To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (which are steadily climbing) and unique, grassroots donors. I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (bye Don Lemon) and Chuck Todd. I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th. We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there. I am looking to you to help today. | | | ---|---|--- | | We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. | | With the Hawaiʻi Republican Party State Convention coming up this Saturday, May 6th inHilo, things are heating up in the race for who will be the new Party officers. This includes State Chair, five Vice Chairs, Secretary, and Treasurer. We are closely watching the developments. It looks to have some exciting potential outcomes, if you talk to former Hawaiʻi Conservatives Chairman, Tim Dalhouse! He stepped down from his role with us a few months ago to pursue the Republican Party’s State Chair position. I asked Tim Dalhouse to answer a few questions about why he is running, a little about who he is as a person, and what he plans to do if elected to the State Chair position. Click the "Read More" button to see how Tim answered!

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s my life story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
...
I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story

| |
---
| | | I recently launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

I was just going through some old photos before this massive decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I am today.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666615%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4acIc2mZ6Q6KXvtLZ%2fdnQQ&sysid=1)
---

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I would one day consider running for President of the United States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666616%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IcP0u75vwXTFfBVeaa18gA&sysid=1)
---

Here’s a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head.

**Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. **

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom’s car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn’t end there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother’s American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area **_- as a Republican. _**

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I’m exploring a run for President of the United States. **You really could only do this in America.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666617%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fZaTc4Znt9MYMWe6N1fkeQ&sysid=1)
---

What I have learned along the way is this: **Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it.**

That’s why I’m exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It’s a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you’re reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: **_[will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666618%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HDmyNcw7c9sOP0Q7X2utrQ&sysid=1 "will you chip in $20, $35
or even more now to help me save the American Dream?")_**

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666619%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T9iI8%2flU4rckGZyqY0rYUQ&sysid=1 "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

Thank you, and God bless you,

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666619%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T9iI8%2flU4rckGZyqY0rYUQ&sysid=1 "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666610%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fjIwvYTDcyXVLTTmolzNtA&sysid=1)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn’t be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn’t cheap. _**[So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666611%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5y5xGpv87Pvaa4UYf4qVGA&sysid=1 "So today, I’m humbly
asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to
help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can’t do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3KMbdI94T6Z65gy2PvvILA&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don’t take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eXbQsVsioVy0Yr25A7Zi4g&sysid=1 "I know we have been asking
a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore
faith in America.")**_
---
| | [I’M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3KMbdI94T6Z65gy2PvvILA&sysid=1 "JOIN MY TEAM")
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666614%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0eJ9NLSuF0AB7Jt0mVvUw&sysid=1)

American Update

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s my life story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story

| |
---
| | | I recently launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

I was just going through some old photos before this massive decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I am today.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvlgakecoani5hg5bp4v7tjvl4s6lu5p6sftjdbo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs)
---

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I would one day consider running for President of the United States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgg99fm0esof40hgirh90funtoq4n8h2ditn75o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs)
---

Here's a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head.

**Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. **

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom's car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn't end there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother's American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area **_- as a Republican. _**

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. **You really could only do this in America.**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8pe4kf3c0kk0tpihgb63rpea6g2lutr64j9uf0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs)
---

What I have learned along the way is this: **Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it.**

That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: **_[will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpbp27183alu3f0i7937vrtc7nacga5e3hjfg90_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?")_**

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0umktgm6iv3igtbqtf8cia20ruj9b3ub64b72po_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

Thank you, and God bless you,

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorcskda6343ap70f8t9b5hvn7s68mg78ca6k2c8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zms7792ft1p3jn98b3mdm9iuvce25efb6ofsna0o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za507vl5tplieitkdcme88vio92s4ps0jgp9sdn0_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zefi6cl3nlmcg6uqfbhoh5sge7vc02npe6t5uvfo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81ues3fodmo5d7dpm8herdr1gebi2tu03d9iqfo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvmvht8v2hfesiu6o40osmrri23os5ags8fdi8i8_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie2ob6c3h2bs "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z95htba4aroo3q6k0hcupek7qqg1g65d5v2itu3o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie1o36cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6lq0okpr1n1u22ejn7kh367imq8qlv3rc7uo6jo_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie1o36cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh9bgm51erkt4gtvg7ahtknb0fdguequ5sjjcdso_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie1o36cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgqlv0m1cb9puep0nl8qnc13tuu6og1a6a5tu20o_rp22sh2s8i66o76chie1o36cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Prayer Request From President Trump
body:
National Day Of Prayer Today, is the National Day Of Prayer. I will be attending the Tulsa National Day Of Prayer to pray over our elected officials
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12075.1.4aeda6346f0b7d5cb31a23bd84f83ab4) |
---
## National Day Of Prayer
---
Today, is the **National Day Of Prayer**. I will be attending the **Tulsa National Day Of Prayer** to pray over our elected officials. I want to encourage you to take a moment and pray for our nation. Recently, I was on the phone with **President Trump** and asked him how we could pray for him. He responded with "**The best thing you can do for me is to Pray for our Nation**." Let's honor that request today and pray for America! I also want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12076.1.88d2450ed76e1cd7d25a8705ae3734e0) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election. Here is how you can help: 1\. Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12077.1.7d57e457747f98b43f5737eea7970b50) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12078.1.d147c1cc3e10e8102771f9ccc059ef97)
2\. Invite your others to join you for our upcoming National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12079.1.7a422896aa03718ce73c4c8e2cafd835).
3\. Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12080.1.c9386aca46b260018374a0087bf9a587)
| 1. | Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12081.1.382a9cee7f6694ff559e381346ecb43a) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12082.1.609b59115abdbf72a2406be0357d5006)
---|---
2. | Invite your others to join you for our upcoming National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12083.1.c91329387973af02acbf763e7876c499).
---|---
3. | Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12084.1.9ac85898774cd6efda9c9e955f82fb6c)
---|---
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12085.1.4a8c528aeadc9d3e77fc4efb8cd69af0), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12086.1.759bbcb363f783eb963c8536a6a3a9d9), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12087.1.5551e08822127d976c414f1e03079ea8), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12088.1.fa3d63ea7ac543fef3e44c0a372e20f9), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12089.1.47a9a376f7efcc90ad9d041ad6b06f4f), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12090.1.cd23c427fc5d088b5498c1e3790e7831)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12091.1.8ae53e48585aae47363790d5b6ffbcc3)
| | [ Partner w/Pastors For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12092.1.4a0d5dbfb849e58e554cf3315c21fa0c)
---
---
## Breaking News! & Clarification
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12093.1.b90393149ffb5095ebcab70b9f39ad8d)
---
I am excited to announce that [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12094.1.e3d7c1c4dd026972fa0d940acbb19146) will be hosting our first **LIVE event** on Thursday, May 11 in Miami, FL at the beautiful **Trump Doral**! We have incredible leaders from all over America joining us including **General Michael Flynn,** **Roger Stone** and a few surprises... I want to invite you to join me in Miami for what will be _an incredible evening_. This event is **NOT just for Pastors** but is open to all. The event is totally **FREE**. You can RSVP by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/doral](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12095.1.5907df142e8ad0eed577a08cd896265b) Come meet **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , other leading Pastors as well as some surprise guests!
---
| | [ RSVP: Trump Doral ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12096.1.a996e06de9adb4f3da8bf60eaea76d45)
---
---
## God Did What God Does...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12097.1.e679447bea07c46d0d5aada8baeedab6)
---
This WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12098.1.2d450f87fa8a61313f33f87eb594d8de) OKC & Tulsa, the Power of God became tangible and as a result we saw incredible breakthroughs.
I want to share with you the message that I preached, and I know that just as it had an impact at all 3 of our WKND services, it will have a positive impact on you!
Watch [Acts Pt. 3 - The Miracle Of Suffering](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12099.1.2ab769fc996945e518e746c203a30d34): [https://youtube.com/live/eFobXTX3m2k](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12100.1.4f2b5fd84909715656071da68e55d275)
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12101.1.17d381f610c937cb4908cef8d20f2099)
---
Watch [Acts Pt. 2 - The Power Of Being](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12102.1.b6dd3a6ee777a190d52807775e8ebd63): [https://youtu.be/MVX8zj3wmzM](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12103.1.a3f96f2331bab2c0ffccdedf0b502c8a)
**-Subscribe to[Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12104.1.1db3b9fc54c7b0df210fb72e091d4b79)'s YouTube page**: [https://clr.cm/9gWE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12105.1.d4eb6aa803a8adc1a16960a5a0c2e39f)
If you missed Acts Pt. 1, you can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/T51S0DLIAIc?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12106.1.5137a009b55f6314b7821e93f9ed50cf)
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12107.1.07fbb33435925092f3f7b0648998ae83)
---
This message is a foundational message to understand the Book of Acts.
We look forward to seeing you this WKND and be sure to invite someone to church!
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12108.1.bfbe5a1b0c5613395578564ed9a27532)
---
---
## Message From Mike Lindell
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12109.1.009dc8cae1663ef5486746423bca21ed)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12110.1.aeb102c915f6d6b13b7f3dbe0129abda), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12111.1.1f45c8ae3ca6c2efa3a52efbeff80873).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12112.1.c136dc18f8835ff46cc68c41549ef3e6) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12113.1.9a1394a4d9c0f7dcb6d46420c02e2eda)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12114.1.7a863d6a529b5556e825c9b5d274fef1) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
| | [ Save Up To 66% At MyPillow.com ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21295818.12115.1.6955de85d38707072be1c2afcb88789b)

Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’ll bet you’ve heard this one before: _voter fraud doesn’t exist—it’s just a ploy._

That’s the baseless narrative constantly pushed by Leftists politicians, liberal fanatics, and their mainstream media mouthpiece.

_Apparently,_ election fraud only exists when The Left loses elections. The preposterous hypocrisy of the radical Left simply knows no bounds.

But if election fraud doesn't exist, then why was a Democrat operative arrested late last year for ‘widespread voter fraud’ in Pennsylvania?

And what about Janet Reed, an Evansville, Indiana, Democratic Party activist, who sent illegally pre-marked absentee ballot applications to voters ahead of the 2020 primary election?

In Arizona, Victor Aguirre, a convicted felon, was charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election. And in Minnesota, Linda Maria Stately, a convicted felon, was also charged with illegally voting in the 2020 general election.

These are just a few of the _hundreds_ of proven instances of election fraud included in The Heritage Foundation’s Election Fraud Database—which recently topped 1,400 cases—ranging from ineligible voting, fraudulent absentee ballots, illegal ‘assistance’ at the polls, false registrations, and more!

The reality is that voter fraud _does_ exist and it is on the rise, despite the radical Left’s attempts to minimize this issue.

And to ensure that this urgent matter is addressed through aggressive reform and oversight, today I’m asking you to join other concerned citizens by completing our [**National Survey on Election Fraud >>**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTI0LWM2NGEyYjJmMzYxZjQ4MzM4NmU0YjE5M2FkNDY2ZWUxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL3ZvdGVyLWZyYXVkLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXZvdGVyZnJhdWQmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUItQUVfRkZPMzg0MDMifQ/cUvm6K8RV19TgUyga5b6HQ)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T215b7342-b84e-4273-b87b-b905ef7307f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

## House Subpoenas FBI Over Biden “Criminal Scheme”
House Oversight Chairman James Comer issued a [subpoena to the FBI](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGn0Q5n2UUPC4o0113alA7ocpBBcQTPubfPJHXqv_hnvq_H9LAxxe35aVc21efJzjW-eIJegBJIE7aL8czI1LKRgyYEQC3bYJAsI0nHatA3AisXAKX6gWiA0aFuo0FAgh6UBJAoOz_DqNj6XtPiaaRGAS-x5qP7znGrgX165xcf3ZzXNplQ614a-mjw3uB946t0bxty_s0N3kM-C4uD99OlONutiHK6PfNmhXdRXCGWmtilfPEhpIa-1yOOXahrag-z7FdMKZbh1ih4rjamv2v9H-EnAAD__3QSXZw) seeking documents identified by a whistleblower as detailing criminal activity by then-VP Joe Biden. The subpoena comes after [Republican Senator Chuck Grassley](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPnDAQhX-N6QaZMRC2oEhDd2lTojGMYSJjI9u71v376DZKd_17T-_7fn-sHyRewvGLLp6LiyttRV686gF0D2hWbPbZMSObhudunAxqjVPXnLOhBzlj7NTxNO7baDR3SETGbTjYyTUyo0ajB913WnfYtW7Tj57JDZPZnXkY1WvepcTU_okSysnOf8YXp3aLV-Pns5Q7K_NT4aJwqbW2gYrEQD7xS7h-xRQugWtWuJzxmRkS30_rZaOQIT_tHTkQOCtQT8nFs_WxcgIX0wU7l3_wQN7z8d7OEB1Y2TmATWI5fULeTr4YqpTzq8dyBPh_ROHSpHm_q3gvefyhen1cJP5NUL4X-jcAAP__AkJ9jQ)'s office was made aware of the FBI-generated whistleblower form. The anonymous report allegedly links President Biden to a [criminal scheme involving money](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGStCAQBOCn0QxrGNRlA4I_2Wz_9EILYdDZQtgSTu_e_sqLL-0v6e6P5_S0HDkt_-1GpoY8WVf5oAkGAb1ANWHrTSBCUi0ZOWqFAKhlu5r5NmiJN_IeLBDKEWZnnUdtgwt61C0bBFQwQC8BJMouOLj3ZMOglQ_qrpoeyHPNe_fKnOpKIX7ng_bO5a2NZq31XRr1r8FHg4_zPLuQvxKd5fIGH-8cubIrF65caqQ55pN2YWOkhYoIMwufX2K1Bwmf3edGqYqdDrLXZlHcShsJTkeOxxXM7CmJkHfiJYlkK-dkY7sb_z45Ri7jrelh2SzH347178t-AgAA__-NeHJd) for policy decisions during his vice presidency. ## Russia Shoots Down Alleged Assassination Attempt
Russia says it [blocked a terror attack](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSrCAQheGnwawtbNRhAoObmM1NN7QYaMZeUSzAsebtt9x403OSv76vx_QwHHh7_TcrDcXHydjCb5pkB7IFVBNWbvBESKqioem1QilRN9U8YK_VHal_am20sV1v3U1q3VDrbdd6V_GAEpXsZNtI2WBTeyvvLRnfaeW8uivRSnJcYqq_I29lJh8-8U2ptnGtwjCXsmeh_gkcBY7nedaJjkIpX_-1xBScwJGOFHcSOKYjZzaQzSfDsSTDG4EpxdiFHCyJ1sAbnFxmcClulMEbDuTgyQ4WDgH2o_AGiQ1c5XAhKIFjlQa3nxwC5_4mWvlaDYffyPK32U8AAAD__5xFbs8) on the Kremlin by shooting down two drones aimed at President Vladimir Putin. ## Star Swallows a Planet
Astronomers observed a dying red giant star swallow a Jupiter-sized planet in a single gulp, a phenomenon long understood but never before witnessed. The galactic extinction event -- which will happen to the earth in about 5 billion years -- took place between 10,000-15,000 years ago in the Milky Way galaxy as a star [billowed out to a million times](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1jLYjtJQfE37vK3V1oElpjTGizDhcvbn3z1NaORRhp9-j7uy91Gjun5325kasiLdTW-aIFRwiBRL9h5E4iQdEdGTVeNAHhV3WogPAb3cGrSoKy-TIE8TV7bm0Z3Ia26aBBQwwiDAlCo-uDgNpAN41X7oG9aDEA-1nz0nzmmulLgd37R0bu8dWzWWvci9D-Bs8C5tda7lM5N4Hw-C5xhPONsLR_sBc6l2kOWZplzK3Jnm6jKUr_8WxbHUcZUWRaXBM4xefru17pxdxi_t8gcy3QRAzw3G_mXov4t5ScAAP__lfBiqg) its normal size and engulfed a planet. The event was [spotted in 2020](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL8GdWhOh2TLhYrXqPNrU2rOcFgkCDxwMeO_zzh12t1mZz-u25VCDOn-nw5exOeNrIQnbzBpGDWaDTu3eGZk0_EynGaDADgP3b4wX9ztNBj2SAjTDLObB7DuzM6zo3MXFgQ0MME4AAw49N7CZWTy02ycNxejRmAXJJf-M4ckO_v4yk8uvc1HF5dd5FGV-adwVbi21np7q4lbfXuF6y1XyUnh-mYK1_qddAxfrKtQ0bVRjLmx05wkFNaPSIlFH0H0TuVJxWlLUdjumqqUnPLBpepKL4VrVxb3aCHGUE9nNcL9oBB_u-TvTT8BAAD__wEybPM) but it took this long for astronomers to crunch the data, make additional observations, and realize what they were seeing, as shown in this MIT animation [video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFuhDAQQNHTmM5oPDYLW7hIQ7dpU6IRHi-ODEb2ZFFuHyV1LvC_3sdjeVDK6Xi-085eYllolfTiBQYNTqNdsAs-MiPbjr25TRYBcDLd5i0GiCMhAcawTqNjwyvTNALe3GhclzwCWhjAGQCDpo8r3B1THCYbor1b5YBDklL7z5IO2Tjm7_Li2q9l77LfRM6m7JvCWeF88NX6PUnP4Uvh_JtWOFOTWo6yc226nUV0E6q6XZRzudLx1Gemg0XDALarPpxXyjm126gcPHdK-e8l_9N_AgAA__89AVpb).

The subpoena comes after office was made aware of the FBI-generated whistleblower form. The anonymous report allegedly links President Biden to a for policy decisions during his vice presidency. The FBI had no immediate comment, and the White House labeled the allegation But Comer said he expected the documents to be supplied by a meeting Russia Shoots Down Alleged Assassination Attempt Russia says it on the Kremlin by shooting down two drones aimed at President Vladimir Putin. () The Russians are blaming the attack on Ukraine, saying it was an attempt to assassinate Putin. any involvement. Russian officials say Putin is unharmed and wasn't present in the Kremlin. Western analysts note that Russia normally wouldn't release revealing air-defense video like this, and worry that the attack, if real, for Russia retaliating in force. Star Swallows a Planet Astronomers observed a dying red giant star swallow a Jupiter-sized planet in a single gulp, a phenomenon long understood but never before witnessed. The galactic extinction event -- which will happen to the earth in about 5 billion years -- took place between 10,000-15,000 years ago in the Milky Way galaxy as a star its normal size and engulfed a planet. The event was but it took this long for astronomers to crunch the data, make additional observations, and realize what they were seeing, as shown in this MIT animation . ➤ Donald Trump 's legal team won't call any defense witnesses in his defamation trial in NY. The case, which includes a rape allegation, is expected to go to the jury next week. Trump's lawyers have already said their client wouldn't testify. () ➤ The United Auto Workers union refuses to endorse President Joe Biden until he ensures union members are protected during the industry's transition to all-electric vehicles. The union wants its share of the pie, given that the government is using taxpayer money to subsidize the EV industry. () ➤ Economists released a first estimate of what it would cost if California decides to repay the historic damage from slavery: $1.2 million per black resident. The total cost of such reparations, if approved by the state, could reach more than $800 billion, almost triple California's annual budget. ( ➤ Cristiano Ronaldo became the world's highest-paid athlete following his move to a Saudi soccer club. His contract is estimated to be worth nearly $220 million. () ➤ Meanwhile , Lionel Messi plans to quit the Paris Saint-Germain soccer club after it suspended the superstar for two weeks for making a promotional trip to Saudi Arabia without the club's permission. () ➤ The 76ers ' Joel Embiid is named the NBA's Most Valuable Player, to his team's visible delight. The decision is one of the most aggressive any U.S. state has taken to fight back against social-cause-driven investment decisions. () ➤ Newly leaked documents show many pediatricians are at war with their own American Academy of Pediatrics over the AAP's aggressive push to approve the use of controversial puberty-blocking drugs. The leaked documents show many doctors feel the drugs are too risky for teens. () ➤ Advanced aliens could detect civilization on Earth through mobile tower radio signals leaked through the atmosphere, a new study suggests. Though Earth's individual radio transmissions are relatively quiet, the integrated output of billions of devices could be detected, scientists say. () ➤ Mercedes tapped its Formula 1 engineers to supercharge its efforts to develop a vastly more efficient mass-market electric vehicle to compete with Tesla. The company says its F1 team can cut 25 percent off development time for producing an EV. () ➤ Texas police arrested Francisco Oropeza, the man accused of murdering a family of five, when they caught him hiding underneath a pile of laundry after a four-day manhunt. subject: This is the most personal email you’ll read today
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0668013fe2ba451488512f43ff6c5376&_e=bUEZzGSIDaFuE38wWru7zQgDuXQYniu8lJYk3WCnwmXGxbGoMLxGrKWI8qARzoBXqsPveeV0Ycte6cRFhweXM_TVN8euNMjodsXl8YjHLoKAl02FiDBMohGG1p-X6JE8E5eyqclKnohrk_6eukX__qcAMFZiD0xOYPmiUYaQym7CAukdPUGIwcqhBT5yIATngQ8a07BrwXD8gVpyeyXZXB5NREfrBFsxS_xpy-yMUMF8QKD7DKW0OZqCN6RMPl-J)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0668013fe2ba451488512f43ff6c5376&_e=bUEZzGSIDaFuE38wWru7zQgDuXQYniu8lJYk3WCnwmXGxbGoMLxGrKWI8qARzoBXqsPveeV0Ycte6cRFhweXM_TVN8euNMjodsXl8YjHLoJmKO-_d1OL9TrrbkgRPPZT6HO7ZSPDGI6MUfg7C4OZNbEW_lUdRhE-QmnNHY8FsodhloUdg58FJyZrmzGvc--aRj2xKcdjbGHAs2cgGtLFedET05GMiPbQCMuIHm3l7umowURle2ejkQUvHHrettOH)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0668013fe2ba451488512f43ff6c5376&_e=bUEZzGSIDaFuE38wWru7zQgDuXQYniu8lJYk3WCnwmXGxbGoMLxGrKWI8qARzoBXqsPveeV0Ycte6cRFhweXM_TVN8euNMjodsXl8YjHLoK-iSkRcTUI14lzePHLE0QQdUWz7UinaBnf3pIhvlMLxIhTXkL6nzJKrKxG9-YLjFr3QygAzfql1-wFU5P_q-TGZHtykwlO5fECxyvZjfkDsKXXJmmaCA_Z_sve3bK_SYYrswQPAKn8zkvVVhaZ0Q_U)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0668013fe2ba451488512f43ff6c5376&_e=bUEZzGSIDaFuE38wWru7zQgDuXQYniu8lJYk3WCnwmXGxbGoMLxGrKWI8qARzoBXqsPveeV0Ycte6cRFhweXM7NK0u1Lo2uA88wPMnL6XF9DtkbCy7ayH28q6MRvIfxb40Td0GFeLrxMp64ImWfMTulsCDE87BRhxdcDcBXLVHgkJp-EZ7O4C15PzEO1B8clWjK4mA9pjjq83NDIJU_zOil4LPuAx_gN6DwAVJPMw9JQ3FlOvz_eq58iglTSagdel_tjzFwQcGFhFv1ylYZBYw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. Fellow American, 2024 is going to be a historic election year. A newly-released national poll shows former President Donald Trump is a competitive opponent for President Joe Biden in a general election rematch. **_I'm sure though, like me, you're hesitant to trust the big polling groups after they got the 2016 presidential polls completely and utterly WRONG_. ** You and I knew that Republicans would win BIG against Hillary Clinton, but the liberal news media and establishment polling groups didn't understand what was brewing among We the People. And, I'm not sure they realize the power that is rising among conservative voices RIGHT NOW. [**Before we can tackle the general election, we must first focus on the GOP Presidential Primary, and because we can't trust "big polling," Firebrand is conducting our own PRESIDENTIAL STRAW POLL. Can you tell me: which candidate do YOU want to be the 2024 Republican nominee for President?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjQtMzYzZGIxNzMyMGJjNDczZDhiNzk1NDMzZjI3NTQ3MjciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmlyZWJyYW5kLWFjdGlvbi9zdHJhd3BvbGw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SQU5PMzg0MTMifQ/pQFfoqR4xTyuyQRbRJy8WA)

---
While November 2024 might seem far away, multiple candidates have already announced their presidential campaigns ... or are expected to announce them soon. The frontrunners seem to be President Donald Trump and Florida Governor Ron DeSantis. Polls suggest that Trump has a large lead over DeSantis. [**But, I want to know STRAIGHT FROM YOU, is one of these candidates - Donald Trump or Ron DeSantis - your first choice to be the Republican Presidential nominee?**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjQtMzYzZGIxNzMyMGJjNDczZDhiNzk1NDMzZjI3NTQ3MjciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmlyZWJyYW5kLWFjdGlvbi9zdHJhd3BvbGw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SQU5PMzg0MTMifQ/vrbOhoH5VoT_vgQCedhISw) **President Biden** has yet to announce his bid for reelection. On the Republican side, three candidates have officially announced their bids for Commander in Chief:__**Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy.** While **Ron DeSantis** hasn't announced a presidential campaign, he continues to be the most competitive opponent for Trump. But, there are many other prominent Republicans who could throw their hat in the ring:
* **Mike Pence **
* **Mike Pompeo **
* **Chris Sununu **
* **Tim Scott**
* **Glenn Youngkin **
* **Kristi Noem **
* **Asa Hutchinson **
* **Liz Cheney **
* **John Bolton**

It's important that Firebrand hears from the PEOPLE to know which candidates are leading.**](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxMjQtMzYzZGIxNzMyMGJjNDczZDhiNzk1NDMzZjI3NTQ3MjciLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmlyZWJyYW5kLWFjdGlvbi9zdHJhd3BvbGw_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SQU5PMzg0MTMifQ/6sErnDZpZLTv3APpvuJJDw)

name: John (mobile)
subject: something more important than money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan |
body:
Peter, our best days are ahead of us if we keep the faith and say a prayer.
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Peter - I'm reaching out to you today because I'm asking for something far more important than a donation... **_[I'm asking for your prayers.](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=1bc92df30ad54faae37d6cdc0fb50d8e12f37a323eae812bf339c7673d9ff7e4da6695f72fdaf5cfd6a5c9ca1d5bedcbcabcfd840d54186b "I’m asking for your prayers.")_**

I'm asking for you to pray for those of us in Congress. We need God's hand on our hearts and minds as we make decisions that affect each and every family in America. _Only God will provide us with a path forward._ I believe that wholeheartedly. I know our best days are ahead of us, especially when we put our faith in Him. **[In honor of the National Day of Prayer, will you join me in prayer for our country?](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=1bc92df30ad54faa3c58dcf94578e6585c142d577b7871685e2ca48d18baf0a403224953f407f9aec29b8bcd8b325f8a7eb8cbe5c0f307b0 "In honor of the National Day of Prayer, will you join me in prayer for our country?")**
---
| | | [PRAY WITH ME](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=1bc92df30ad54faa3131a2a35ac0d41026d044c0dae75c7ce3f5f100d065f4ce5b8603d3c60eeb9b8c7f1af11d54d7afd1947af3450accff)
---
| We can overcome great obstacles with Him by our side. -John

name: Elizabeth BeShears, American Federation for Children
subject: Don’t let Katie Hobbs rip away school choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
It's very hypocritical that she's trying to take away the same choices from Arizona families.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9ed088e127447f6bd265f063d57697e&_e=8Suwf2TdWRFmDBDhZ9i2ai5P3rCYHvSSbO0WF4sanpXwGPKEQoEJvKFrrwsy3iGjTo1BAF8x5PcOrPqBGYQNgJ4lWAs697ca59tMkzvQ99_72v2ELPJbH3Jkf63ttiANDzf6xW9HkuHjwx2NjhxYPDobOmctKIxgbG55f13bC90GyVWHFOnmAoy3ZKkSRris8zYq53NzdM6NsnOvBFoOXQSSIniWr4QJA_K2GDHs9JcLWc5AUMysqDZBJtotfDBYelBMeaQB6tlgMCsubR9OLeOVQ9cNqoeA5-BivbHU7zQiHLs3W1SCMNeFbWh1yutaS2wh5Oa5k02pNSwhQzwPNVjkFTsvqW8VJ6X8iqg-ob1_HWVhE4dQKkKhN_KjJNpoWJU0KzGZPFzPxlmt_p-BaA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9ed088e127447f6bd265f063d57697e&_e=8Suwf2TdWRFmDBDhZ9i2ai5P3rCYHvSSbO0WF4sanpXwGPKEQoEJvKFrrwsy3iGjTo1BAF8x5PcOrPqBGYQNgJ4lWAs697ca59tMkzvQ99_72v2ELPJbH3Jkf63ttiANDzf6xW9HkuHjwx2NjhxYPDobOmctKIxgbG55f13bC90GyVWHFOnmAoy3ZKkSRris8zYq53NzdM6NsnOvBFoOXQSSIniWr4QJA_K2GDHs9JcLWc5AUMysqDZBJtotfDBYSOdHYiPnS-d57F6dAfZBF40q9KCu_FdBUKHKTEh3VzRp8VAQlCkiv2m-JEaU0YBl3P5B2HAqIamMi3ZlnTeQ8ooPQXr0UlAB1rFPYZg859XF1dhWmFGWiyxn9HcYbt__EM8LPo1eM9QmS2QInOqRaA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9ed088e127447f6bd265f063d57697e&_e=8Suwf2TdWRFmDBDhZ9i2ai5P3rCYHvSSbO0WF4sanpXwGPKEQoEJvKFrrwsy3iGjTo1BAF8x5PcOrPqBGYQNgJ4lWAs697ca59tMkzvQ99_72v2ELPJbH3Jkf63ttiANDzf6xW9HkuHjwx2NjhxYPDobOmctKIxgbG55f13bC90GyVWHFOnmAoy3ZKkSRris8zYq53NzdM6NsnOvBFoOXQSSIniWr4QJA_K2GDHs9JcLWc5AUMysqDZBJtotfDBY2cpmSZiaPgzkZVSzBgTTqm0FddjusB405BZDkusAeSX76LSS_ew7MjM1_ltWpIzjG6cHxpjrdSYxMkJujBlyhUzIv4EtaI-ibN3XM9q-HWHHHulD7-_2Np5v-ba473TwIQ3h0wD2QWWzDC4aGZXNSg%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| Freedom Nation Today
