clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Stop Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup from killing off even more monarchs
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Monarchs can't hold on much longer like this. Don’t let Bayer-Monsanto wreak havoc on these butterflies and our planet. Make your $27 gift now. ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755936?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755937?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755938?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We have bad news. We thought monarch populations were starting to recover last year. But we have some shocking numbers:
**The presence of Eastern monarch butterflies in their wintering grounds DROPPED 22% in just the last year! **
The monarch butterfly is officially endangered, according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature. _**The stakes have never been higher.**_ Monarch butterflies are at risk of dying off; some estimates show population declines of up to 95% since the 1990s. A key factor? Toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup. **[Stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and help save the monarchs before it's too late! We need at least 13 people from your area to make a $27 contribution before midnight tonight if we are going to make a difference for monarchs and our planet -- take a stand and make your gift today!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755940?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
Monarchs' migration patterns are unlike any other. They travel around 3,000 miles every year while acting as pollinators along the route. But in the last few decades, the use of herbicides like Roundup has grown. These chemicals are decimating the only food monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. Without milkweed, it is nearly **impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive.** Yet companies like Bayer-Monsanto continue to mercilessly put profits over pollinators, people, and the planet.
Friends of the Earth is putting everything we have into protecting our ecosystems from toxic pesticides, but we need your support to make an impact.
**Don't let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755936?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755937?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755938?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The monarch butterfly's incredible migration can span hundreds to thousands of miles over five generations. Yet each generation knows its destination thanks to an internal "compass" the monarchs follow.
But pesticide companies like Bayer-Monsanto seem to lack a moral compass -- continuing to sell glyphosate, the key ingredient in Roundup, no matter the cost to our planet and these incredible creatures.
**The use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup has increased by over 2,600%** from 1987 to 2016. This toxic weedkiller has virtually wiped out milkweed -- the only food source for young monarchs -- across the U.S.
And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides --**one-third with levels deadly to monarchs.** Young monarchs are hatching on toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed; their first meal may be their last.
The dangers don't end there, Friend. Glyphosate is listed as a probable carcinogen. It is also associated with developmental harm in humans, along with disruption of the gut microbiome, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. _**Farmers and homeowners are suing Bayer-Monsanto due to high rates of non-Hodgkins lymphoma linked to the Roundup**_ they've used on their farms and gardens. Roundup is causing extensive harm that must be stopped before it's too late.
**Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect our planet by making your $27 gift today. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755936?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755937?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755938?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When the greed of companies like Bayer-Monsanto comes at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Young monarchs are hatching on pesticide-riddled milkweed, eating these plants, and dying off. Meanwhile, monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs in the first place. **Monarch populations are in freefall -- the time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save.**
At Friends of the Earth, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet.
With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 13 people in your area today that will help us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides?
**Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today. **
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755936?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755937?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755938?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1755939?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**

subject: I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks: **I'm officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. **It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.**

Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most. **That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.** Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18. I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service. After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires. I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water. And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.** From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight. But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security. **You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62785984/404564486/-462806865?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4135-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjYzZjhlOS05MmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N2lACCANS6RrmSMjsSm04aO8U6IJonlrVfk16nHXUnw=)**

Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight. — Martin
|
* * *

name: Gun News USA
subject: That was a weird choice,
body:
Grab your “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW, before someone else does.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. |

If you went out and **bought a fancy new Kydex holster...**

**_That’s what I’d say to you._**

Because instead of spending $99+ on a clunky holster that **only fits one kind of gun...and is uncomfortable as hell...**

You could’ve **[gotten this FREE one here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9)** that’s far more comfortable... fits 99% of all handguns... is **way easier** to conceal.

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

**For a short time,** they’re [handing them out at no cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9) as part of a No More Gun Control campaign.

The only catch here is that they don’t have many left ** _(382 last I checked)._**

And this email just went out to over 120,000 other subscribers who are reading this just like you...

So you’ll need to move fast if you want one.

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9), before someone else does.

Thank You.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Colin Allred could take Ted Cruz out of the Senate in 2024. Want in?
body:
Allred’s running!!!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5a03045-a7e8-413a-840b-87edfdb70b38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**_BREAKING:_** **We have just the person to take out Ted Cruz, who in recently released recordings plotted to steal the 2020 election for Trump. What we've predicted is official: _Rep. Colin Allred will challenge Ted Cruz for his Senate seat in 2024._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T087964f0-8453-4477-b369-e08d6999d2d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This is huge, and by that I don't just mean Colin Allred:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bf1d20b-20e2-4675-85b8-bf897b7370a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yes, he's a large guy who played football in the NFL. But he's a real tough guy--not a petrified wimp play-acting tough like Cruz. _**_Allred was raised by a single mother and worked his way up to joining the Obama Administration. Then, in a huge upset, he knocked off GOP Rep. Pete Sessions in 2018 in a key swing seat._**_ Allred's the highest profile Black politician in Texas, with charisma as large as he is._ _Meanwhile, In addition to being a sleazoid who left Texans to freeze as he jetted off to Cancun, Cruz betrayed America. _**_Cruz is on tape talking to nutball Maria Bartiromo about creating a fake commission to steal the election in 2020._** [**_The legal system will do what it'll do. What ___we__ _ can do is kick Cruz' seditionist arse outta the Senate in '24, when Allred destroys this shell of a man who barely held on by 2.5% vs Beto O'Rourke in '18. So, will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to elect outstanding Allred and remove Cruz from public life?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff03114d-fef0-466b-869d-817e813dbfd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us elect a champion, and ousting a despicable traitor._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74470d6d-d34c-4c69-8032-cddfe4bc77ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Nathan, American Federation for Children
subject: Sign this card to Governor DeSantis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
This victory is monumental and should be recognized as such. That's why our team has put together this thank you...

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is a shameful, delegitimizing decision.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
History will not be kind to this court’s majority.
|
---

Last Friday, the new Republican majority of the North Carolina Supreme Court released a decision overturning that court’s 2022 decisions in _Harper v. Hall_ , the state court case that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps.
This shameful, delegitimizing decision to allow the unjust, blatant manipulation of North Carolina’s voting districts was not a function of legal principle, **it was a function of political personnel and partisan opportunism**. Neither the map nor the law have changed since last year’s landmark rulings -- _only the makeup of the majority of the North Carolina Supreme Court has changed_.
History will not be kind to this court’s majority, which will now forever be stained for irreparably harming the legitimacy and reputation of North Carolina’s highest tribunal. The eyes of the nation will now turn to the North Carolina legislature to see what further harm Republicans will do to undermine democracy in the state.
**Make no mistake, this moment is the result of a concerted effort by too many in the Republican Party to bend -- even break -- the rules of our democracy in order to unfairly gain and then hold onto power.** They fear they can’t win in a fair electoral system. Republicans have said themselves that state supreme court elections are ‘the next big political frontier.’ By planting partisan ideologues instead of fair-minded justices on the courts, they are weakening the independence of state judicial branches across the country in order to roll back rights and force unpopular policies -- including abortion and democracy destruction -- onto the people. We cannot allow them to succeed.
Our fair maps movement stopped them in Wisconsin, and we must do the same later this year in Pennsylvania. We will not abandon North Carolina. **We must stay engaged everywhere to promote electoral fairness and to protect our system of checks and balances, the cornerstones of our democracy.**
\-- Eric H. Holder, Jr.

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

body:
---
| | Let me give it to you straight, Peter. – I watched extreme MAGA Republicans launch their plan to [**unseat 37**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62786913/404568222/1662333042?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDVmOTZiYi05NGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkVSWeymV0-Jg0UqLelllowtVYG9ElB9wTra_eIttR4=) Democrats. – I watched the first poll of this election show we’re [**completely tied**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62786915/404568224/1662333042?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDVmOTZiYi05NGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkVSWeymV0-Jg0UqLelllowtVYG9ElB9wTra_eIttR4=) in the race for the House. – I watched Republicans rake in a record-breaking [**$38 million**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62786917/404568226/1662333042?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDVmOTZiYi05NGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkVSWeymV0-Jg0UqLelllowtVYG9ElB9wTra_eIttR4=) to pull ahead and defeat us. [**I’ve had it, Peter. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: Steve Bannon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
In case you missed the interview.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1f3la1pa8oju7lmd9k29m9bt7nf8ite1d4v060g_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9i66o35c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**" ABSOLUTELY."**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about _our movement_ that's different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _

body:
The difference between Biden and Trump

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62767279/404502215/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjY4MzNhYy03N2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vT5_K6sdwiiW7unu2hP8TFshZxYTxyNLC1bbOw5orQg=&emci=84b4d87c-26e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ff6833ac-77ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | In 2020, President Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast – less than 12,000 votes separated him from Trump.

In 2024, that number could be even SMALLER.

After Democrats won Georgia in 2020, Donald Trump and Republicans across the country vowed that they would never let Georgia go blue again. _**But then we re-elected Rev. Warnock in 2022._**

Now, the Koch network, Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and the entire GOP are all pouring resources into Georgia to ensure they can win the state in 2024 – **and they might succeed.**

clean_body: The difference between Biden and Trump | | | In 2020, President Biden won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast – less than 12,000 votes separated him from Trump. In 2024, that number could be even SMALLER. After Democrats won Georgia in 2020, Donald Trump and Republicans across the country vowed that they would never let Georgia go blue again. But then we re-elected Rev. Warnock in 2022. Now, the Koch network, Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and the entire GOP are all pouring resources into Georgia to ensure they can win the state in 2024 – and they might succeed. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = If we don’t get that 0.23% lead in 2024, we could be looking at Trump’s second term. We could watch him appoint even more Supreme Court Justices who will rule exactly like Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito. We could watch him gut funding for Social Security and Medicare. We could watch him lay down and roll over for Vladimir Putin, leaving our allies in the dust. | Peter, Please join me and my team this **Saturday, May 6th** , once the 28th Senate District polls close. I will be hosting an election night party at the Culpeper Center & Suites and would be grateful to be able to celebrate with all of my friends and supporters. **The polls will be open from 10am-4pm** , and voting locations vary by county. Our post-election event is free, and I'd love to see you there after you cast your ballot.
---
| | |

| If you are unsure of where your polling place is located, **please use the link below to see the addresses posted on my website**. Again, I'd love the opportunity to connect once the polls close at 4, so please stop by to say hello! Yours in service,

| Bryce E. Reeves

name: Greater Georgia
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS GOVERNOR KEMP AS HE SIGNS ZUCKERBUCKS BAN INTO LAW
disclaimer_text: paid for by special interests," said Loeffler
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MAY 4
KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS GOVERNOR KEMP AS HE SIGNS ZUCKERBUCKS BAN INTO LAW
ATLANTA - Yesterday, Greater Georgia Chairwoman and Former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler joined Governor Brian Kemp as he signed [Senate Bill 222](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jy0mYHxiSpKdUwsBfTo06LVqiogcKpIzWMQGHbmeFyVhmvxi0x9_RpH3bYSZzm0V7V_8jL4KCuE1ntf1zAoJ9vFpQl_IoebXtmxueEuAm4INsdX8S3NCR3zKzDHO_XvPhSds92cVWk7Tmqmzfn1wwdVN4lxrEMjR8SLVYykSrUc=&c=uU31-U1ncuaqo9iLpyVK5qVi5reBHsHSDhen0reZof7cq66MTTToIw==&ch=fFgtrP2Ngl8mvWUQcQWhFqjZvREFczOgUtMAvlAoMj_kgBbBSFJLoA==), Georgia's new "Zuckerbucks" ban, into law. The law [prevents](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jy0mYHxiSpKdUwsBfTo06LVqiogcKpIzWMQGHbmeFyVhmvxi0x9_Rop3ylMNQa5u15FXCZMvCW1e4Uwcky2pVUULr9pbzQ255kfYD80ulVVgfMR_5k2a7O9eDBaFdaqcsx0Sk7Pc-joGfwj7JJFVfdRsN-1R6Uw-hA16qplFjIySnfTOrau9OHM6CfFrUROG_QUpqagsXyhibQEbZrO7R_TlgEXFTV3qFlW0jd55mNIJf9tikAxfHKsybJmn-HoWGhWVJ-q9Wfnrc9aWLIx8lA==&c=uU31-U1ncuaqo9iLpyVK5qVi5reBHsHSDhen0reZof7cq66MTTToIw==&ch=fFgtrP2Ngl8mvWUQcQWhFqjZvREFczOgUtMAvlAoMj_kgBbBSFJLoA==) local governments from accepting outside funding to pay for their election operations.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jy0mYHxiSpKdUwsBfTo06LVqiogcKpIzWMQGHbmeFyVhmvxi0x9_Rop3ylMNQa5ugmkWB9WGojz50uFJNy5RUI9xPYiuqXxMmNKBSp5CkMetLHC5bhytGZ82ProUcenccuNaNlPR-0LaY7eFkD4tZtjCLvMBagLedm0MPf_K1Bfu5a-1AkY7lgUt8hAtJc-5&c=uU31-U1ncuaqo9iLpyVK5qVi5reBHsHSDhen0reZof7cq66MTTToIw==&ch=fFgtrP2Ngl8mvWUQcQWhFqjZvREFczOgUtMAvlAoMj_kgBbBSFJLoA==)
---
| "Today, Governor Kemp took the final step to ensure that elections in the state of Georgia are never bought and paid for by special interests," said Loeffler. "I am deeply grateful to the Governor for signing SB 222 into law, and to all our conservative lawmakers who took immediate action to stop partisan influence in our elections when Greater Georgia blew the whistle on it earlier this year. This is a tremendous win not only for our organization but for every Georgia voter - and we will never stop fighting to hold bad actors accountable, to deliver free and fair elections in the state of Georgia."
Senate Bill 222 was initially introduced in February after Greater Georgia [blew the whistle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGP6KJR8By3y4tQnC97A56ST8tnmWVMJUzrElB7rzmSeRR9uQn7CvsC8s1rQhxuVAp6LRlhEv75aURR0ztNiD7S-I0WCAthpDKMeOULQDyEAAPQDLvDJneQDMvF7mZEAA8DNARol0LCLZG9jdQE2IzBuX5AMGKJaUW8kMmMbxVXa8_F7wy0c_w8GoKl8id7cLr6SWuRBt-dTNaG4Nk6vkk_o=&c=sYHXHqQ-JWwLQhBzC70Z26j8A2XS9s1npB20z4A8IvpoKcuCGs60-A==&ch=2x_cpRo1pazfSJ8gfJ_51wlwPcU0sDAIQTLJOHSVIDIgukeyqjx46g==) on DeKalb County, which covertly sought and then accepted $2 million in grant funding from the Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL). Greater Georgia has a [long history](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010iZhc2IlbXO__4JR6fpa_7hDp5I3p4nmnQHErOkTzsRRdRxfj1uytYiE-IfS36s771JuchEIzhes9OWa0TlD6DP2UwdLHwr1gaYlyKmFSDzKMhcR2ck1rFMjTTF0AsyXGTNDsfk-yq0tZQFXj_oFrV3dvlb7REMV8bWMamerScp5baIXl-dAG2OjJn9usZ0LziS5cYdDgOD3IIYpQ-bO-htrhCADBLj_Ri2Ea_iCwD32dzWP3-jtETftAf2DHjh_01z6wnqAXupe4WfFWOJzSg==&c=I6A7ZtJJ5mJHY_Zl3zbrKkJN9jyZsZfR-4I_FR8F2jU47conRKWdvQ==&ch=4qEfiCT2x3XPZKz4pKLcHfSPPdTbNuSzfor9ZPP_xdHCLntXd2HGJQ==) of opposing "Zuckerbucks," dating back to 2020 - when CTCL partnered with Mark Zuckerberg to [funnel $45 million](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010iZhc2IlbXO__4JR6fpa_7hDp5I3p4nmnQHErOkTzsRRdRxfj1uytYiE-IfS36s7-eSsGnjJcZuK1V-jOBCDfgrpYPmeZbdv9nuttMB0mRp5vr-nkg4eZlAx-oX8O3l6TkF2u0LeqXghK-AkAhXA-DsHrAtelmnJocyCe1xfa9YW6wjTanEROV20a6G6VZED6138jG6hzKM=&c=I6A7ZtJJ5mJHY_Zl3zbrKkJN9jyZsZfR-4I_FR8F2jU47conRKWdvQ==&ch=4qEfiCT2x3XPZKz4pKLcHfSPPdTbNuSzfor9ZPP_xdHCLntXd2HGJQ==) into left-leaning boards of election in Georgia.
The legislation was sponsored by Senator Max Burns (R-Sylvania) in the Senate and carried by Representative Houston Gaines (R-Athens) in the House. Having been signed into law, it now takes immediate effect.
Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity.

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Meet My New District!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZADjoD03M8Yg-x9wUfAiurUNgrci3X7Y_CdRbg0IE1iaquVFOUl0IrWIFN0VJ4gaRkC4hC0oGQL_y_ff-Z5ZPzjxOZKL1RGBXE5x0ppg1BpMa38fZEIwqvdhaif7GFypj32DwCmPNYtu4vDJC-0uh3CeeeKBX0_GrGdIrTToXM8=&c=a6lInrJMUlBpPe3_2ju2YwgEmKOQy4O8aCvBgRSzpL5Ky0yWPAOP_Q==&ch=FnedStV0170U6sAayfe5D2rX7MYob9tp_doazFwGlvBSNeGhJtsm9A==)
---
| Hi Peter,
Here's the deal with my new district! We lost neighborhoods in Roanoke that made up a Democratic base of the district and added neighborhoods like Belmont and Garden City where Republicans won over 60% of the vote.
[This shake-up shifted my district's partisanship six points to the right, making this the toughest re-election of my career!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZADjoD03M8Yg-x9wUfAiurUNgrci3X7Y_CdRbg0IE1iaquVFOUl0IqE00sSPzZoTEfDZ8GRvlKMaBRMYRCQVC6BwXQpOFcsL1v-1G4XxYi2KUZKhRggJyxMwiaRaxB9kkqaAJqKHWeIN5FNzzdTyNh2fdLK1AxFLrzg0yRl4IfNXNeegNWr9-Y1yoz8UqpttdRWmq_DzrE0=&c=a6lInrJMUlBpPe3_2ju2YwgEmKOQy4O8aCvBgRSzpL5Ky0yWPAOP_Q==&ch=FnedStV0170U6sAayfe5D2rX7MYob9tp_doazFwGlvBSNeGhJtsm9A==)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Belmont Neighborhood! My kids and I have been delivering Meals on Wheels to seniors in the Belmont neighborhood. We had a great time meeting our new neighbors, and introducing ourselves!
---
| | |
---
| Garden City Neighborhood! At Garden City Elementary, I joined students to discuss how the legislature works, being kind to one another, and answering their hard-hitting questions!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| In this more competitive district we can't win without your support. Winning this race means we'll need field materials like canvassing lit and yard signs, as well as a substantial budget for paid communications to reach the new parts of the district. [Can you please make a contribution today to help me win in my upcoming election?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZADjoD03M8Yg-x9wUfAiurUNgrci3X7Y_CdRbg0IE1iaquVFOUl0IqE00sSPzZoTEfDZ8GRvlKMaBRMYRCQVC6BwXQpOFcsL1v-1G4XxYi2KUZKhRggJyxMwiaRaxB9kkqaAJqKHWeIN5FNzzdTyNh2fdLK1AxFLrzg0yRl4IfNXNeegNWr9-Y1yoz8UqpttdRWmq_DzrE0=&c=a6lInrJMUlBpPe3_2ju2YwgEmKOQy4O8aCvBgRSzpL5Ky0yWPAOP_Q==&ch=FnedStV0170U6sAayfe5D2rX7MYob9tp_doazFwGlvBSNeGhJtsm9A==)
Thank you for your support!
My very best,

body:

Far-left Democrat Rep. Colin Allred has announced he's running
against me in 2024.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC-Rm7DsN

Fellow
Conservative,

Did you
see the breaking news?

Far-left
Democrat Rep. Colin Allred has announced he's running against me
in 2024.

And what
kind of person is Colin Allred?

…Allred wants men to compete in women's sports…

…Allred supports a pro-crime agenda, reducing penalties
for murder, carjacking, armed robbery, and even sexual
assault…

…Allred wants to ban law-abiding Texans from owning
rifles…

…Allred is an open borders radical who supports polices
that make the crisis worse…

…Allred voted to fund 87,000 new IRS agents to go after
YOU…

Allred
doesn't represent Texas values - not even close.

He
supports Biden's far-left agenda of higher taxes, reckless
spending, open borders, and soft-on-crime policies. Last year, he
voted with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time!

Fellow
Conservative, we can't let a radical leftist like Colin Allred
flip our state blue in 2024.

GAME ON
>> HELP BOOST TEAM CRUZ RIGHT NOW >>

Pitch in
your best gift today to help me Keep Texas Red >>

URGENT:
DONATE NOW >>

Together,
we can secure victory in this race - and be part of the effort to
TAKE BACK THE SENATE and FIRE JOE BIDEN.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Join me in praying for our country today
body:
| | |
---
---
Today is the National Day of Prayer! While we do not need a day designated as an official day of prayer in order to pray, millions of Americans will be praying together today, and as it’s the most important action we can take to save our country, I want to invite you to join in. When you pray today, please pray for our country. Pray for all of our elected officials, especially those who support wicked policies. Pray that their hearts are changed, and that all of them lead with integrity, humility, wisdom, and with the goal of pursuing what is true, good, and beautiful. Pray for the leaders who do stand up for truth and justice, that they remain strong and faithful to the truth. Pray also for the safety of all elected officials. Pray for our education system and the teachers, that our schools and teachers will teach truth and reality, rather than indoctrinating and brainwashing children with lies and instilling anger and delusions. Pray for America’s children, that they will cease being used and exploited by adults with evil ideas and aims. Pray for the security of our nation, and that our enemies’ hearts are changed, so that they do not want power, war, destruction, and death. Pray for our military, that our military leaders stop all radical, woke policies and return our armed forces to their previous place of honor. Pray for our troops that are currently deployed, as well as those that are here at home, and for our veterans. Pray for their families as well. Pray for peace in the world, that efforts to start WWIII are thwarted, and that current conflicts come to an end peacefully. Pray for a change of heart for all who want war and are making decisions that increase the likelihood of further conflict. There is so much more we can pray for, so please add your own prayers to this list. I would love to know if you participated today, so please don’t hesitate to write back. We desperately need more prayer in America right now, so let us also pray that this is the start of a prayer revival in our country – that people continue to pray fervently and consistently for God’s grace and mercy beyond today. God bless you, Jenny Beth Martin
---

subject: re: the Hunter Biden coverup

body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a8fae74cad814eac80d9068328cde293&_e=Az9VO6Ux_2KYImc1gpseKzI_Fg9lVy_CCD1AY9H7lpV4gYXi35qCdoPxDsqBfbVReGjJbN6_Jb3pjbhqMtVeHtLDBHtGSMe8qr6-x92z5k3oTYjxSvdcYC7XIzgAHg6ysFGx4Zr0gX5SIYv1-qjiwo4JYlZCCo3VrgDMML6xVQEkP0uUKzW8KBZyTczNDkMOplVdUbOLOK1MMQGwcoZvwk1m9jxLO-T8_KEloWtUqXFwHB7Y40-Usd9FjF1v_wA_7pR29-NBdVwk8vZZabYYBBS4a2kdWYF6LDmLRhQ4M33o6wn4TNyIr4UrpMAaGbvMegh2OA9aGw5u17rvoUMunZxNJEWL9pfuWLh1BgxSV0Y%3D)

Peter, When a whistleblower alleged that the IRS was intentionally mishandling their case against Hunter Biden, I was upset but not surprised.

For too long, Joe Biden has made excuses for his son - even when it could be in conflict with American national security.

_We see political families living above the law in corrupt dictatorships and communist regimes, but there is NO reason it should be happening in the freest nation on Earth._

**The American people deserve transparency. It’s time for equal justice to be served under the law no matter WHO you are.**

[**Join me today and demand accountability for Hunter Biden’s crimes!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a8fae74cad814eac80d9068328cde293&_e=Az9VO6Ux_2KYImc1gpseKzI_Fg9lVy_CCD1AY9H7lpV4gYXi35qCdoPxDsqBfbVReGjJbN6_Jb3pjbhqMtVeHtLDBHtGSMe8qr6-x92z5k3oTYjxSvdcYC7XIzgAHg6ysFGx4Zr0gX5SIYv1-qjiwo4JYlZCCo3VrgDMML6xVQEkP0uUKzW8KBZyTczNDkMOplVdUbOLOK1MMQGwcoZvwl-YBBjFtUs-dLuwBiOXQWypLaP9FK0qZW-Wef6_8lJMFkBsc7MKEfylwNNO4aWwHO-RFVfX_3ZzK_7pRRcwpPjdavblyJ2DJXWfe6JkLRvAyLCBPDflKdGlRWZGDJI23-CkHy41xuGs_3S--pvwHlY%3D)

Peter, I moved to America from communist Vietnam, where if your family was a part of the regime, you could get away with _anything_ you wanted.

_And before Joe Biden came into the White House, I NEVER thought I’d see that kind of corruption here in the United States._

It’s absolutely sickening and downright un-American to see our so-called Commander in Chief using his administration to cover for his son, but when it comes to the Biden Administration, we’ve learned to expect the lowest of the low.

**The lies and corruption in this family MUST be brought to light, and I won't stop until they are.**

[**Join me today and STOP the Biden's corruption!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a8fae74cad814eac80d9068328cde293&_e=Az9VO6Ux_2KYImc1gpseKzI_Fg9lVy_CCD1AY9H7lpV4gYXi35qCdoPxDsqBfbVReGjJbN6_Jb3pjbhqMtVeHtLDBHtGSMe8qr6-x92z5k3oTYjxSvdcYC7XIzgAHg6ysFGx4Zr0gX5SIYv1-qjiwo4JYlZCCo3VrgDMML6xVQEkP0uUKzW8KBZyTczNDkMOplVdUbOLOK1MMQGwcoZvwtHWkJ_cRQNGXkMzJ1o2v5xLRVNAsAhN0Xq4Dr6eXOk9mCn4egYLnkBVwAC_DfHRsc1TfRRdP0vnXgY_MmmWvE7kIvB-XBo7qev4LXCRzpYG4rD8lUvbW9fPLTV0DdPF6A4snrgWgKcmYMUabVo_454%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, When a whistleblower alleged that the IRS was intentionally mishandling their case against Hunter Biden, I was upset but not surprised. For too long, Joe Biden has made excuses for his son - even when it could be in conflict with American national security. We see political families living above the law in corrupt dictatorships and communist regimes, but there is NO reason it should be happening in the freest nation on Earth. The American people deserve transparency. It’s time for equal justice to be served under the law no matter WHO you are. Peter, I moved to America from communist Vietnam, where if your family was a part of the regime, you could get away with anything you wanted. And before Joe Biden came into the White House, I NEVER thought I’d see that kind of corruption here in the United States. It’s absolutely sickening and downright un-American to see our so-called Commander in Chief using his administration to cover for his son, but when it comes to the Biden Administration, we’ve learned to expect the lowest of the low. The lies and corruption in this family MUST be brought to light, and I won't stop until they are. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

3. They want to radicalize your child against Christian, Conservative, and Pro-America values.

**_But Friend, we have a plan of our own to stop them..._** You see, the 1776 Project PAC is leading the strongest conservative school board effort in our country’s history. As the first ever political action committee created to take back our nation’s schools by flipping school boards from LIBERAL to CONSERVATIVE we’ve developed a **3 Step School Board Victory Playbook: **

3. Execution - We deploy radio, print, email, and text message advertisements to key voters in our target districts and mobilize parents to go take back their schools!

We’ve applied this strategy across more than 15 states and have achieved AMAZING results for our candidates. Fellow Conservative, Last week, two-term West Virginia Governor Jim Justice announced he’s challenging **Joe Manchin** for the Senate seat he currently occupies.

**Republican's haven't held this seat since 1959;** Justice’s entrance into the race is a big deal. Joe Manchin has been in office since 2010 and is the **LAST federally elected Democrat from West Virginia.**

As we gear up for what is expected to be one of the most fierce, contentious campaigns of the 2024 election,**[we’re asking that you take a moment to fill out our official 2023 Senate Questionnaire today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c4de46591df40a0a78e22c135eb46a5&_e=JwK18pnZGbHJ3qpf1i6fjwzjPcu-VQyCAuOxfnga4QKsQAmhCoX0A7ZMo9KuQQATit9nkDghyDaot5KFtEz0WuGR3H4tRKiJAgxMqOD4INoKcIgvz-lBGGsseLVTkEnSYsUihRAvd8MdQe5ha9GDezKCXfev9iRZyXUa4L_0lQkQ7lqVjKnXncZV5f126hujimhGbODqG3_6aM3WpVKZFWD7820fCAim8rkMSVY6BXWbvQOOQ5egXixn6ChiWLHH1EfCcobKrYcKYAAn-tskkAUO9C1hot7IUHCljEXBSRVm90DODUzvoPYfeCveaY2gyRVKciliDCpzcIZlRrW0bcNWg_1UDX-RPVYDOH9RL8U5nr8kOtix9ifV6o7LKqKDRJLycuDkfomjYI1TR4Y7teEdfFZg67tdhlqiVNv9Cls%3D)**

**We need 400 responses by 11:59 tonight. Please let us hear from you.**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Peter, Hey, it’s Chaney D. from Team Haley. As governor of South Carolina, as UN ambassador, and as a presidential candidate, Nikki Haley has always backed the blue. What’s happened to our men and women in uniform under Democrats’ control is a disgrace. Instead of showing them appreciation for keeping us safe, the left wants to: defund them, take away their authority, and demean them. NOT NIKKI HALEY. She understands the importance of taking care of those who take care of us. Not only does she have a record of supporting our law enforcement, she understands these officers deserve our respect. I can tell you from a decade first hand experience, Nikki goes out of her way to speak with every officer she sees – no matter where we are or how busy she is. At her town hall events, she takes time to stop the event, thank the officers on site, and asks the crowd to do the same. Afterwards, she shakes their hands, asks them questions, takes pictures, and recognizes their hard work. As governor she always made sure to clear her schedule to attend law enforcement graduation ceremonies. That’s because real leaders set the tone with their own behavior. Nikki knows that and it’s why she always takes time to BACK THE BLUE. It’s one of the many reasons our team is working so hard. Nikki takes this personally. America deserves a president dedicated to having law enforcement’s backs and keeping communities safe. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=b25ec62c02f4aae8bc9e1c09dba12843b81141aaee7760b0ea12df76e4f2e30e673777ebcc5e368261a99d3a22930a1d500be11bb17cba66 SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY Nikki is fighting to save our country. body:
| | | **BREAKING:** The Rachel Maddow Show just became the MOST-WATCHED cable news program in its time slot -- _but we still have**NO RECORD** of whether you tune in!_

| | EMAIL: **[DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
---
MADDOW SHOW VIEWER: **UNKNOWN**

**Do you watch The Rachel Maddow Show?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12818?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230504-NewsAlert-MaddowCableWinRF2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230504-NewsAlert-MaddowCableWinRF2023-Pros-sl1&akid=10647%2E9716520%2ETj07ik)

---

Team, this is a huge win:

In newly released ratings, The Rachel Maddow Show was the MOST-WATCHED cable news show at the 9pm hour, notching _over 2.4 million_ viewers and _crushing_ Fox News' ultra-conservative Sean Hannity!

But we've dug through our records and couldn't track down whether YOU are one of The Maddow Show's _millions_ of viewers. **Please lock in your response TONIGHT so we have your updated information on file:**

**ANSWER MISSING OR OUTDATED:****Do you watch The Rachel Maddow Show?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12818?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230504-NewsAlert-MaddowCableWinRF2023-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230504-NewsAlert-MaddowCableWinRF2023-Pros-sl1&akid=10647%2E9716520%2ETj07ik)

body:

| | Real quick...

I didn't even take a shower yet because this email is THAT important.

Here are two things to do if you give a damn about the future of Idaho (of course, you do):

1\. [**Read & subscribe to this blog TODAY**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=519eafde94&e=dea908e0fe "who's the extremist now?") <\--- before lunch

2\. [**Watch THIS tonight with your loved ones:

**](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=17db0b2529&e=dea908e0fe "What happened in Colorado can happen here")**[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=19a7f63568&e=dea908e0fe)**

Because Idaho will either fall to leftists in "The Gem State Heist"...

**Or...**

_We'll continue to break their backs for another generation. _

Keep fighting the good fight,

**Brian**

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

It's official: I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks: **I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. **It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.** **[I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support on Day One is a key part of it. Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**
Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.
I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[If you’re all in on this fight, pitch in with a grassroots donation of any amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62778474/404543078/995242207?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM2OTc3NC04OGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPBtG_hDaKXPFTPoTHs_82ToNn1cGP_sbYm9OK6mll8=)**
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

clean_body: It's official: I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks: I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year. We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going all in for the fights that matter most. That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office. Last year, against the odds, I went all in to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18. I went all in to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service. After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went all in to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires. I went all in to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water. And now I’m all in to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long. From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight. But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security. You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.= Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . clean_body: | | | “The DCCC is prepared to recruit exciting and battle-ready candidates in these key districts” \- DCCC Chair Rep. Suzan DelBene | | Fellow conservative, I can’t believe it. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) just put my district on their official “in-play” target list. Here’s what it means: The Democrats are cherry-picking far Left candidates who will do their bidding at ANY COST to try and defeat me. We’re going to see MILLIONS of** dark money dollars pouring in from people like George Soros and other liberal Hollywood elites. They’re already planning VICIOUS attack ads against me to further their socialist agenda. So I’ll be honest with you -- I need your help. Fellow conservative, our House majority is extremely slim. That means we can’t afford to lose a single seat - especially in the Republican stronghold of Florida. I’m holding down the fort to keep our nation free from the liberal socialist regime, but I’m going to need reinforcements. Thank you, | | | | Rep. name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell Senate Democrats to Stop Letting Republicans Block Judges
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Senate Democrats to Stop Letting Republicans Block Judges through Blue Slips >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91a5dd47-905b-4e72-91b9-9662a6754946/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te92fc6c8-4fe3-476c-94ea-31fecc4dbc7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Nominations for federal judges require Senate approval, and with Democrats in control of the Senate, Republicans should be powerless to stop them. **But an old and very stupid practice known as "blue slips" allows senators to block confirmation of senators from their home state. So one senator can block the whole thing.** It's hard to stress just how asinine this is, and it's hard to believe that Democrats are STILL letting Republicans do it, when they can get rid of the practice at any time. The Congressional Black Caucus is calling on Senate Democratic leaders to end this, and we couldn't agree more. **Senate norms and traditions that were once quaint have been weaponized by extremist Republicans. And it's time to get rid of them.** [**Tell Senate Democrats to Stop Letting Republicans Block Judges through Blue Slips.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e133ffd-c434-4dc6-a3c1-b9cb65fad800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
It appears as if Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
#

Peter -
We send a good amount of fundraising emails, and we don’t expect you to give to every one that hits your inbox. But we do hope you’ll give to this one.
Please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** It appears that Kari Lake is getting closer to getting into this race, and when she does it will be with the full backing of the MAGA-right.
**THEN:** An article came out suggesting that Kyrsten Sinema is considering whether or not to run herself — something we really have to be ready for both ways.
**NOW:** We’re approaching the halfway point of our next FEC deadline and this quarter has not been off to the kind of start we need.
If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d reach our goals today and have the resources we need to win this race.
But not everyone does give. Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in.
Can you?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and your support will get us back on track.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230504&t=1&akid=614%2E734936%2EvUCFHM)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Freedom isn’t Free.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2a985001938b/failed-border-policies-threaten-rural-america-480336?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| “Freedom isn’t Free.”

It’s an adage every American grows up hearing, and one we learn the weight of as we get older. When we think about those who defend our freedoms, typically, we think of our nation’s brave servicemen and servicewomen fighting overseas to protect the American way of life. These heroes are fighting against oppressive regimes and bad foreign actors who threaten the democracy our Founding Fathers fought so hard to establish.

But recently, we’ve seen an uprising of threats to American freedoms and liberties right here at home.

Freedom of Speech, Freedom of the Press, Freedom of Religion, Freedom of Assembly, the Right to Bear Arms, the Right to Life, and the Right to Privacy have all been attacked by radical liberal activists, leaders, and attorneys over the last few years. Across all levels and branches of government, public officials are taking steps to restrict Constitutional protections. Even on a micro level, in our schools and in our communities, we’re seeing personal liberties threatened.

A few recent examples of such actions come to mind:
* In February, President Biden proposed ending a policy that provides extra protections for the rights of religious student groups.
* Extreme anti-gun laws are making their way through progressive state governments such as Vermont, Oregon, and Michigan.
* Facebook and continue to suppress and censor conservative content and users.
* Progressive states such as New Jersey, Oregon, Colorado, New Mexico, and Vermont have no restrictions on abortion access.

The list goes on and on. And just as our nation’s servicemembers fight to protect our freedoms abroad, I’m committed to protecting our freedoms and liberties here in Mississippi. As Desoto County District Attorney, I will fight day in and day out to ensure our Constitutional rights were upheld and fortified. While liberal, radical attorneys and officials across the country may be working to strip Americans of their personal liberties, I will always work against their intentions and defend the freedoms granted to us from God.

Freedom isn’t free and it must be protected.

As district attorney, I cannot solve all these problems alone. It falls on conservative leaders at EVERY level of local government to collectively band together to combat the onslaught of radical left policies and practices that threaten our way of life. But I promise to do my part by using every tool at my disposal to protect, fight, and defend our collective liberties.

---

subject: Washington Republicans just voted to cut jobs, strip veterans’ funding, slash healthcare coverage for millions, and gut Meals on Wheels.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Yes, you read that right.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62784661/404559855/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_bo2024vesfcdc_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MDY0OS04ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZl9n2YQtS0pXcXhtai23yPWi6nNg15nti27DOiv1hU=)
Peter,

Last week, the extreme House Republican caucus passed one of their most extreme, out-of-touch, and dangerous bills yet. _Take a look >>_
_**217 House Republicans voted to:**_
❌ Gut veterans’ benefits.
❌ Cut jobs here at home – including 7,600 in OH-13.
❌ Slash funding for food assistance programs.
❌ Roll back cancer research.
❌ Threaten Medicare, Medicaid, and Veterans Affairs healthcare coverage.
❌ Jeopardize Social Security payments.
❌ Undermine our response to the opioid epidemic.
_... and the list just goes on._

**This is nothing short of an out-of-touch, extremist wish list – full of budget cuts that will threaten and harm working families across Ohio and the nation.** But the reality is: The MAGA Republicans controlling the House will stop at nothing to advance their extremist agenda, so long as they retain control of the Speaker’s Gavel.

[**Putting an end to the dangerous Republican Majority has never been more important. But to do so, we need to defend every single Democratic seat – starting right here in Northeast Ohio. That’s why we have to ask: Will you chip in to keep OH-13 blue and send Emilia back to Congress to fight for working families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62784662/404559856/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_bo2024vesfcdc_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWY4MDY0OS04ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZl9n2YQtS0pXcXhtai23yPWi6nNg15nti27DOiv1hU=)

This is nothing short of an out-of-touch, extremist wish list – full of budget cuts that will threaten and harm working families across Ohio and the nation. clean_body: Help us counter the Super PAC’s effort. | | Friend, We recently alerted you that a Soros-linked Super PAC has begun targeting 6 battleground states with a $75 MILLION spending blitz to buy Crooked Joe the White House. But there’s something important we want to add... ...some of those states have legalized BALLOT HARVESTING. At the beginning of the year, President Trump made a major announcement that our campaign would ballot harvest in the states where it’s legal to counter the Left’s schemes. Now, he needs your help to be certain that we’re ESPECIALLY focused on ballot harvesting in the states targeted by Soros’ network. | - Thank you, Team. Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: DonaldJTrump.com Date: Mon, May 1, 2023 Subject: RE: the 6 top battlegrounds of 2024 To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, Biden’s fundraising has reportedly been a DISASTER... ...So, a Soros-linked Super PAC is trying to salvage Crooked Joe’s campaign by spending $75 MILLION in the 6 STATES they’ve determined to be the TOP battlegrounds of 2024: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin | President Trump needs YOUR help to fight back and mobilize ASAP in all 6 battleground states to ensure we SAVE AMERICA. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Schrier
subject: AXIOS: "Murray and Schrier seek to protect abortion doctors in blue states"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Doctors should not face criminal penalties, loss of licensure, or loss of insurance coverage for providing abortion care. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62785188/404561695/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzJlZGY4Yi05MGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1uMbs0K9uBqb5ol3txSs3dd3M7NrSOcdCfXyJGrDVI=&emci=5c0e7f54-cbe9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=332edf8b-90ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , women in states with restrictive abortion bans have been forced to flee to other states to receive the reproductive care they need. Now, state legislatures across the country are using every tactic possible to restrict access to abortion – including targeting doctors.

**That's why Kim and Senator Patty Murray just re-introduced the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act.**

I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks: **I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. **It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.** [**I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support on Day One is a key part of it. Will you become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Gabe Vasquez today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62785223/404561873/583301248?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230504heinrich_mh_actives_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmNjZTNjZS05MGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ew3i9-7cWjURWGB4ysrmbYAHjeDKg9QPXD2iAcoEjWY=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**
Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.
I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Gabe Vasquez >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62785233/404561883/583301248?refcode=fl_em_ta_20230504heinrich_mh_actives_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmNjZTNjZS05MGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ew3i9-7cWjURWGB4ysrmbYAHjeDKg9QPXD2iAcoEjWY=)**

clean_body: I wanted you to hear it from me personally. | = I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks: I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year. We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going all in for the fights that matter most. That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office. Last year, against the odds, I went all in to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18. I went all in to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service. After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went all in to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires. I went all in to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water. And now I’m all in to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long. From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight. But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security. You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight. — Martin | To keep the Democratic Majority in the Senate and take back the House we need to re-elect Senator Heinrich and Representative Vasquez. Split a donation today between their campaigns: | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Peter, Bill is on the trail this week, so while there won't be a livestream of the Common Ground Podcast today, last week's episode was so incredible that we wanted to reach out to you about it again. Bill went live from A Seat at the Table—the hottest annual convention in New Jersey for those who choose freedom and common sense solutions. A Seat at the Table enables you to have your ideas heard, and gives you knowledge about the movements out there which are moving the state of New Jersey and the country in the right direction. If you weren't able to catch last Thursday's livestream, or if you'd like to watch a replay of it, [click here now.](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/594369c2c085a504564fb36d7776c570/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTi9KbiIhoHqLOYTrU0rou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4AxCKXFBcggd3eti2AwYoLJhkKCioBeXF62uvV5ZjGcCZuEWqbiV4w9fwDExn190YQL1ETRz2fpDEWXRK4yzRoMyVrvhLs126sybc-XEK4_jTixWjsNPqBjxSLU57SqY30VFxzV-JZOOZZlFXVS0uukOUi4K3Z5OzDrUglxJF-dmeYP_WjE-QCmKO)

| Bill interviewed some major advocates for common sense, including: **Corey DeAngelis, one of the nation's leading authorities on school choice and homeschooling.** He has authored or co-authored 32 peer-reviewed studies and more than 100 op-eds in outlets like The Wall Street Journal and USA Today. He's done hundreds of speaking engagements and appears regularly on Fox News. A native of Sacramento, CA he grew up in San Antonio, TX, where he went to a magnet high school, which sparked his interest in school choice. **Gordon Chang, the author The Coming Collapse of China and Nuclear Showdown: North Korea Takes On the World.** Chang lived and worked in China and Hong Kong for almost two decades. He has given numerous briefings at the National Intelligence Council, the CIA, the State Department, U.S. Strategic Command, and the Pentagon. Chang frequently appears on several major news networks and is a regular co-host on The John Batchelor Show. And a few additional surprise guests you'll probably recognize! Make sure you [click here to catch the replay of Common Ground from A Seat at the Table now.](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/d0c4dd1ddb2032f96477e972c7757fe8/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTE9KbiIhoHqLOYTrU0rou6yiZ-N9bKzwVdJ353vd4IxCKQlBSgQ93eti2AwYoLJlkKChsBBXl62u7G8uxDOBM3GLVdBL88Wt4Aeaz57kG0CBRE4d9EKZJHp-yJE81KAulK_7SbNfeool2QZLBNP30Ys0o6rW6BZ9Uh_OeiulNdFRc81ci2fqmWTZ13YiL7hDVquTd2eSsRy0opERRfbanOLw10xOOdmKM) Bill **PS:** [**If you enjoyed the episode and would like to do your part in restoring common sense, click here to become a Common Sense Club Member today (if you haven't already).**](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/582e396d1f0b76baad477545200a37dd/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpa2FqQ3iQjROkSdY9Ept3Rd1ikz8d1bK-pS0PWfb77hnxYIJZcUpuDDlW6MuWCBxkQogZJmpSSePKZsMh65IwtyIU8LXZ4V-O3X5TfQx57nWUCNQkNs1sEsCleLXRyuIgMqrs2JvzRT56OZL4Mwhq776cVC0Pxi1BX4pM_Y90mF6URbnRs-I1KVb9t1XQ-PpZCU4V4cMmIOc4dJWdh9OMCCi9zYuFIo09cjImyezu4OlZZmow==)
