Friend,
I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform.
_**He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family.**_
I answered, _**" ABSOLUTELY."**_
Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight.
_**But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through.**_
Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry.
_**They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class.**_
But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about _our movement_ that's different...
...And that difference is **YOU.**
**The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support.**
_Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. _
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=247becdd57ce4e07ac5e3663ba818e16&_e=5Plot1eyAHJW8WGoEKu76Q599eBnyrvPRq5t-it9MhZ39ALw90mDwNJLwBEGykaSAx9Ywf_uw96ZhHkppBPDGOOlAlzOFVr0TvDP9Hyya0qwulyO_ssUta9-Oz12kULUtN4f-rCz1-kFodcK8vS06SjXEWMz9eGtSN46gItS_FeowK3kjBEMOHiKqwLLcNgHpfbBo2tC_NysxIUzacOqp3Bj0nd8Kf1XR6moezIW0v1ae8pg4WM1N7JJPvQ3kMUodG69d1h-9m3soLNtMmAx40_aG6DrvIvmv1EUJ8eay4zG44yzNXeHSZmel2_ljjkXuKpDQq5lKFikbZokVnOC6H5Kr4RPdA6mPGjyDGc2PuBjOEpSC9RPwsvxM_pEz8hh_qb8QVqrY1mHvpfwjykiwg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: In case you missed the interview. | | | Friend, I recently sat down with Steve Bannon to talk about our campaign's America First platform. He asked me if I still would 've run for president back in June 2015 if I had known what the Deep State would do to me and my family. I answered, " ABSOLUTELY." Even right now, I could close down my presidential campaign tomorrow and all of the many witch hunts and political persecutions would magically disappear overnight. But the battle to save America is worth the hell they 've put me through. Friend, I always knew the Deep State would put a bull's eye on my back for vowing to take on the Washington machine that has bled our country dry. They hate me because I 'm a political outsider who fights for the men and women of the country who've been ruthlessly abandoned by the Washington ruling class. But, there have been many other great patriots who've dutifully run for president before, so there's something about our movement that's different... ...And that difference is YOU. The Swamp knows I 've flat out REJECTED the TAINTED money that comes from special interest donors and instead turned to millions of patriots like YOU for support. Your $1, $5, $10, $15, $24, $47 terrify the powers that be, because it PROVES that the American people can stand united and take back the reins of our country. | | [Pictured: President Trump sitting down with Steve Bannon at Mar-a-Lago in a recent interview] Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. But Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and their special interest donors have named me as one of their top 2024 targets... ...and they’re already spending MILLIONS to try and defeat me. You’re my only hope of fighting back against their slanderous attacks, Peter. That’s why I’m formally inviting YOU to join my team as a 2023 Sustaining Member. Together, we can continue to defend the American dream from Joe Biden and far-Left D.C. Democrats who want to destroy the very foundation of our great nation. Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem Jeffries, and their special interest donors are on a mission to destroy Republicans' razor-thin 4-seat House majority next year. To make matters worse, they just shattered fundraising records with a $37.7 MILLION haul last quarter. I’ll never have that kind of support from wealthy liberal donors and special interest groups, Peter. But I know I’ve got something even better... ...an army of grassroots patriots who are ready to fight alongside me to defend our shared conservative values and stop the Left from flipping this all-important Congressional seat blue. When I check our list of 2023 Sustaining Members later this evening, I hope I’ll see your name. Thank you, Rep. I’ve seen how dedicated he is to protecting American values firsthand, and I’m so excited to be by his side again in 2024.
_But Josh’s race is going to be one of the closest in the country, and we need to make sure you’re still behind him._

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Derek, Republican Congressional representatives from Virginia voted to slash Pell Grants for up to 162,900 Virginia students. This decision could have a devastating impact on the lives of thousands of students and their families. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: About the debt ceiling
body:
Peter, we’ve got to talk about what’s going on in Congress.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
Peter, we’ve got to talk about what’s going on in Congress.
Mainstream media outlets have been buzzing with stories about the House GOP passing a major debt ceiling bill. For the most part, they’ve kept their coverage limited to sweeping statements about massive spending cuts — **with some even calling it a ‘win for McCarthy’... seriously.** 1****
What they fail to mention is exactly how this bill would impact millions of Americans — slashing spending on everything from food to healthcare for veterans. **Luckily, that’s where we come in.**
[**We’ll show you the compelling stories and infographics our reporters are publishing to ensure readers have all the facts they need as we head into the 2024 elections. But first, will you chip in $5 so they can keep up this important work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3681?refcode=em-20230504&t=2&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
Unlike the mainstream media, our reporters are getting right to the point with their coverage. They’re publishing articles like these that focused on the hard-hitting facts and figures of this bill — **specifically looking at how these proposed spending cuts would play out in their state.**
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3681?refcode=em-20230504&t=3&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
They’re also taking to social media to post eye-catching infographics that will reach readers (and voters) across their states. Actions like this are essential to holding the elected officials who voted to pass this outrageous bill accountable.
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3681?refcode=em-20230504&t=4&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
This is just a glimpse at some of the incredible work our dedicated local news reporters are doing everyday to fill in the gaps left by the mainstream media and restore Americans’ trust in the news. **But for them to keep going, we need your help.**
[**Your grassroots support will allow us to hire and retain talented journalists and open even more newsrooms across the country, which is why we’re asking: will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3681?refcode=em-20230504&t=5&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3681?refcode=em-20230504&t=6&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
1 - [CNN](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3682?t=7&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=938_120351_jIPjPK&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=938%2E120351%2EjIPjPK)

clean_body: Peter, we’ve got to talk about what’s going on in Congress. Peter, we’ve got to talk about what’s going on in Congress. Mainstream media outlets have been buzzing with stories about the House GOP passing a major debt ceiling bill. For the most part, they’ve kept their coverage limited to sweeping statements about massive spending cuts — with some even calling it a ‘win for McCarthy’... seriously. 1** What they fail to mention is exactly how this bill would impact millions of Americans — slashing spending on everything from food to healthcare for veterans. Luckily, that’s where we come in. Unlike the mainstream media, our reporters are getting right to the point with their coverage. They’re publishing articles like these that focused on the hard-hitting facts and figures of this bill — specifically looking at how these proposed spending cuts would play out in their state. They’re also taking to social media to post eye-catching infographics that will reach readers (and voters) across their states. Actions like this are essential to holding the elected officials who voted to pass this outrageous bill accountable. This is just a glimpse at some of the incredible work our dedicated local news reporters are doing everyday to fill in the gaps left by the mainstream media and restore Americans’ trust in the news. But for them to keep going, we need your help. Thanks for your support, The Courier Newsroom Team 1 - Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

| Friend I invite you to join me in commemorating the National Day of Prayer. This day is observed annually on the first Thursday in May, and it is a time when people of all faiths come together to pray for our nation and its leaders.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c19v6OZ89n1nhh5t50JH96ZsarBkXY-lEmw6mBmCa7uafa5RmoQvA4EBwJ6-_MT3XlMH5pl2VQdn-BllLteFGxPjHoYqTW54LJoG4eocogSqwMgjY_p23NgcXOsSC_u8p2ZPH4whYH4kYlTH_P3QQRMTlGHBk6mI&c=VQPNNSt_GZQXDfrfYH1hv8Cn1nCG4wTO_YLscyiH9hgudmmE8Al8hQ==&ch=YeA3fCP3ujLAnrrJHcS20JCrb7C0FEc2N2M7AdkpzxZK41D61xAvmQ==)
---
| Whether you are seeking solace, wisdom, or guidance, I urge you to take time out of your busy day for a moment of prayer, reflection, and meditation.
While it may seem that we have impossible obstacles ahead of us, it's important to remember that through the solidarity of prayer, we can find solutions that will build us a better future.
God Bless,
---

name: David Trone
subject: I'm in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,
I wanted you to hear this from me first. I'm running for the U.S. Senate. As I begin this campaign, here are a few things I’ll be thinking about:

The challenges our state and our nation face: Maryland has the 6th highest rate of opioid overdose deaths in the nation. We have a systemically racist justice system. And we have an ongoing mental health crisis. I have seen these struggles play out in my own family. I get it. And I know the fight for change will require innovative approaches led by a grassroots effort.

The influence of special interests: I have never taken a single penny from corporations, lobbyists, or PACs, and I never will. The reason is simple: I don't want to represent special interests. I want to represent you. I'll spend my time listening to you and not taking instructions from groups that lobby and finance campaigns.

The path to keeping the U.S. Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands runs through Maryland. But after eight years of Republican control in Annapolis, we can be certain this race will take resources, commitment, and grit to win. Democrats will need a candidate who does things differently, like I always have and always will.

This is going to be a grassroots conversation: I'm a native Marylander. I know that no one does it alone. As I make this run, I'll need folks like you involved every step of the way.
All of those things are important, but it's that last one, the grassroots team, that has always been at the heart of my work.

That's why I want to make sure you get to hear directly from me about the challenges that face our nation - and what I intend to do about them. Click here to watch a short video. >> https://youtu.be/pT5zAofQ6Ek

Thanks for hearing me out. I hope you'll take a moment to watch the video - and I can't wait to hear what you think! >> https://youtu.be/pT5zAofQ6Ek

More soon,

David Trone

WATCH THE VIDEO >> https://youtu.be/pT5zAofQ6Ek

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.

P.O. Box 83998

clean_body: Peter, I wanted you to hear this from me first. I'm running for the U.S. Senate. As I begin this campaign, here are a few things I’ll be thinking about: The challenges our state and our nation face: Maryland has the 6th highest rate of opioid overdose deaths in the nation. We have a systemically racist justice system. And we have an ongoing mental health crisis. I have seen these struggles play out in my own family. I get it. And I know the fight for change will require innovative approaches led by a grassroots effort. The influence of special interests: I have never taken a single penny from corporations, lobbyists, or PACs, and I never will. The reason is simple: I don't want to represent special interests. I want to represent you. I'll spend my time listening to you and not taking instructions from groups that lobby and finance campaigns. The path to keeping the U.S. Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands runs through Maryland. But after eight years of Republican control in Annapolis, we can be certain this race will take resources, commitment, and grit to win. Democrats will need a candidate who does things differently, like I always have and always will. This is going to be a grassroots conversation: I'm a native Marylander. I know that no one does it alone. As I make this run, I'll need folks like you involved every step of the way. All of those things are important, but it's that last one, the grassroots team, that has always been at the heart of my work. That's why I want to make sure you get to hear directly from me about the challenges that face our nation - and what I intend to do about them. Click here to watch a short video. >> Thanks for hearing me out. I hope you'll take a moment to watch the video - and I can't wait to hear what you think! >> More soon, David Trone WATCH THE VIDEO >> Paid for by David Trone for Maryland. David Trone for Maryland P.O. Box 83998 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.
| | |
---
I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks:
**I’m officially running for reelection to the U.S. Senate next year.**
We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.
**It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.**
**[I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support on Day One is a key part of it. Will you become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787006/404568380/-365680282?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2274-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTVmOTZiYi05NGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T12SFbifQOpefbu5tRoenBvkiX8E-331XoQRB-LkHp4=)**

Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**
Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill – the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.
I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win reelection in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House – because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond – I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House – from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.

name: Jacob Fette via ericforillinois.com
subject: Nice to meet you, Peter
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787179/404569157/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZmNjY3ZS05NWVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10whHxsKZ6lzia0GCJA2-EMD6e0C3NVk-XifD2o-2cY=)
Hi there, Peter! 👋

I’m Jacob Fette, the new finance director for Eric Sorensen’s 2024 re-election campaign.

I’m ready to help raise the money we’ll need to win this competitive district once again. But today, I wanted to share a story about how I got to know Eric and why I’m so thrilled to be on this team.

When I visited Eric in Illinois, we went out for a beer on the first night of my trip. I was expecting an interview. Instead, he mostly asked thoughtful questions about my life. It wasn’t only about my resume, he wanted to get to know me as a person.

What struck me most was hearing Eric talk about his experience as a meteorologist. Being on TV was a great way to give his audience helpful information, but it was a lot of “one-way” conversation. He rarely got to hear back from his viewers.

**That’s what Erics loves about serving in Congress -- the two-way communication.** He gets to interact daily with his constituents, and he’s bringing a level of empathy to Congress that I think we can use more of in today’s political arena.

**I’m proud to be on this team and hope to hit the ground running with a strong fundraising week. A new Republican opponent just announced a bid against Eric, and the race for IL-17 is sure to be as close (if not closer) than it was in 2022. In short, the stakes are high.**

[**Will you help me get off to a strong start in my new role by chipping in to Eric’s re-election campaign? Anything helps, but $3 from you will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787180/404569158/-665437442?refcode=em-5.4.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZmNjY3ZS05NWVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10whHxsKZ6lzia0GCJA2-EMD6e0C3NVk-XifD2o-2cY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787181/404569159/-665437442?refcode=em-5.4.23-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGZmNjY3ZS05NWVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10whHxsKZ6lzia0GCJA2-EMD6e0C3NVk-XifD2o-2cY=)

clean_body: | = Hi there, Peter! 👋 I’m Jacob Fette, the new finance director for Eric Sorensen’s 2024 re-election campaign. I’m ready to help raise the money we’ll need to win this competitive district once again. But today, I wanted to share a story about how I got to know Eric and why I’m so thrilled to be on this team. When I visited Eric in Illinois, we went out for a beer on the first night of my trip. I was expecting an interview. Instead, he mostly asked thoughtful questions about my life. It wasn’t only about my resume, he wanted to get to know me as a person. What struck me most was hearing Eric talk about his experience as a meteorologist. Being on TV was a great way to give his audience helpful information, but it was a lot of “one-way” conversation. He rarely got to hear back from his viewers. That’s what Erics loves about serving in Congress -- the two-way communication. He gets to interact daily with his constituents, and he’s bringing a level of empathy to Congress that I think we can use more of in today’s political arena. I’m proud to be on this team and hope to hit the ground running with a strong fundraising week. A new Republican opponent just announced a bid against Eric, and the race for IL-17 is sure to be as close (if not closer) than it was in 2022. In short, the stakes are high. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I look forward to keeping you in the loop on all things finance! name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders? I’ll tell you. **We’d live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with – all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney’s incompetency. We’re fighting back with a massive new lawsuit – but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I’m asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlvr05g2taq7kho8ihus45l2lck4af0gkr9l83v0_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9h61or2cdh2bs) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother’s murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao’s right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao’s motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion – she’s now a U.S. Attorney! **That’s why we’re stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao’s freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can’t win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zequf0fgplljesn06und22tdtlmkemv16prepgeo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9h61or2cdh2bs) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That’s the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we’re going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5h8hnsbtp0s2tn1hgvrddn6i9hgjph2hc7vusrg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9h61or2cdh2bs) Please don’t hesitate – the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2e2l5u0l9ggqq04cdur19m124p9l3i5jqdsfln8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9h61or2cdh2bs)

**Team, we’re only twelve days from Election Day, and the Mayor’s race is still a dead-heat.** We’re in position to pull ahead because we have the strongest grassroots team in the race, but it’s going to take an all-out effort from all of us to overcome dirty attacks coming our way.
_Here’s what you missed if you've blinked in the past week:_
**POLLS SHOW A FIVE-WAY TIE.** The first public poll in our race shows Helen in a statistical logjam at the top, but it also shows her _leading among early voters._ We have an incredibly organized and motivated coalition, and that puts us in position to pull ahead.
**LEADING PROGRESSIVES ENDORSE HELEN.** Congressmembers including Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, and Jamaal Bowman just endorsed Helen, joining state and local lawmakers like Nikil Saval, Elizabeth Fiedler, Jamie Gauthier, Kendra Brooks, Rick Krajewski, and Tarik Khan.
**AND WE’RE OUTWORKING EVERYONE IN THE FIELD.** We’re the only campaign in this race with a citywide organizing program — meaning we’re reaching the most voters face-to-face via door knocking, rallies, and events across Philly. Our volunteers are reaching tens of thousands of voters every single week.
**BUT WE’RE FACING BILLIONAIRE-TIED ATTACKS.** A shady org linked to far-right billionaire Jeffrey Yass (the richest man in PA) is attacking Helen on TV. The GOP and the wealthy elite want “anyone but Helen” as Philly’s next mayor because they know she’s the only candidate with a vision bold enough to change our broken status quo.
**We have a clear path to victory in this historically close election, but we can’t allow the self-funding millionaires and shady billionaires to have the last word.** That’s why we’re working nonstop to raise enough funds to increase our ad budget and expand our on-the-ground outreach.
**Can you chip in right now to ensure Helen has everything she needs to win? We need to expand our ads program, fund voter outreach, and respond to dirty attacks, and we only have 12 days left.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Campaign Manager
Helen Gym for Mayor

Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. name: Jeff Harris
subject: It’s that time of year again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, It’s that time of year again! We are excited to announce that the Emerging Leaders Project is now taking applications for our 2023-24 class! [**Click here to apply before the July 15th deadline!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787738/404571443/-1272868886?refcode=230501-Leaders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzhjZTE0My05NmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDYPsLeOQCMurbJSrpLqRhF2KKkZsIu9YCI-NTF-56o=&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=378ce143-96ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) As an independent nonprofit organization, the Emerging Leaders Project partners with the Indiana Democratic Party to help build our party's bench of future candidates, leaders, campaign staffers, and activists. Each year up to 40 Hoosiers, between 21 and 40 years old, are selected from around the state to participate in this free year-long program. Those selected attend a series of training conferences in Indianapolis that cover all aspects of campaigning for office, public policy, and party building. [**Learn more about the Emerging Leaders Project and apply to join the 2023-24 class here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787741/404571444/-1934519303?refcode=230501-Leaders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzhjZTE0My05NmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDYPsLeOQCMurbJSrpLqRhF2KKkZsIu9YCI-NTF-56o=&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=378ce143-96ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Founded in 2011, the Emerging Leaders Project has helped hundreds of young Democrats become more active in the party and run for office. From Congressional candidates to state legislators, to countywide elected officials and municipal office holders to Democratic Party leaders at the local and district levels, the Emerging Leaders Project has a long track record of success. [**See our list of Alumni here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787747/404571449/2141189211?refcode=230501-Leaders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzhjZTE0My05NmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDYPsLeOQCMurbJSrpLqRhF2KKkZsIu9YCI-NTF-56o=&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=378ce143-96ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) If you are an Indiana resident between the ages of 21 and 40 and have an interest in running for office in the near future, working on a campaign, or helping to strengthen your local Democratic Party, this program is for you! And if you are a loyal Democrat who knows of an up-and-coming young leader who could help make our party and state stronger, please share this email with them. [**Apply before the July 15th deadline here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62787749/404571482/-1272868886?refcode=230501-Leaders&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzhjZTE0My05NmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDYPsLeOQCMurbJSrpLqRhF2KKkZsIu9YCI-NTF-56o=&emci=ae539dc0-4ce8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=378ce143-96ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Democratically yours,
Jeff Harris

clean_body: | Peter, It’s that time of year again! We are excited to announce that the Emerging Leaders Project is now taking applications for our 2023-24 class! As an independent nonprofit organization, the Emerging Leaders Project partners with the Indiana Democratic Party to help build our party's bench of future candidates, leaders, campaign staffers, and activists. Each year up to 40 Hoosiers, between 21 and 40 years old, are selected from around the state to participate in this free year-long program. Those selected attend a series of training conferences in Indianapolis that cover all aspects of campaigning for office, public policy, and party building. Founded in 2011, the Emerging Leaders Project has helped hundreds of young Democrats become more active in the party and run for office. From Congressional candidates to state legislators, to countywide elected officials and municipal office holders to Democratic Party leaders at the local and district levels, the Emerging Leaders Project has a long track record of success. If you are an Indiana resident between the ages of 21 and 40 and have an interest in running for office in the near future, working on a campaign, or helping to strengthen your local Democratic Party, this program is for you! And if you are a loyal Democrat who knows of an up-and-coming young leader who could help make our party and state stronger, please share this email with them. Democratically yours, Jeff Harris Chair, Emerging Leaders Project [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Here’s my life story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE
body:
I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story

| |
---
| | | I recently launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee and I want to tell you a quick story...

I was just going through some old photos before this massive decision, and it made me realize how fortunate I am to be where I am today.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM0008JTrjWOwVhdwiuvb7oj0hwegPDbO_GKfmCrT-qLxcaxvAds_096xo5LIhnz2aGFa5v3NsRILOKXu8zwy27y8ZTwRxef1FK6jTfrq9XI1m4N5pnNvgZAbw5tm6GdTSPi_vpfJcjtkViERBeCys-y)
---

That photo was taken when I was a young boy, growing up in North Charleston, South Carolina. Back then, I had no idea I would one day consider running for President of the United States.

When I was young, my grandparents took my mother, brother, and me into their home shortly after my parents split. After that, my mother had to work long and hard hours just to put food on the table and a roof over our heads.

With the guidance that came from my mother and both of my grandparents, I was taught the importance of a good education - despite the fact that my grandfather never even knew how to read. Yet, they knew that education was the closest thing to magic in America and the ticket to fulfilling the American Dream.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM20H_zPOZS42ZOa6ThQd9XkveR63yyCoVKZ4AFpRlGKI4Ii4rrL_r_LsLoRJ1rC3m9Mq3jlHenwtYBASaFv2zBk4R-vg53gfqdr5tby1oJc0n07Coqu7CKkergDLb_G9n8lNdVwOoA-ExarcXVc_AXs)
---

Here's a photo of me in high school when I was on the football team. Back then, it was my dream to play for the Dallas Cowboys when I was old enough. With a job like that, I would be able to repay my mom for all of the sacrifices she made for my brother and me - and not have to worry about keeping a roof over her head.

**Simply put: football was an escape. It was my ticket out of poverty, and to give back. **

But as life often does, it took an unexpected turn - one day I fell asleep behind the wheel of my mom's car, flipping it and almost dying in the process. I thank my lucky stars that God had more of a plan in store for me, because the story didn't end there.

During college, I dedicated my life to Christ and meaningful service, and long story short, I was able to live out my mother's American Dream!

With the help of some key mentors along the way, I was able to find success in business - and used it to improve the lives of others.

After my time in business, I decided that I wanted to run for public office and work to better the lives of people in my community. So, I chose to run in the Charleston area **_- as a Republican. _**

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. **You really could only do this in America.**

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM1ka6sKnyuMpkkIofkC3GbJAwraadSxdbEUIonnrMlhbFcxCOGxzf9W4JG06GS7Fu98BmPNudD3OIfzQD7DU8uPxzZwM2LEm241RXQbU7KtX-LQGEydZ1xdi9a6PxtUKwsYDs41AmMR7uPfRingt-e1)
---

What I have learned along the way is this: **Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it.**

That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters.

Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: **_[will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM3VDMM2wdg4bq_9cQ84BDsmRxGLotiTtqlZM_lA_aIp4ul8_jvmVbeG9ImZaFfPBPcxAbxzYpzqyhOofW5tawXM4qqDUNqXQpOCIx2l6-UHjEbKYojOKD1kz1t-kN12MB4KNFHLO0cK1SV3BNlmb9oq "will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?")_**

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM1T1A30Bdc4jswOPPj50KUEOG4LYSd_tSP9qGl6OYgW2oS-UNRL8R0XHyxZ3_Yq1iVHdQWuRX9JuH7ywC3G38SzpKmweHKEPtZgyZJlSNI6UJqHjBnuXxN0qKEmOBGoz9_7lM6itUrZjYvD-_LViw78 "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

Thank you, and God bless you,

---
| | | [HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-pSAf8eyPZcj7m8Nd1_-46MiQ7me09wjVTmaHzeDX_PMGJzW0-LkbnliHjoyMQMKqNFK9L9Ejm3TOqGnHdPSV13tuhSSzYl47bvs-dWfTEhoVnyMbciDTPi4ou73-jsNkm6glWcYVLIuayEeyvauMhAjqwEdXvvony-oGUK0nGPtCCwiiQiS46rR_OP-z619LBAdnz3lUMLg2YJVDyZApZNl6NppKYiAzidjd_Y-1kqM3OlO_pozqy1sLzA4HKYkYlqz4VrKIA8WDy_Offmg5MkUuqGmv5kUpaEyr8KusJW7aZxQC_lHA2aqW6cBMb7b1FaHHmbnHQFjvSdCfGLgxwr6ZBRbQQN4pO0F5nmz40bcD1uhQBLtqqmMPHQefRAOwZ "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-p8-yUhJ1CBIlXiM1O_SlssiGhYde7MMhxMim9Hl_YvE8OwZ86Vt97fL-guc-G3-B_6y0tw3nRpxhHibPW_qb-TSpjLz9RmsvGXC7BGqQhwwBHwYRTUJQgp_Tmev16ttIujedkiHGL447n0jGT-kWQoGxf8HpmFdrLcDAgcCdFMDAizeHo0CFpzjGOLjHXUJL9Abn0E_qUts_1W8i7fX0a3EmPMGcZ-UVrO5nnHLQ1pHmP49UEt-jSsE9sUxJDrsnOfjRCg9O3SHiuuOc1HSDJVn4-L1-3v5a6Tfw7-6vJhIst_IOxAk4SPXcT_UeDKf_8zmB60xoEiXHFTTiWb7EwlB8dntIsCFgbjVZlVO4pauyv2HFQAilL2yWGS_hx6nRI)
---

I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities.

But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. _**[So today, I'm humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-p8-yUhJ1CBIlXiM1O_SlssiGhYde7MMhxMim9Hl_YvE8OwZ86Vt97fL-guc-G3-B_6y0tw3nRpxhHibPW_qb-TSpjLz9RmsvGXC7BGqQhwwBHwYRTUJQgp_Tmev16ttIujedkiHGL447n0jGT-kWQoGxf8HpmFdrLcDAgcCdFMDAizeHo0CFpzjGOLjHXUJL9Abn0E_qUts_1W8i7fX0a3EmPMGcZ-UVrO5nnHLQ1pHnqQB3KubnxK_sqCwZIbI7HswuTKNrnHSXnn70gIgAqZtycPgN9zIQfLqVmlSnw1fx13JuOlBu3YrxUNj8lpyDwrl2PPQvpCWytQkPxXx7ufObE0FdzA-bp1_7PBBG6fs_zjlYbPxbDh2l0Un3t4dhE "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America.")**_ I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me?
---
| | [I'M WITH TIM SCOTT](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-p8-yUhJ1CBIlXiM1O_SlssiGhYde7MMhxMim9Hl_YvE8OwZ86Vt97fL-guc-G3-B_6y0tw3nRpxhHibPW_qb-TSpjLz9RmsvGXC7BGqQhwwBHwYRTUJQgp_Tmev16ttIujedkiHGL447n0jGT-kWQoGxf8HpmFdrLcDAgcCdFMDAizeHo0CFpzjGOLjHXUJL9Abn0E_qUts_1W8i7fX0a3EmPMGcZ-UVrO5nnHLQ1pHmUSDtSN54ykf6rfe1uxAogB3pFObeeHyGb8XALViUZzvumn3B62KKt_yLaYtVZHda4BCcgAMxRL9vfUwBZZFQBvzF9BaJBTETIk_6RFhNBzyUPOEPJGh9aa2kCBNW-6R_g4qDPjCeR4dNDh8nBSBGn "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. **I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

_**[I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37e7665f16bd488eb0c3001620a9ed58&_e=LYX_l98ZRM-Ji-JrxYQyhQ_Rh8zuu1f_XOOL3Z4Qqw3nuWMvj2xChJyIU2iLeD-p8-yUhJ1CBIlXiM1O_SlssiGhYde7MMhxMim9Hl_YvE8OwZ86Vt97fL-guc-G3-B_6y0tw3nRpxhHibPW_qb-TSpjLz9RmsvGXC7BGqQhwwBHwYRTUJQgp_Tmev16ttIujedkiHGL447n0jGT-kWQoGxf8HpmFdrLcDAgcCdFMDAizeHo0CFpzjGOLjHXUJL9Abn0E_qUts_1W8i7fX0a3EmPMGcZ-UVrO5nnHLQ1pHlghVeBdJF4hEo5v43YvKFhlrx4LB13wgflDOPYR1FasyOxTxHjI-OjChaCShTZzblU8D3lAbRnJvj_RyMFyUmOXGlIhrG5Gj5iv8pE-OMHsHTQaaak0Wx3qRrXa3wFX-p6S2cjhN5J50pJME6xWPTG "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America.")**_

Since then, I have become the first black man elected to the U.S. Senate from a Southern State since Reconstruction. And now, I'm exploring a run for President of the United States. You really could only do this in America. | What I have learned along the way is this: Every American is capable of achieving their own American Dream when given an equal playing field, especially if the government gets out of their way when doing it. That's why I'm exploring a run for President. We need to restore faith in America and protect the American Dream for all. It's a lot of hard work, but I have only been able to make it this far with the help of my supporters. Just like others on my team, I know you're reading this email to do the same thing - to join me in standing up for all Americans. So now, I have a short and humble request for you: "will you chip in $20, $35 or even more now to help me save the American Dream?" | | | "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM" Thank you, and God bless you, | | | "HELP ME SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM" | | | I just launched my Presidential Exploratory Committee, and I couldn't be more excited to hit the ground and listen to more Americans about their concerns, worries, fears, and priorities. But the truth is, accomplishing our goal isn't cheap. "So today, I’m humbly asking if you could please chip in $5, $10, $25, or anything you can afford to help my team and I keep trying to restore FAITH in America." I believe our best days are ahead of us, but I can't do this alone. Are you with me? | | "JOIN MY TEAM" I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice, and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. "I know we have been asking a lot lately, but it would mean so much if you could give $5 to help us restore faith in America."** | | "JOIN MY TEAM" | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT PRESIDENTIAL EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: From abortion rights to gun control: Whatwe’ve accomplished in Michigan, thanks to you
body:
Last election, RIC PAC donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. | | |
---
Friend, Last year, our campaign overcame more than $1 million in outside money to win our re-election and continue speaking truth to power. But most progressive campaigns don’t have the resources to take on the Big Money interests and win. That’s why we founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC―to support and train candidates up and down the ballot who aren’t afraid to take on the status quo, whether it’s in Congress, state legislatures, or in our communities. **In fact, last election, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations.** And, in Michigan, we helped win back the state house and the state Supreme Court, giving Democrats a trifecta of the legislative, executive, and legislative branches. Michigan Democrats haven’t squandered that opportunity either. They’ve protected abortion rights and passed common-sense gun reforms to protect our communities. [**Help build a future that includes all of us by pitching in $5 to our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, May 3, 2023
Subject: From abortion rights to gun control: What we’ve accomplished in Michigan, thanks to you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Together, we’re building power in the halls of Congress and in state legislatures across the country.
Last year, in Michigan, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC supported dozens of candidates and grassroots organizations on the state and local level. And now, for the first time in 40 years, we control the Michigan State House and the Governor’s office―and we took back the State Supreme Court.
But controlling the legislative, executive, and judicial branches aren’t just symbolic victories. **Progressives in Michigan are doing exactly what we elected them to do.**
**One of the first orders of business in Michigan was repealing Michigan’s extreme 1931 abortion ban.** And last month, Michigan Governor Whitmer signed common-sense gun reforms into law, including universal background checks and gun safety storage legislation.
**I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to build progressive power in Congress and across the country. And last election we donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations.**
[**We’re building the future of the Democratic Party and the progressive movement. And none of this would be possible without you. clean_body: Last election, RIC PAC donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. | | | Friend, Last year, our campaign overcame more than $1 million in outside money to win our re-election and continue speaking truth to power. But most progressive campaigns don’t have the resources to take on the Big Money interests and win. That’s why we founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC―to support and train candidates up and down the ballot who aren’t afraid to take on the status quo, whether it’s in Congress, state legislatures, or in our communities. In fact, last election, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. And, in Michigan, we helped win back the state house and the state Supreme Court, giving Democrats a trifecta of the legislative, executive, and legislative branches. Michigan Democrats haven’t squandered that opportunity either. They’ve protected abortion rights and passed common-sense gun reforms to protect our communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for having my back and for your dedication to our movement for change. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Wed, May 3, 2023 Subject: From abortion rights to gun control: What we’ve accomplished in Michigan, thanks to you To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Together, we’re building power in the halls of Congress and in state legislatures across the country. Last year, in Michigan, our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC supported dozens of candidates and grassroots organizations on the state and local level. And now, for the first time in 40 years, we control the Michigan State House and the Governor’s office―and we took back the State Supreme Court. But controlling the legislative, executive, and judicial branches aren’t just symbolic victories. Progressives in Michigan are doing exactly what we elected them to do. One of the first orders of business in Michigan was repealing Michigan’s extreme 1931 abortion ban. And last month, Michigan Governor Whitmer signed common-sense gun reforms into law, including universal background checks and gun safety storage legislation. I founded the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to build progressive power in Congress and across the country. And last election we donated more than $128,000 to progressive candidates and organizations. As we elect more candidates who are rooted in their communities, we’re seeing massive opposition from corporate and right-wing interests that are invested in maintaining the unjust status quo. In my re-election campaign, we were met with over $1 million of opposition from wealthy out-of-state donors who are threatened by our power and our movement for change. And we weren’t alone. In Pennsylvania, Summer Lee overcame at least $2.5 million of outside spending to win her Democratic primary and eventually her general election to become the state’s first Black Congresswoman. We were proud to support Summer and progressives up and down the ballot. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn’t criticize politicians and elected leaders? I’ll tell you. **We’d live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with – all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney’s incompetency. We’re fighting back with a massive new lawsuit – but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I’m asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zff9gg2be2ln24kq0decgufgfumd8prgk8agncng_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9j64oj1cth2bs) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother’s murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao’s right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao’s motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion – she’s now a U.S. Attorney! **That’s why we’re stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao’s freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can’t win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhfiimp1onrmathopubk71bhmngi8qfer3g8hl28_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9j64oj1cth2bs) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That’s the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we’re going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm5nj2em5810andf6vpphup29mnnb6i1ot0k7keg_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9j64oj1cth2bs) Please don’t hesitate – the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. [**Help us win our lawsuit with a donation of $35 or more right now.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7rtvb5ab1q5l605r94lfodgs9kobcvsujnflmr8_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9j64oj1cth2bs)
---

**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0mpuvicjhqp00ct1t8t8f0rk6kkb9v6dqgms8eo_rp22sh2s8i66o76c9j64oj1cth2bs)

name: Team Cori
subject: Solidarity with workers everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We will always unequivocally support workers fighting for a better future.
#
Peter,
**ICYMI:** This week, pilots with American Airlines **_overwhelmingly**_ voted to go on strike after failing to reach an agreement on a new contract. In Hollywood, members of the Writers Guild for America voted **_unanimously**_ for the first walkout in 15 years due to a failed negotiation and unfair pay.
We've said it before and we'll say it again: **Our movement will always unequivocally support workers fighting for a better future. Period.**
Cori has proudly been on the front lines of the labor movement and knows that our fight for equity and justice in the workplace has to be far-reaching to see the bold, transformative change we deserve.
From standing alongside Amazon workers in Bessemer, Alabama fighting for their right to unionize, to supporting St. Louis Starbucks workers to unionize and secure good benefits, Cori won't ever stop advocating for workers' everywhere or fighting to pass the PRO Act.
**[If you agree with us, will you make a contribution today to help Cori continue her pro-labor work and organizing efforts in Congress?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230504.EOyYFi&refcode=em20230504-2627&t=1&akid=2627%2E1082990%2EMsWaa-)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230504.HYpW42&refcode=em20230504-2627&t=2&akid=2627%2E1082990%2EMsWaa-)**
Every worker deserves a union. Every worker deserves to be treated with dignity, respect, and humility. That's not asking for much.
Regular, everyday people are being left behind by an exploitative system that prioritizes the wants of the rich and powerful over the basic needs of our communities. We're not going to wait on the sidelines.
From fighting for a $15 minimum wage since well before she stepped foot in the People's House to pushing to pass the PRO Act, Cori's laser-focused on taking action.
**[If you're ready for better working conditions, fair contracts and good-paying jobs, will you chip in $5 today and amplify our collective voice in Congress?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230504.EOyYFi&refcode=em20230504-2627&t=3&akid=2627%2E1082990%2EMsWaa-)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230504.HYpW42&refcode=em20230504-2627&t=22&akid=2627%2E1082990%2EMsWaa-)**
In solidarity,
— Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230504?refcode=em20230504-2627-footer&t=23&refcode2=2627_1082990_MsWaa-&akid=2627%2E1082990%2EMsWaa-) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

subject: Help VoteVets go after Republicans who voted to gut the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We have 18 swing districts targeted
#
Derek —
Here are the facts:
McCarthy, his flag waving caucus, and all those MAGA and America-first extremists could have specifically protected Veterans benefits in the budget they voted for last week.
**They. Did. Not.**
Now, there are 18 Republicans in the House today who voted for that budget and represent districts that voted for Biden in 2020. These are the swingiest of swing districts, and they’re critical to control in Congress.
We want to go after each one of these Republicans — make sure every person in their district knows they voted to gut funding for Veterans.
Will you help us?

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

I wanted you to hear it from me personally, Peter:

I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.

We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our
work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as
boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our
communities.

It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my
seat in New Mexico blue.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.0P_5vQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support on Day
One is a key part of it. Will you become a Founding Donor to my
re-election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Tammy
Baldwin today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Martin Heinrich and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.G6Vt0s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.FJeDjZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.rBnrcV&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.1P08R7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.cgula2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.0P_5vQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and
my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents
taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going all in for
the fights that matter most.

That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical
engineer, and my time in public office.

Last year, against the odds, I went all in to broker a historic gun safety
bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of
the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading
cause of death for children under 18.

I went all in to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare
benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their
service.

After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went all in to secure $4
billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against
future fires.

I went all in to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our
households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes
with clean drinking water.

And now I’m all in to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic
Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because it’s time to take on
the challenges that have been written off for too long.

From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public
lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early
childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this
fight.

But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year,
including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet
that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House
— from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like
Medicare and Social Security.

You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared
values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my
re-election campaign. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.0P_5vQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]If you’re all in on this fight, split a
grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Tammy’s today >>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Martin Heinrich and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.G6Vt0s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.FJeDjZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.rBnrcV&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.1P08R7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1015&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.cgula2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1016&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.0P_5vQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1017&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico
and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.

— Martin

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-heinrich.0P_5vQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230504_AM1_V1_S1&t=1018&akid=250%2E35263%2EmPMdoW ]Headshot of Martin Heinrich

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: from Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Freedom Isn't Free
body:
Mississippi has a lot of important decisions to make this election year. The decisions we make are crucial to our survival as a nation of free people. Often we focus on the big races like president or even governor but local elections are just as important if not more important. I have talked with Matthew on several occasions and believe he is the best choice for District Attorney in Desoto County. I am sending you his article he wrote so you can make an informed decision about who to support.

**By Matthew Barton - District Attorney Candidate for Desoto County, MS**
It's an adage every American grows up hearing, and one we learn the weight of as we get older. When we think about those who defend our freedoms, typically, we think of our nation's brave servicemen and servicewomen fighting overseas to protect the American way of life. These heroes are fighting against oppressive regimes and bad foreign actors who threaten the democracy our Founding Fathers fought so hard to establish.

But recently, we've seen an uprising of threats to American freedoms and liberties right here at home.

Freedom of Speech, Freedom of the Press, Freedom of Religion, Freedom of Assembly, the Right to Bear Arms, the Right to Life, and the Right to Privacy have all been attacked by radical liberal activists, leaders, and attorneys over the last few years. Across all levels and branches of government, public officials are taking steps to restrict Constitutional protections. Even on a micro level, in our schools and in our communities, we're seeing personal liberties threatened.

A few recent examples of such actions come to mind:
* In February, President Biden proposed ending a policy that provides extra protections for the rights of religious student groups.
* Extreme anti-gun laws are making their way through progressive state governments such as Vermont, Oregon, and Michigan.
* Facebook continues to suppress and censor conservative content and users.
* Progressive states such as New Jersey, Oregon, Colorado, New Mexico, and Vermont have no restrictions on abortion access.

The list goes on and on. And just as our nation's service members fight to protect our freedoms abroad, I'm committed to protecting our freedoms and liberties here in Mississippi. As Desoto County District Attorney, I will fight day in and day out to ensure our Constitutional rights were upheld and fortified. While liberal, radical attorneys and officials across the country may be working to strip Americans of their personal liberties, I will always work against their intentions and defend the freedoms granted to us from God.

Freedom isn't free and it must be protected.

As district attorney, I cannot solve all these problems alone. It falls on conservative leaders at EVERY level of local government to collectively band together to combat the onslaught of radical left policies and practices that threaten our way of life. But I promise to do my part by using every tool at my disposal to protect, fight, and defend our collective liberties.
**[HELP MATTHEW DEFEND FREEDOM](https://substack.com/redirect/fb20590d-a337-44ff-a9b6-d349f30c9620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**[DONATE $50 NOW](https://substack.com/redirect/fb20590d-a337-44ff-a9b6-d349f30c9620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Matthew Barton

clean_body: Mississippi has a lot of important decisions to make this election year. The decisions we make are crucial to our survival as a nation of free people. Often we focus on the big races like president or even governor but local elections are just as important if not more important. I have talked with Matthew on several occasions and believe he is the best choice for District Attorney in Desoto County. I am sending you his article he wrote so you can make an informed decision about who to support. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | May 4 | | | | | | | | | | Mississippi has a lot of important decisions to make this election year. The decisions we make are crucial to our survival as a nation of free people. Often we focus on the big races like president or even governor but local elections are just as important if not more important. I have talked with Matthew on several occasions and believe he is the best choice for District Attorney in Desoto County. I am sending you his article he wrote so you can make an informed decision about who to support. Dana Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? | | ---|---|--- By Matthew Barton - District Attorney Candidate for Desoto County, MS It's an adage every American grows up hearing, and one we learn the weight of as we get older. When we think about those who defend our freedoms, typically, we think of our nation's brave servicemen and servicewomen fighting overseas to protect the American way of life. These heroes are fighting against oppressive regimes and bad foreign actors who threaten the democracy our Founding Fathers fought so hard to establish. But recently, we've seen an uprising of threats to American freedoms and liberties right here at home. Freedom of Speech, Freedom of the Press, Freedom of Religion, Freedom of Assembly, the Right to Bear Arms, the Right to Life, and the Right to Privacy have all been attacked by radical liberal activists, leaders, and attorneys over the last few years. Across all levels and branches of government, public officials are taking steps to restrict Constitutional protections. Even on a micro level, in our schools and in our communities, we're seeing personal liberties threatened. A few recent examples of such actions come to mind: In February, President Biden proposed ending a policy that provides extra protections for the rights of religious student groups. Extreme anti-gun laws are making their way through progressive state governments such as Vermont, Oregon, and Michigan. Facebook continues to suppress and censor conservative content and users. Progressive states such as New Jersey, Oregon, Colorado, New Mexico, and Vermont have no restrictions on abortion access. The list goes on and on. And just as our nation's service members fight to protect our freedoms abroad, I'm committed to protecting our freedoms and liberties here in Mississippi. As Desoto County District Attorney, I will fight day in and day out to ensure our Constitutional rights were upheld and fortified. While liberal, radical attorneys and officials across the country may be working to strip Americans of their personal liberties, I will always work against their intentions and defend the freedoms granted to us from God. Freedom isn't free and it must be protected. As district attorney, I cannot solve all these problems alone. It falls on conservative leaders at EVERY level of local government to collectively band together to combat the onslaught of radical left policies and practices that threaten our way of life. But I promise to do my part by using every tool at my disposal to protect, fight, and defend our collective liberties. Matthew Barton Thanks for reading Dana Criswell! subject: Join me in celebrating Rhode Island!

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=P8mYddfH4zmS8gzssG6t2qS%2FLpFnzgzrGvbZz8nN8OG8d%2BFwFMQboGoABNc0dS%2B%2FrqsPB3nGJZSu2DUXjIi3Y670o8Cxx4eZAhfgeDzrOrpxfdBbmyHS%2FXK7F9B%2BEIPI%2Fg%2BJ8ht3FBJPhHs%2B6VkvwH5agGXhYcLsX5IFRmQdc%2BvAgRuScZgfUsx9V%2FiJNyQVpCDyPdfZUq5O1z45Pp5qaxLdyVCNy0MPgPM292YWyfHOMdbGgDLM1CqS%2B1DZzLT7NHDxqGK9QgJ5a7SffxhU7f1%2Fdts4nCJkA1BKNLZXBmpzd%2B42576zwd4ivm89dvVUyuqeb%2F8gVnzWMv46i%2FgR4pZXvoFpRUls1SqRRvKXY0LnMQDQdGAQeABTxoOyYszTIIfHtTgnVN698Rn54M4IdkkyENeMenuoJC1U%2BI6AIQJ8JIMz9HXLVLPioUpyzDhk)

Peter,

Happy Rhode Island Independence Day!

On this day in 1776, two months before the signing of the Declaration of Independence, Rhode Island declared itself independent of Britain — the first of the original 13 colonies to formally cut ties.

I’m honored to represent Rhode Islanders in Congress. Together, we’re building a stronger Rhode Island for future generations, so every person in our state has access to a middle-class life, the security of a dignified retirement plan, and a safe and healthy planet.

I hope you find time today to celebrate our wonderful state, and if you’re free tonight, we’d love to see you at our Independence Day Celebration in Providence! [Click here to RSVP if you’d like to join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62789505/404578244/968675079?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230504_AW_IndepDay.1.1_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_IndepDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZmYjYwNy05YmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xT5wzIncThQVZwpBENT6QDq7ZOcmHcV5h1Goij4GjrM=&emci=9e4c1898-97ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7bffb607-9bea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Seth
