| | Derek, Democrats across the Commonwealth are running for state legislature in November. We will have the opportunity to expand our majority in the Virginia Senate and take back the House of Delegates. Democrats are fighting for equal access to healthcare, gun safety legislation, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and voting rights – all of which will be on the line this fall. This is a critical election, so we wanted to reach out to you directly on the issues that matter most to you. **[_So please, can you take just two minutes to answer our quick Virginia campaign survey?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62789536/404578281/1392668253?refcode=mw_em_230504_1&ms=mw_em_230504_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZmYjYwNy05YmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpFyGTZ92F7lyn9RuIKtoOdcGHJW-JHPA9zkdTZBx-o=&emci=0a2be025-8eea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=76ffb607-9bea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)** This survey provides us an opportunity to hear directly from you on what issues matter most. As we prepare for the fight to win these critical state legislative races, your opinion will go a long way in helping us talk to voters about what matters most to them. Mark will be reading the results next week. **[_Can you take a minute to answer a few questions in our survey right now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62789537/404578282/1392668253?refcode=mw_em_230504_1&ms=mw_em_230504_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZmYjYwNy05YmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpFyGTZ92F7lyn9RuIKtoOdcGHJW-JHPA9zkdTZBx-o=&emci=0a2be025-8eea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=76ffb607-9bea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)** This election will have a profound impact on the future of the Commonwealth. name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18945?t=1001&akid=3206%2E346206%2EmX3mND ]That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $25
or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help
reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $2,000,000? Every dollar you can
spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz,
flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →

CHIP IN →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18945?t=1002&akid=3206%2E346206%2EmX3mND ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented
grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a
part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my
campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and
defend our Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230504-3206-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3206_346206_mX3mND&akid=3206%2E346206%2EmX3mND

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3206%2E346206%2EmX3mND

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: [ ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred Contribute to Charles Booker:

subject: Meet Chairwoman Amy Carnevale
body:

### Meet MA Republican Party Chairwoman
AMY CARNEVALE in Malden
---
|
---
| | This coming Monday, May 8th the Malden Republican CIty Committee and Chairman Jerry Leone will host a Spring Social at the Pearl Street Restaurant, 53 Summer St. in Malden from 6-8:30pm.
All are invited to attend as our special guest will be MASSACHUSETTS GOP Chair, Amy Carnevale.
Tickets are $10, you can pay at the door, pizza and soda will be served. Kindly respond by this Saturday at noon, if you will be attending. Please contact Jerry Leone Chairman of the Malden Republican City Committee at (781)635-7070
It is going to be a fun evening.
Caroline Colarusso

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: $6,000 a month private school tuition … but it’s not a bribe?
body:
What do you think?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc479819-e5c8-4cde-a775-6de618edcb0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, BREAKING: My God, they've done it again! Remember Harlan Crow? The billionaire who collects Hitler paintings, took Clarence Thomas on a $500,000 vacation to Asia, luxurious trips on his super-yacht and bought Thomas' mother's house for her to live mortgage-free--all while having business before The Court?? **[Well, it gets worse. Thomas has a grand-nephew he raised as his son, and guess who ProPublica discovered paid the boy's private school tuition?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2431186-7938-4650-ac81-749c57edb156/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted2205a7-0091-452e-94f4-406434721aec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let's take a tour of the last week, shall we? News broke a $1.6 Billion "gift" (see "slush fund") was used to install/corrupt right-wing Supreme Court Justices by a cabal known as The Federalist Society. We learned Justice Gorsuch sold land to a partner at a corporate firm with cases before him and didn't report the buyer's name. We found out Brett Kavanaugh skated on scores of sexual harassment and assault tips--there was no Senate or FBI investigation to speak of. [**These greed-infested zealots can't continue to wield the power to control women's bodies or give 25-yr olds assault rifles. The ONLY recourse is to expand The Court. Will you join the fight to retake The Court by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24b272b0-dd79-4941-a8ef-c3847abe1bca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Future generations will thank us for still living in a democracy because of what we do right now. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e8dc79c-6d0b-471f-a29d-0a79623f6783/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Emily Busch
subject: Teacher appreciation means keeping our schools safe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=2702ed28e4e14a9a9be407f7772de741&_e=la3C7aBsOOzKazpvWzXOtrRn-rS2-ele4E9mnxPikUAUC5zzpBjxC_nDnZebxie3z4ogzIideVR73SmKo_qZ95gDEkSnfSXFNub3TsQKzx-cafvVGxVnxB7Y1twbNGE8Yy8ymOQwRnjqa0Za7pZ0la0NTbsjs3lyCiV_Adkk63kTXm_OKFBUY3JokpIJwURe0Kpf02hkZspVtKSNlC88QQ%3D%3D) Peter –In honor of Teacher Appreciation Month, I want to take a moment to recognize the incredible contributions of our teachers here in the Mitten State and talk about the steps I would take in Congress to ensure our teachers can do their jobs safely.School shootings do not just threaten the lives of our children. They threaten the lives of those that we entrust to take care of them every day when we drop them off. Many teachers have lost their lives protecting their students, and too many teachers are forced to consider the possibility that their classroom may be next.I decided to run for Congress because my son, his classmates, and his teachers ran from a school shooter. Tragically, four of my son’s classmates were killed that day. I will be a fierce advocate for commonsense solutions to protect our community against mass shootings–that means universal background checks, closing gun show loopholes, and funding enforcement.These measures, and more, will help flatten the ever increasing rate of school shootings in Michigan and across the country.But sadly, I know that stopping school shootings entirely will be a tall order, so we need to invest in our schools' safety infrastructure, as well as provide resources to help teachers and students cope with the aftermath of the trauma they experience during a shooting.Being a teacher shouldn’t be considered a front line profession. They want to teach and shape the next generation, they don’t want to act as professional security. We absolutely must do better, and we must take the steps necessary to keep our teachers and students safe.This Teacher Appreciation Month, let us not only celebrate educators' dedication and hard work but also commit to protecting them and their students. I am committed to fighting for the safety of our communities, our teachers, and our children.– Emily Busch PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

---

Emily Busch,

Democrats have proven that when they get elected, they get work done. **Take a look at what state Democrats in Pennsylvania have accomplished since last November →**
* Democrats sponsored legislation establishing and funding gun violence research
* Senate Democrats introduced a bill to prohibit sex-based discrimination in pay
* AND they introduced a bill to finally ensure LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians aren't discriminated against based on their gender identity

**But we are at risk of moving backward if Democrats lose to their MAGA-backed candidates.**

name: Colin Allred
subject: re: I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
friend, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.
The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue!
Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. We’re so close to hitting our $2,500,000 launch week goal!
Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you and we just need $5,591 more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $15 to power my Democratic campaign and Serve America ? Let’s do this → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
--------Forwarded Message--------
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend:
friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $2,500,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Serve America’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: A woke military is a weak military
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Under the Biden Administration, our military has become hyper-focused on woke projects instead of lethality.

Instead of putting bullets in our enemies, we’re working on preferred pronoun initiatives and “green” tanks.

It’s making America look weak, and if we don’t demonstrate strength, we give the enemy an opportunity to advance.

Our enemies aren’t worried about how diverse our squadrons are or how much fuel our tanks are using, Peter.

[**It’s time to take woke out of our military, and I need your help. Join us today to STOP the socialist agenda from infiltrating our troops!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=3e21089c7a84475d9e303fac39b1cd32&_e=qDBciQ_0OOzrN0cIb0I4nMbkq4gLea0MGF22o8IWw1N-2aqtRC2tghv7XwFb4Hn7mGX8cQY8p8kQymZlgBYdX1a7VIoreHU92_-LUd93C5LCxyaTmrc7Mwd6y65St8i8wu7EqdffioweUGpvM_JdY0hAsHF2u55Ezuzab9WdMuUg-3Un_U6TWVzZY3IosOOFEtnMl6Fevomxioy5lUTz5-kNlUeniaYxDY3OewAfucGkh0twLRsDVhg_I7zaGdty0PZ-1fD5XH1412x0iijMxx5gDX-TdrFxaVdIh6-JrbWfK8cQ8zMPvu6NnDTMio2iA28IjinhCLQkT8pgStoSDPNWqpT0hwjug1bNAzjZVGGvpAEUOQlNcQcFNU2WpbiJ)

[**KEEP WOKE OUT OF THE MILITARY**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=3e21089c7a84475d9e303fac39b1cd32&_e=qDBciQ_0OOzrN0cIb0I4nMbkq4gLea0MGF22o8IWw1N-2aqtRC2tghv7XwFb4Hn7mGX8cQY8p8kQymZlgBYdX1a7VIoreHU92_-LUd93C5LCxyaTmrc7Mwd6y65St8i8wu7EqdffioweUGpvM_JdY0hAsHF2u55Ezuzab9WdMuUg-3Un_U6TWVzZY3IosOOFEtnMl6Fevomxioy5lUTz59ZJUDpDvPRAyUB7kIKNsSfnELo1eXB_iGYppv-XgLurI0X-H0h7oS5LP56Xp-NrbLj6rE_j-tk3z9sN63DRoN9WIp7mLYS2sMSIuWC00T0Ysd86pEf2tlJnqVZQyHGh3Kxqc6o87fSOAeurTh1Bu3JT-pyRxUsvR-c6gzLH_Fs6)

When was a Green Beret calling in air support, I never worried about the sexual orientation, race, religion, or socioeconomic status of my fellow soldiers.

_And I guarantee our targets weren’t thinking about that either._

Our troops need to trust each other, and our enemies need to trust that if they cross America, they WILL be dealt with.

Woke politics in our military achieves NEITHER of those objectives. In fact, it harms both of them.

[**Wokeness is weakness, and it’s time to take a stand. Pitch in now and help us keep woke politics OUT of our military!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=3e21089c7a84475d9e303fac39b1cd32&_e=qDBciQ_0OOzrN0cIb0I4nMbkq4gLea0MGF22o8IWw1N-2aqtRC2tghv7XwFb4Hn7mGX8cQY8p8kQymZlgBYdX1a7VIoreHU92_-LUd93C5LCxyaTmrc7Mwd6y65St8i8wu7EqdffioweUGpvM_JdY0hAsHF2u55Ezuzab9WdMuUg-3Un_U6TWVzZY3IosOOFEtnMl6Fevomxioy5lUTz5wnSNy9OMi5BSNA-oCsov3Ua-lObBmL5mC47ghRf0fjwv0cge6NPzX14xqn74briqzdHtUnuZYCksjA6ktkAudJ4-oJ4S5aFCT1IK9YleR5yrCM0yektjPCD8KbUAdrKR0GNKVAneTeq4RkMQq42-j3LSW2xlOA-shDqoVdgnwVz)[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=3e21089c7a84475d9e303fac39b1cd32&_e=qDBciQ_0OOzrN0cIb0I4nMbkq4gLea0MGF22o8IWw1OeFC5O4voZdjQXLcRhvUoP9ED6Iob83AHuRnjziqsYnRHAsBKC93RolXw1NKMajm00pKH94tBXEcjfwsKmhYfl0eDyAD8p30em_H5UUmK9gsPjFFdgS5bgcf2JK1s1NhqMiteCj7UkK6jcQUts2SFmy_nGK-6sBYmeW3rtd4faNW2Z8VRfnM2d7arMapOwqtINxuhkBle6nX-loTisnM6AOmieBc9Hv9R1A3YNdC-EowYcf6CYmqgdqn4y7uPLSaDIeiWEkru8uzsZo8XidZJFcz-ZmZL-fl1-zyalprgiYl3w-MVo1two0c8d5-jvc-c%3D)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: I will not rest in this fight for reproductive freedom, and neither should you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792036/404587744/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTRjNTYzNy05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXa9h3cASYsNlfhclAfjXch82je07Vt-0hENi_Rbrcs=&emci=aac8f1b3-2ce9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=754c5637-9fea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Like you, I have been appalled by the unending and strident efforts on the right to strip away reproductive freedoms from Americans **You know what is really interesting, though? Increasingly, the politicians that take these actions do so quietly, without fanfare.** Florida's Governor, Ron DeSantis, signed his latest abortion ban bill in private, and did not announce it until just before midnight. They are doing this because they know they do not have the support of the public. They are on the wrong side of public opinion and the wrong side of history. **Well, I am not afraid to be clear about where I stand:** I am fighting for abortion access and reproductive freedom. **[Can I count on you to help build this campaign and join the fight for abortion rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792037/404587745/1596212816?refcode=2023-05-04-aboriton&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=754c5637-9fea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTRjNTYzNy05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXa9h3cASYsNlfhclAfjXch82je07Vt-0hENi_Rbrcs=)** [JOIN THE FIGHT ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792038/404587746/1596212816?refcode=2023-05-04-aboriton&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=754c5637-9fea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTRjNTYzNy05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXa9h3cASYsNlfhclAfjXch82je07Vt-0hENi_Rbrcs=) **We cannot count on the Supreme Court to protect our rights.** So we have to take back the House and do it by law. That means we need to build our grassroots campaign to: organize, knock on doors, talk to voters, donate, and vote. This is going to take hard work, good walking shoes, and a grassroots network that can organize in every corner of our country. And we are going to do it together. I have never stopped fighting for abortion rights, and I am not stopping now. **The rights that we enjoyed for years were hard won. And now we have to fight just as hard to keep those rights. I am dedicated to that fight. To fighting for your rights.** **[Will you join this fight with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792039/404587747/1596212816?refcode=2023-05-04-aboriton&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=754c5637-9fea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTRjNTYzNy05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DXa9h3cASYsNlfhclAfjXch82je07Vt-0hENi_Rbrcs=)** clean_body: | | | | Like you, I have been appalled by the unending and strident efforts on the right to strip away reproductive freedoms from Americans You know what is really interesting, though? Increasingly, the politicians that take these actions do so quietly, without fanfare. Florida's Governor, Ron DeSantis, signed his latest abortion ban bill in private, and did not announce it until just before midnight. They are doing this because they know they do not have the support of the public. They are on the wrong side of public opinion and the wrong side of history. Well, I am not afraid to be clear about where I stand: I am fighting for abortion access and reproductive freedom. = = We cannot count on the Supreme Court to protect our rights. So we have to take back the House and do it by law. That means we need to build our grassroots campaign to: organize, knock on doors, talk to voters, donate, and vote. This is going to take hard work, good walking shoes, and a grassroots network that can organize in every corner of our country. And we are going to do it together. I have never stopped fighting for abortion rights, and I am not stopping now. The rights that we enjoyed for years were hard won. And now we have to fight just as hard to keep those rights. I am dedicated to that fight. To fighting for your rights. = Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Greg Landsman
subject: Last month, I dropped the f bomb.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Here’s what happened...
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792132/404587989/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThjOWM3ZS05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3E3-cJpJNOiZhe8VqxN-FMaXAnhlfCbvvwDtvwR-5e0=)
---
Last month, I dropped the f bomb. Here’s why:

When I first heard about the innocent lives lost in the elementary school shooting in Nashville, I had one gut response:**“Ban these f---ing weapons.”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792133/404587990/1277364115?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThjOWM3ZS05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3E3-cJpJNOiZhe8VqxN-FMaXAnhlfCbvvwDtvwR-5e0=) | [Take a listen to my full reaction here »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792134/404587991/1277364115?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThjOWM3ZS05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3E3-cJpJNOiZhe8VqxN-FMaXAnhlfCbvvwDtvwR-5e0=)
---

I know some people may not find it professional or acceptable to use profanity – especially as a member of Congress.

But to that, I say: **It’s unacceptable that American children are being murdered by weapons of war in their classrooms.**

**This was the most normal reaction any parent could have.**

Let’s be clear: This is a fight for our lives. This is a fight for our right to live freely and safely in our communities. This is a fight to ensure that our children and families never again have to endure the grief of losing a loved one to gun violence. _And this is a fight we must win._

[**I hope you’ll take a moment to listen to my thoughts on why we need to ban assault weapons, and then, if you’re able, pitch in a few dollars to keep me fighting for gun violence prevention in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62792135/404587992/1277364115?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.04_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThjOWM3ZS05ZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3E3-cJpJNOiZhe8VqxN-FMaXAnhlfCbvvwDtvwR-5e0=)

In solidarity,

Greg

www.landsmanforcongress.com

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Democrat Colin Allred Launches Personal Attack on Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Colin Allred fumbled his attack on me and Texas values...

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=idRGRIcZydDo4JEFYC3D3A&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Conservative, I have a quick update for you. I’m being attacked and I need your help. As you’ve heard, far-left Democrat Colin Allred (pictured below) has announced he is running against me in the race for United States Senate in Texas. Now he has released a shameful video attacking me personally.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=idRGRIcZydDo4JEFYC3D3A&sysid=1)
---
I’m not impressed with his video. In it he smears me and lies about my record. He also claims I don’t care about Texas. It’s absurd. He talks trash because doesn’t want to talk about how he stands with Joe Biden, as Texas gets crushed by far-left DC Democrats... **Help me show Democrat Colin Allred that this type of negative hit job won’t fly in Texas by making a[ _strong donation_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3B%2bMrO1Z7IoI6QcCUnsL4w&sysid=1) right now >> ** [**Please make an emergency donation to help my campaign fight back >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19432%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zVhzHPtdsKNYt80He0FU0g&sysid=1) _I’ll see you on the campaign trail soon. Thank you! _ For Liberty,
---

subject: BREAKING Far-left Democrat Running Against Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**

name: GA House Democrats
subject: A statement from Leader Beverly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus
body:
Atlanta - Last night, Georgia House Minority Leader James Beverly responded to the horrific Atlanta mass shooting.

Minority Leader James Beverly: "Atlanta was riddled with terror, fear, and ultimately grief. How many more people have to die before we do something about gun violence? Kemp refuses to do anything about gun violence but prepares statements of condolences. Coward?

The plague of gun violence impacts our daily life. No longer do we feel safe to eat at our neighborhood restaurants, shop at our local stores, or wait in waiting areas of medical offices. Is this our reality? Why does Kemp and his GOP colleagues refuse to do anything about guns? When will we, as Georgians say- enough is enough? Voters are asking. Children are dying. When? This must end."

--

name: John Fetterman
subject: Solidarity forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Enough.
#
Derek,
This email goes out to all the brave workers across the country who have decided to stand up and say enough: **Enough.**
Enough of being underpaid. Enough of shitty working conditions. Enough of corporate executives that are seeing massive profits without giving workers their rightful share.
**Late-night TV shows go dark as writers strike for better pay**
_Associated Press_

**American Airlines pilots authorize a strike mandate**
_Reuters_

**Another Trader Joe’s Store Just Formed A Union**
_HuffPost_
**[Will you show solidarity with unionizing + striking workers nationwide by signing our petition supporting the PRO Act? We need this legislation to strengthen unions nationwide.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/pass_the_pro_act/?source=em20230504-1-8362&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)** 💪💪💪
**[Sign Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/pass_the_pro_act/?source=em20230504-8362&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)**
The Union Way of life is sacred, and we should *always* protect it. Weekends, the eight hour workday, benefits — we have all that thanks to unions and the centuries-long labor movement that built this nation.
In the face of unprecedented attacks on workers and the right to form a union, we must support our unions + pass the PRO Act — a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America.
**[Let’s seize the momentum on the ground and build grassroots support for the PRO Act. Sign the petition now to show you’re ready to fight to protect the Union Way of life.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/pass_the_pro_act/?source=em20230504-1-8362&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)**
**[Sign Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/pass_the_pro_act/?source=em20230504-8362&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)**
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230504-8362-footer&t=1&refcode2=8362_434096_O7c4iX&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8362%2E434096%2EO7c4iX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: I’m honored to be endorsed by EMILY’s List
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
They're a key part of the progressive coalition, and I'm so humbled to have them on our side.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)
I'm honored to share some big news with you: **We've been endorsed by EMILY's list** -- and our campaign is the _first non-incumbent House race of the 2024 cycle_ to get their endorsement.
For more than three decades, EMILY's List has recruited, trained, and supported Democratic pro-choice women candidates running for office. To be endorsed by EMILY's List says: "We want you in the halls of Congress because you'll tell our stories and you'll fight our fights."
**[This is a huge moment for our progressive movement. To build on our momentum, can you chip in $5 to the campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230504-1&refcode=em20230504-1?refcode2=22_1163_5F91J1&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230504-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230504-1&refcode2=22_1163_5F91J1&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)**
EMILY's list supports women candidates who are fighting for progressive change and fighting against the far-right attempts to take away our reproductive freedom.
**You can bet that our voices will be joining that chorus on Capitol Hill once we win.**
Together, we can make sure that every community of the East Bay keeps the progressive representation in Congress we've fought so hard for.
**[If you're with me, help us build on this huge burst of momentum with a donation of $5 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230504-1&refcode=em20230504-1?refcode2=22_1163_5F91J1&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)**
I'm so grateful to have you on our team.
Onward,
Lateefah Simon
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230504-1&t=2&refcode2=22_1163_5F91J1&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=22%2E1163%2E5F91J1)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: A few updates from DC for our core team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
Want to make sure I'm keeping you up to speed, friend

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62794046/404593499/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc0ZWM4Yy1hNGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0sDCY3_tqNDstG-N61tTTFeEenGBvIwDskOHTPzStg=&emci=29f98a04-a2ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5e74ec8c-a4ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) **** Hi, I’ve always believed that when elected officials ask for support, it can’t ever be a one-way relationship. It’s my responsibility to demonstrate to you what your support is going toward — and how I’m making the most of this opportunity to serve Colorado in Congress. So I wanted to share some updates about my work: If you follow the news, it won’t surprise you when I say that a big part of my job is fighting back against GOP extremism — working to defeat attacks on the right to choose, rejecting further attacks on our democracy, and standing strong in defense of programs like Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and veterans’ benefits that millions of Americans depend on every day. I’ve even had to fight to stop a disastrous proposal to hit every single American with a national 35% sales tax! **But simply saying no to bad policies is not an agenda. Even with Democrats in the minority, I’m going to work as hard as I can to deliver positive change for the American people. And I’m proud to have hit the ground running in my first few months on the job:**
* I’ve introduced legislation to stop the import of fentanyl and other illicit synthetic drugs.
* I’m working for Postal Service reforms to stop the mail delays and delivery errors harming families in our district — and I launched a bipartisan caucus to address this issue.
* My bipartisan bill to improve technology and equipment for first responders navigating emergency situations passed the House.
* I’m fighting for $35 million in federal funding for local projects to improve access to clean water, expand affordable housing, and improve quality of life in our community.
* I’m continuing to work for a solution toward our debt ceiling crisis.
* And just last week, I was appointed the Vice Ranking Member of the Financial Services Subcommittee on National Security and Illicit Finance, which covers all legislative issues related to international finance, including combating threats other countries and terrorist organizations pose to our nation’s economy and national security.

**In short, Team, it’s been a whirlwind few months, and we aren’t stopping. There is so much work to do to support our community and make life better for the regular families whose needs so often go overlooked in Washington. And I’m incredibly proud to have your support as we take on these fights together.** Thanks for everything you do. More to come. -Brittany | | [DONATE → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62794047/404593500/-966987088?refcode=email_050423_updates&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc0ZWM4Yy1hNGVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0sDCY3_tqNDstG-N61tTTFeEenGBvIwDskOHTPzStg=)
---

| Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y6N32-PBR02A61hdKqQ9kg2?unsubscribedata=ujeIifP9DDaa8q4QjEIKu9djHhHF5JEJJfLH8TuZnUqdfV0jD%2Ft%2BWkL2z41edgZW1qVApB%2FQK6sXmjiKxbDquOoikOTgqW0q2xN9QGAOvQf6o9wVe4mRfa%2FP55I0TT%2BkpkPnToRts5lQnDx6uRp%2FJhzy8E3vsLZbzCQuRH%2FfPKmO29PrOFfcPJ%2Fhaum6%2FuQ4Bw1eFXfPDeRRKLoEXsK7%2FLiREw7Vl2RwCgWXjpaijR7yrZ9ukIYd8aAxm0FUENRX3W3ihLt%2BSNmv%2FbGiBnzyW8NDks5rkLcC8iVvFqLVECVlW1FECHThglBnvpe%2Ff%2BDtW%2FHETDM1Oo8sUPIx3roFa96HK3VKRApSriNZF3xGKYJmDOklquUHSRLf8rrrnF6cB94YTr%2Fkb%2B0%2FGLjP1iyHPtXzAD2g7eHyjYqg9a78kg3VmM%2BS0dHPuIewUHJuBs2m)**.
---
Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado.
Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
P.O. Box 150887
Lakewood, CO 80215
United States

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Revenge of the Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

It’s May the Fourth — Star Wars Day. Get it? And we at Team Schiff are
just a bunch of scruffy-looking nerf herders.

So we need to talk about the greatest threat to the galaxy and Galactic
Senate today. This guy:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]Donald Trump flanked by Storm Troopers

Donald Trump is commanding Republicans’ loyalty. Through fear. Through
anger. Through hate. Proving that MAGA extremism retains its hold on the
collective psyche of the far right.

Remember when Darth Vader Force-choked the Imperial officer who dared
question “his sorcerous ways?” As Trump campaigns for president for the
third time, he is growing stronger by the day — and silencing dissent
within his party.

He is collecting endorsements, fundraising off of his multiple legal
cases, and dominating his presidential rivals.

His consolidation of power means that we must oppose him with everything
we’ve got. Our Democracy’s fiercest defender needs our help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]Adam Schiff flanked by Jedis

Derek, the Force is all around us. It’s you. It’s us. It’s this
grassroots team.

Trump’s use of brute Force, and Mitch McConnell’s manipulation of the
levers of the Senate a la Palpatine, will require a countervailing Force.

Adam has spent years defending our Democracy. And Trump’s biggest enablers
remain in the Senate. That’s why we need to help Adam on his mission. This
is where we must take our fight.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=may2023_abs_em.TpLEiB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]Will you help Adam harness the power of the Force for good and send him
to the Senate by contributing $10 to our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=may2023_abs_em.S2LdYU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=may2023_abs_em.-ikdjF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=may2023_abs_em.giYyqq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=may2023_abs_em.3BVBtQ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2177%2E5257348%2EBnpBj9 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks, and May the Fourth be with you ;).

— Team Schiff

P.S. And yes, those glorious pictures are all AI-generated. Do or do not,
there is no try.

name: Team Vivek
subject: May the 4th be with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=16b1874300804d03a016a4d58749f0dd&_e=4gAuVrZs5tGdCOh3rwBcTO5oVNKHOJVCKOB1hBlIhulbHV8ov4F7qzPUfJHy1aAsp9oljgR49wa0LYhoLHM22UlvQiyeIo9shxApk1RipiaBJFqvH2HbNx4LKEr2kzVr56S-zEwA8uNaPQa2HmZ0m97KCd25zuzlknxt3zBuljo1AQe2Yenf7QElIxelCzfgk9apYCSsELBryF9flYzZgIICKbwqYdnpui83LWmO4geG9IJXAgbR2ewNAgrC79x3eo4fPhn_WyGpsMmSfuxUBfKl6BwKm6EYRQu9E_6oQr3GbkGQivEoljIvTkb5fy1TDOQMQQFs0ClBupbasdqJgjOFJFpd8a2fkwvtCi2omxLzKDRS5jGC1df_jOjsW9vKaqt0KdHn4DDNCSmGnrpzug%3D%3D)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Challenging the hard-left Biden administration
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I can't remember when Judicial Watch has been more involved in so many important investigations and federal lawsuits where having adequate financial resources are key...._since our independent research, investigative and legal work continues to be indispensable weapons in fighting for the rule of law_.
And that's why **[I ask you to help us with a special contribution today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**Here are just three critically important wins we have recently scored for the rule of law and the American people 's right to know:**

* **_We won another major victory for honest elections when we settled our clean voter rolls lawsuit against Colorado_. **Our National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) lawsuit was filed in October 2020. Since then, Colorado's voter removals have increased by a whopping 78%! What's more, in our settlement, the state has agreed to report its yearly progress in cleaning its voter rolls of ineligible names to Judicial Watch for the next six years. _This is how we keep elections h_ _onest_!

* **_We continue to break new ground in exposing how our tax dollars are being used to spread Critical Race Theory in public institutions_. **A Judicial Watch Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed on behalf of a concerned citizens' group against the Department of Defense forced the release of documents that show the U.S. Air Force Academy has made race and gender instruction a top priority in training cadets. In one document, the Academy's superintendent flatly states "Systemic racism exists in our society." _We will continue to keep the spotlight on efforts to attack our military and its future leaders from within_.

* **_And we recently forced the release of blockbuster government documents from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) related to federal funding for_ China's controversial Wuhan Institute and its research to create Coronavirus 'mutants.' **It is increasingly likely that U.S. funding in China and elsewhere for mutant virus, gain-of-function research may have been responsible for the emergence of the COVID pandemic in Wuhan. Judicial Watch has been the national leader in forcing _accountability from our government_ about how taxpayer funds may have directly supported the spread of COVID. _These continuing revelations should prompt criminal investigations_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

I am proud of our researchers, investigators and attorneys digging in and fighting successfully on these fronts.

I am also deeply grateful to the hundreds of thousands of Americans whose support is the indispensable lifeblood of our work on behalf of the rule of law...and the reason we’re having such great impact in the courts!

But our caseload keeps growing, as we confront new challenges to the rule of law and the "people's right to know" by the hyper-politicized, hard-left Biden administration.

And frankly, [that’s why we so urgently need you to join the Judicial Watch team today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

I am sure you can understand, as Judicial Watch takes on the deep-pockets of federal and state government lawyers int the courts, how we rely on patriotic Americans like you to give us your support!

You see, giving us your support is _absolutely essential_ to helping us hold government officials and corrupt politicians in _both_ parties responsible for their actions and demand accountability...all while educating millions of Americans about what our government is up to!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

I hope you will join with us, and make a special contribution today so we can continue to successfully fight for the rule of law on these and other essential conservative policy fronts.

Thank you, in advance, for giving us your support!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63232&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

clean_body: You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I can't remember when Judicial Watch has been more involved in so many important investigations and federal lawsuits where having adequate financial resources are key....since our independent research, investigative and legal work continues to be indispensable weapons in fighting for the rule of law. And that's why | Here are just three critically important wins we have recently scored for the rule of law and the American people 's right to know: We won another major victory for honest elections when we settled our clean voter rolls lawsuit against Colorado. Our National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) lawsuit was filed in October 2020. Since then, Colorado's voter removals have increased by a whopping 78%! What's more, in our settlement, the state has agreed to report its yearly progress in cleaning its voter rolls of ineligible names to Judicial Watch for the next six years. This is how we keep elections h onest! We continue to break new ground in exposing how our tax dollars are being used to spread Critical Race Theory in public institutions. A Judicial Watch Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit filed on behalf of a concerned citizens' group against the Department of Defense forced the release of documents that show the U.S. Air Force Academy has made race and gender instruction a top priority in training cadets. In one document, the Academy's superintendent flatly states "Systemic racism exists in our society." We will continue to keep the spotlight on efforts to attack our military and its future leaders from within. And we recently forced the release of blockbuster government documents from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) related to federal funding for China's controversial Wuhan Institute and its research to create Coronavirus 'mutants.' **It is increasingly likely that U.S. funding in China and elsewhere for mutant virus, gain-of-function research may have been responsible for the emergence of the COVID pandemic in Wuhan. Judicial Watch has been the national leader in forcing accountability from our government about how taxpayer funds may have directly supported the spread of COVID. These continuing revelations should prompt criminal investigations! I am proud of our researchers, investigators and attorneys digging in and fighting successfully on these fronts. I am also deeply grateful to the hundreds of thousands of Americans whose support is the indispensable lifeblood of our work on behalf of the rule of law...and the reason we’re having such great impact in the courts! But our caseload keeps growing, as we confront new challenges to the rule of law and the "people's right to know" by the hyper-politicized, hard-left Biden administration. And frankly, I am sure you can understand, as Judicial Watch takes on the deep-pockets of federal and state government lawyers int the courts, how we rely on patriotic Americans like you to give us your support! You see, giving us your support is absolutely essential to helping us hold government officials and corrupt politicians in both parties responsible for their actions and demand accountability...all while educating millions of Americans about what our government is up to! I hope you will join with us, and make a special contribution today so we can continue to successfully fight for the rule of law on these and other essential conservative policy fronts. Thank you, in advance, for giving us your support! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why are all these big banks dropping like flies?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
How we got here, and where we need to go. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62815933/404635025/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13N_FIN_E_20230504_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDNhOGMyMi1jN2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGkxpoNRmNPiHimr-tZK4hMRin95G49thxYdrS2wrm8=&emci=b14a071c-c7ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b43a8c22-c7ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
It happened again: another big bank failure. Just about two months ago, two major banks crashed — Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) and Signature Bank. SVB’s collapse was the second-biggest bank failure in American history. But not for long, because First Republic Bank just nose-dived too and took over that #2 slot. Why are these big banks dropping like flies? Well, the news may feel sudden, but the failures have been years in the making. I want to talk about some major causes, and how I’m fighting to fix our banking system. Big-shot bank executives — including leaders at SVB, Signature, and First Republic — lobbied for looser regulations. Under the Trump administration, they got ’em. Regulators at the Fed were asleep at the switch, big banks were free to load up on risk to juice their profits (and bonuses), and the houses of cards came crumbling down. So I’m fighting to pass stronger regulations. I’m fighting to hold regulators accountable. I’m fighting to hold bank executives accountable — including with my bipartisan bill to claw back executive compensation after bank failures. If we toughen up the rules of the road, if we make sure regulators use all the tools in their toolbox to enforce those rules, and if we change the system that currently incentivizes bank executives to chase big risks without consequences for their personal bottom lines, we can put the system on surer footing. Here’s the way I see it: we need a banking system that works for working people. That lets small businesses and nonprofits make deposits with confidence that their money will still be there when they need it. That allows our economy to keep humming along and growing. In fact, banking should be boring — not a thrill-seeking industry where CEOs can gamble with our whole economy. We’re in this fight side by side for a government that works for families — not big banks, billionaire CEOs, and giant corporations. You help make it all possible with your grassroots support. And I’m deeply grateful. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62815934/404635026/-551446403?refcode=EMZ13N_FIN_E_20230504_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDNhOGMyMi1jN2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGkxpoNRmNPiHimr-tZK4hMRin95G49thxYdrS2wrm8=)

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:__taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62795575/404598601/1711913910?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2562-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxN2NkMTMxLWE2ZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z93qZKfktxG3SvK2n9_BymPmeJfW20X2OxeP6VQfg08=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

We’re so close to hitting our $2,000,000 launch goal! = | | = \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Colin Allred Date: Wed, May 03, 2023 Subject: I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz | | | | | = ---|--- Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $2,000,000? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

Peter, Not only was Elissa Slotkin’s election for Michigan’s Seventh Congressional District super close, it was the ***MOST*** expensive race in the country. Outside groups were pouring millions of dollars into her district in an effort to flip her seat, but she had an advantage: _early money. _ The cost of television ads skyrocketed as they got closer to Election Day, but luckily Elissa had started fundraising early, so she was able to buy her airtime much sooner than her opponent, before the price went up. That meant she had more money to do things like canvassing, voter registration drives, and digital ads. But that was only possible because folks chipped in months and years before Election Day, and her team was able to craft an effective, long term strategy because of it. subject: More about Sinema’s secret Nazi-admiring donor
body:
Sinema donor pays for Clarence Thomas’ kid’s private school tuition and his wife’s salary | | | Peter – NEW revelations about billionaire GOP (and Sinema) donor Harlan Crow shows his bankrolling of Clarence Thomas goes beyond just vacations. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xPg-we6-6TZiylK6pKfi6BWul77Yo4cgfZwrAV1oFyGjjezF2xVzPuHjUh1QMx1T_K6spjrn5uV7U8Kei69T7fwFjPiK0Aw5EdYZjAnd8nHqNLG0Czbdll0aH2yDR4qv9CSKcnPH-ued9rluDUOHLqbhRfcfXC3Z3-IuTEheeikDY927IGnRlS9VyEyQWZMDCO5e_uxd8h0Z_w3jpRR_6RD4rrZmZ7QGFU22MPU9diaAvXdJT0P1DcWNrI3bydPqSvKfcGYeTm-nW6XzF1_oHE2uTmcqq4_4kMzswwaViwSMHdcxshuZsWgrENDG0K_bsxlyljTA8DJc4YEHMkmQ7oxOZ2U1OB2dopaWlpYP7Jdw/3vw/5NM53pfyTVi4IvrtfjfpIA/h0/9ajZsQbMFvp9Plod6IUUd8vkSxjiA-nWL06kxbi65nw) The Washington Post reports that Crow was also paying to send Thomas’ grandnephew (who Thomas raised like a son) to private boarding school, and even, it would appear, **funding his wife Ginni’s salary through her political organization.** So basically Crow, the weirdo billionaire who keeps a collection of Hitler memorabilia in his house, is straight up paying for a Supreme Court justice’s luxury lifestyle. Last year Kyrsten Sinema’s PAC also received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow, and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to return $2,900 to Crow after he exceeded federal contribution limits. Kyrsten Sinema isn’t picky when it comes to donors. Her only criteria?**Write a big check and don’t ask a lot of questions. As long as they have deep pockets, it doesn’t matter how odious.[Arizona deserves better. clean_body: Sinema donor pays for Clarence Thomas’ kid’s private school tuition and his wife’s salary | | | Peter – NEW revelations about billionaire GOP (and Sinema) donor Harlan Crow shows his bankrolling of Clarence Thomas goes beyond just vacations. The Washington Post reports that Crow was also paying to send Thomas’ grandnephew (who Thomas raised like a son) to private boarding school, and even, it would appear, funding his wife Ginni’s salary through her political organization. So basically Crow, the weirdo billionaire who keeps a collection of Hitler memorabilia in his house, is straight up paying for a Supreme Court justice’s luxury lifestyle. Last year Kyrsten Sinema’s PAC also received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow, and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to return $2,900 to Crow after he exceeded federal contribution limits. Kyrsten Sinema isn’t picky when it comes to donors. Her only criteria?Write a big check and don’t ask a lot of questions. As long as they have deep pockets, it doesn’t matter how odious. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Another thing Sinema has in common with Clarence Thomas is she really, really likes fancy things. body:
The opening act for Josh Hawley’s first “Manhood” book tour stop vs. his record on veterans
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood” is coming out on May 16th — and at the first stop of his book tour over the weekend, this was the warm-up act the night before:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31986?refcode=em20230504-3077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3077%2E614464%2Egl0F9s)
Hawley might be a fan of playing toy soldier... but when it comes to actually standing up for the real people who put themselves in danger for our country, he’s already proved that he’s a fraud and a coward.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31986?refcode=em20230504-3077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3077%2E614464%2Egl0F9s)

---
Fellow patriot,

As you know, I have dedicated my life to protecting our communities and enforcing the laws of our land. I wore the badge proudly, and for that I was the recipient of vitriol from those who don’t believe in law & order.

The opposition and hatred law enforcement across the country receive today is _**so much worse**_ than what I experienced.

They put their lives on the line every day to keep our communities safe, and they deserve our unwavering support. But instead, they are defunded, undermined, demonized, and even targeted for murder.

_**They deserve so much better!**_

[**That's why I am writing to you today to ask for your help in supporting The League for Law Enforcement,**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK0tsrqz6YBSu_WWyKa_WrCgnucF7iYpueSsQy4wXF7ztNBIHtxHIIA5vrTfO2-TxBiFwRNlcKGxfNI9tA4mBuhL6AXpubNHF-3ICjJQy_ecLAdaSDc2OeWSdi_XF2umAj9C_FYjxRPrZPFUiS4xPzhFQ%3D%3D) an amazing organization that is dedicated to advocating for law enforcement at the ballot box, in the halls of congress and state legislatures, and in our local communities.

[ **JOIN SHERIFF JOE » DONATE TODAY**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK00hhwxnooau8DiOfQkleduOqAb3WPyJjbEd_DOJi4btVeifKT6ECkOYktQqvB7gNYFck2x8WdAd9ry9OPbKOTjw1rfeOSnVYT1QbPkuTjb_xf1r1AIUK1AHQXC98TwfcVrm7SCYq3GwotZgaIdCerKA%3D%3D)
I have been working with men and women at The League for Law Enforcement for many years, and I have seen firsthand the impact that their work can have. That's why I am asking you to join me in supporting this vital organization.

[**By making a donation to The League for Law Enforcement,**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK0VmRj0dA7AkQlFxo2IjD6VHjjdbjWAR36ngalY2hnW02UA7_MweLaaeevk8j6I4Jp0k0OGtJP9bVX-3SY7G6vB0UcJKYfOPT7TfITGCoDiShw4Qk0pU1gQEH94wlVXVT7JFj_i1pDyMukSHpQcKyP6A%3D%3D) you can help ensure that our police officers have the support they need to do their jobs safely and effectively. Your support will not only make a real difference in the lives of our brave men and women in blue, but in their ability to keep us safe.

[**Will you chip in $25 or more to ensure The League has the resources to make an impact?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK0vEXEPN1KweJSPzGZP7s7Qcr41J5ArKU7cXTjJyxvG8Vv10SnN_5TBXgBKcKMshnTbXlyEqz0GslZxBl-18HqhNQkQvhAAkw4CZdbZHtVRu8dlGkHWwZGts6cICfNVu6psQMfDuZSt8dZ5e54vn0Sag%3D%3D)

[ **JOIN SHERIFF JOE » DONATE TODAY**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK0M1B5XPkk5W8u6RsbUzRJQ_fIMev5ehnAj5O1NRsiXbNJxtr519uUo176u5TNioR-MU8VOMYNzVXsLeSa0uYzWcNKAj8G_NVBzMYRjCW4yV-MSqHRSQBvaWurr2Smw4iiCpR9h2vKXbNEzJg1ZNKRtg%3D%3D)
With woke, pro-criminal, anti-police politicians and prosecutors working overtime to enable criminals and disadvantage police, we are becoming less safe every day.

We need The League for Law Enforcement fighting to give law enforcement the upper hand in the Left’s War on Cops.

[**Please join me in supporting them with a donation today!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=05b993e075064d10ace7b34eb8c5a794&_e=A9a3t1hagE6TYijxqex2wmexU8VdSwZP9DXBjHAfDhhUfL4oyw8Q5OzuP3ZwRpj4r629CS1Dfy7HaAJFEsB4L-jNAwVcN9dbnjCtGMoS0TDPqeJLEWVP4l4ouWQ8VmKBtz3s6_OBcpdoXWcqQHHErjTvku10-_UmNUsraSsh86UyV2Wv9jW4PZCKxmTPXGK0mhXnp0sqwxI3Lxr5JceQaZURP5Zce_f_7M2BnxoeFvI-GjhJaHdjiw6clwVE7InqUUrrUF6nQ05R0eP1QOI1qV8-igsEnN_nVRbyg9Z9PIVEmrT3ASy-cctxsj5XjF-KgUIoMgCXPD0Y4j75vL616A%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

name: Nikki for Congress
subject: Why Nikki needs your support now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team,

Following her first 100 days, Nikki’s keeping her momentum going strong, delivering results for working families. She supported efforts to bring gas prices down at the pump, sponsored bipartisan legislation for farmers and land conservation, and fought back against GOP attempts to cut rural healthcare access and benefits for our veterans. But right now, Nikki needs your help.

This is an incredibly competitive seat that’s been designated as one of the most vulnerable in the country for Democrats. Nikki flipped this district from red to blue for the first time in years, and we need a solid team to make sure we keep it that way.

We need to stand with Nikki so she can continue making change happen for our working families. Can you support Nikki’s fight in Congress and help protect this seat by becoming a monthly donor today?

SIGN UP » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_b1&amount=10&recurring=true

Families in central and southern Illinois, and all across the country, are already seeing the benefits of having a labor champion like Nikki in Congress. She has tirelessly forged bipartisan relationships and advocated for legislation that will expand workforce opportunities and lower the cost of living for families. Nikki is exactly who we need in Congress working for all of us, but she needs your support to hold onto this seat.

A Republican challenger has already filed to run against Nikki, and we need the resources to fight back and keep her in Congress. Will you join us in keeping this seat blue by becoming a monthly donor today?

JOIN: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_b2&amount=10&recurring=true

Thanks for standing with Nikki,
Nikki for Congress

--

Paid for by Nikki For Congress

Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a one-time contribution by clicking here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PTfooter&amount=10

Her top priority is ensuring that our community has the tools we need to succeed. Just last week, she worked with colleagues across the political spectrum to find solutions to reduce healthcare costs for working Americans and joined a Gun Violence Prevention Task Force to address the epidemic of gun violence. Jahana is busy upholding our values in Congress, and that is why we need to keep her voice representing us in 2024 and beyond!
