subject: Sharice needs your input before tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Sharice needs to hear from you.

Women today have far fewer rights than they did even a year ago. When Roe was overturned, it opened the floodgates for anti-choice legislation and lawsuits. We have to do something about it. Will you sign Sharice’s petition to support the ERA by midnight tomorrow?

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/era](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62798851/404608005/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230504_PT_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQ0OWQ3ZS1hZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjLDlLyjEsmRlsG_W7x0JLEBD3XNCYlCSs6NUj_t1YU=&emci=7bd49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=84d49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

* * *
**_Here’s her original message for the full context:_**

I am writing first and foremost to say thank you.

You and I both know that your contributions matter a lot to our campaign. Every decision we make on the road to 2024 depends on how many donations we have in the door.

Our war chest needs to be full in order to fight back against the onslaught of dark money attack ads we expect in this race, so your contribution makes a huge difference.

Making sure we take back the House and expand our majority in the Senate is a critical mission. Just last month, the Senate GOP struck down the latest attempt to pass the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) into law.

Enshrining the ERA into law has never been more essential. After the overturning of Roe v. Wade, women in America have fewer rights today than we had just one year ago.

It’s been 100 years since the ERA was first introduced. The time to protect women’s rights is now. **[Are you with me? Click here to sign my petition by our Friday deadline. I need 1,000 signatures to help me prove my base is behind me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62798852/404608006/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230504_PT_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQ0OWQ3ZS1hZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjLDlLyjEsmRlsG_W7x0JLEBD3XNCYlCSs6NUj_t1YU=&emci=7bd49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=84d49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62798853/404608007/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230504_PT_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQ0OWQ3ZS1hZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjLDlLyjEsmRlsG_W7x0JLEBD3XNCYlCSs6NUj_t1YU=&emci=7bd49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=84d49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)
---
With attacks against the right to choose mounting, women on average getting paid 82% of what a man does, and discrimination present in courtrooms, workplaces, and even doctor’s offices, we need to affirm our dedication to equal rights for all Americans regardless of gender, sexual orientation, or race.

I’m proud to have voted to pass the Equality Act in the House, along with the Women’s Health Protection Act, and to have led the charge on the Respect for Marriage Act becoming law. All these measures share the aim of making America more equal for everyone.

Now, we need to keep going in our fight for equality. **[Sign your name to support the ERA today→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62798854/404608008/1557289134?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230504_PT_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_ERA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGQ0OWQ3ZS1hZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjLDlLyjEsmRlsG_W7x0JLEBD3XNCYlCSs6NUj_t1YU=&emci=7bd49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=84d49d7e-afea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Thank you,
Sharice

body:
Only patriots will be allowed in our government.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuRHB2NjmwKGpmx5Qq1ZaqdteIjM2YVbYIDCL8u8rouxev_c0ep_Ghnmk_t4wdWYAA7mVATD-hQG04vz6U7Z_WpPv5v13bmQl9iOFrwwg3Wf_WX1eOflgaTyoMplrADUgZr4ppeYASmrIhgZ4LSrhEPvKir6XlXQWZa0Ur1HXvMuogQJ4URWirEshyhO3XY-orCqs76wqmCh2iic3RTu6t7RsYT7hFLKxGVKa18ekC4PL6nFb_GmnuHh3NA5m331ug18Ibf42UUx5v0W3WFop3nKcQqCUvGdwiTiKzjmNWukKseIdMH7ZUrgG72gLjJunrzzgOm0LesYN0tU-GdowW7pFxs2H00cyxeRjYtxoXZcM5DWO5Bg3w_llwB_Vv3v7gI-PcNPC3-8vr8Wvb9nSuHmncaRVKiaK27HgcPsfAAD__1lZjf8)

Friend,
I have a feeling you’re going to like this one a lot.
I recently recorded a video, detailing my plan of action to slash our bloated bureaucracy and root out self-serving, incompetent, and disloyal bureaucrats entrenched within our government.
As your next president, I will mandate federal employees to take a civil service test to demonstrate a TRUE understanding of our Constitution – _**and bureaucrats who do not pass will be FIRED.**_
_**They will be quizzed on your due process rights, equal protection, free speech, religious liberties, the Fourth Amendment protection against unreasonable search and seizure (something I know all about), and your many other constitutional liberties.**_
If we want to restore a government that is truly OF, FOR, and BY THE PEOPLE, then we need to be certain that we have dutiful patriots who understand the basic rights enshrined in our Constitution.

They will be quizzed on your due process rights, equal protection, free speech, religious liberties, the Fourth Amendment protection against unreasonable search and seizure (something I know all about), and your many other constitutional liberties. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Kyle Hauptman and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# NCUA Vice Chairman Kyle Hauptman...
---
Dr. Mansharamani's most recent conversation will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend and is available on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email). His guest this week was Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chairman of the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), which provides deposit insurance to the nation's credit unions.
---
EPISODE 8: NCUA VICE CHAIR KYLE HAUPTMAN
In the most recent episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chair of the National Credit Union Administration. Kyle discusses his time growing up as a "townie" in a place where people use "summer" as a verb, the perspective he gained from his front-row seat at the implosion of Lehman Brothers, his more recent entrance into the world of politics and policy, and his love of movies.

---
EPISODE 7: MAYOR FRANCIS SUAREZ
In the second-to-last episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez. Mayor Suarez shares what it was like growing up as the oldest of four children and his path to being elected with 86% of the vote. They discuss how the Mayor navigated his career decisions, his approach to governance, his vision for America, and his love of New Hampshire (yes, New Hampshire!) barbecue.
---
EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU
In the sixth episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes.
---
EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT
In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning.
---

EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL
In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)!
---

EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY
In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity.
---
EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON
In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general.
---
EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS
In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cj2tDnYQyPRykcrrGYxs-buzvSJDoWXUReR5LRy-EtQxYmmFzcv3aC7XFdePPE3qKFf4l7drIZsdaAj9dwKfLaLG0dR0KJXH6NR-vWPi_74z2z7lyKYOMRBZwCf2G9kPODvkjc85gqcopcf_bZ3dhQ==&c=Pcrf-uL6gkSyYcRrCRA5uFUWzuihvorfeSmuERi8M5D3Ht9uivQnGw==&ch=zyn47di1uGeOVttVi64CySsa2iEyWuypV01PjfVjSn58OHb6W_c7Wg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!
To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cj2tDnYQyPRykcrrGYxs-buzvSJDoWXUReR5LRy-EtQxYmmFzcv3aC7XFdePPE3qKFf4l7drIZsdaAj9dwKfLaLG0dR0KJXH6NR-vWPi_74z2z7lyKYOMRBZwCf2G9kPODvkjc85gqcopcf_bZ3dhQ==&c=Pcrf-uL6gkSyYcRrCRA5uFUWzuihvorfeSmuERi8M5D3Ht9uivQnGw==&ch=zyn47di1uGeOVttVi64CySsa2iEyWuypV01PjfVjSn58OHb6W_c7Wg==).

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | NCUA Vice Chairman Kyle Hauptman... Dr. Mansharamani's most recent conversation will be aired on The Pulse of New Hampshire this weekend and is available on the Pulse of New Hampshire app or wherever you get your podcasts (links to several sites are at the end of this email). His guest this week was Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chairman of the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), which provides deposit insurance to the nation's credit unions. EPISODE 8: NCUA VICE CHAIR KYLE HAUPTMAN In the most recent episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Kyle Hauptman, Vice Chair of the National Credit Union Administration. Kyle discusses his time growing up as a "townie" in a place where people use "summer" as a verb, the perspective he gained from his front-row seat at the implosion of Lehman Brothers, his more recent entrance into the world of politics and policy, and his love of movies. EPISODE 7: MAYOR FRANCIS SUAREZ In the second-to-last episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Miami Mayor Francis Suarez. Mayor Suarez shares what it was like growing up as the oldest of four children and his path to being elected with 86% of the vote. They discuss how the Mayor navigated his career decisions, his approach to governance, his vision for America, and his love of New Hampshire (yes, New Hampshire!) barbecue. EPISODE 6: GOVERNOR CHRIS SUNUNU In the sixth episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Chris Sununu, Governor of the State of New Hampshire. Governor Sununu shares what it was like growing up as the seventh of eight children as well as a bit about his time at MIT. They discuss how the Governor navigated his early career decisions, the three ingredients he believes are responsible for New Hampshire's successes, and why he now prefers french toast to pancakes. EPISODE 5: COMMISSIONER FRANK EDELBLUT In the fifth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Education for the State of New Hampshire. An accountant turned successful businessman, Commissioner Edelblut shared how he has navigated uncertainty in his personal life as well as his thinking around several important education topics. Topics addressed include charter schools, education financing, parental rights, and the increasing importance of lifelong learning. EPISODE 4: COMMISSIONER TAYLOR CASWELL In the fourth episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Commissioner Taylor Caswell, head of the Department of Business and Economic Affairs for the State of New Hampshire. A native of Littleton, Commissioner Caswell shared his philosophy around navigating a career in the public and private sectors, his hopes for a restoration of civil civic engagement, and his love of the outdoors (and cookies)! EPISODE 3: VIVEK RAMASWAMY In episode three, Dr. Mansahramani speaks with entrepreneur, one-time stand up comic, and prolific author Vivek Ramaswamy about the American dream and what it was like growing up in Ohio. In addition to exploring the power of annoyance, they discuss the key decisions that took Vivek from the Ivy League to a very successful biotech company (with a stint as a comedian along the way)...and his recent announcement to enter the US Presidential contest as part of his quest to help restore an American identity. EPISODE 2: GENERAL LORI ROBINSON In the second episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with General Lori Robinson, USAF (Ret), a New Hampshire native who served as the Commander of North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD). General Robinson was also America's first female Combatant Commander and served as head of Northern Command. She is an awesome leader, dedicated America who has served the United States for decades, and all around amazing person. She has also faced (and successfully navigated) many forms of uncertainty on her path to becoming a four-star general. EPISODE 1: MIKE ROGERS In the first episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mike Rogers, former chair of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, and former multi-term Congressman from Michigan. Mike served in the military and also fought organized crime as a member of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. He's a class act, a first-rate thinker, and a patriotic American who cares deeply about the United States and its future. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bb3ab5aec9e4879b4243ae0611e1e1d&_e=SbpwHvO8kSHCQvrI8maVQmNYhntoXYsoNXRJ9VdtS482gPaZIQJHs6YskSGDDYzY-CvV-B37WUU1E92Rw4oXrxLqLr4IZbIW8px0r3H6TV-DPXpf1KMWn83eGfOf4HoDvvSS197Sh6LpQB0E1fo_4Qb7mEK9RSeXT88kSoDPzerjWzusHL0BU9ZQY997fxWPYLND9RXusc4-IC-MXH9jZg79wWQEsSjhTqfCvOCpaSAuJ_bOH8yZUvgzbDAibjWx-Mf71IfHRP9Zs-ehpcDj8Qp_BcjL05MF8kzoom-CK5RF2DIcfzqBxbPt7S696RlE9J2HicxR-6eoQ5EyELqKKTPzBCfIdMbSIAXUL61y7hEMuui-P-NEOjwuUGl_TtC049hUY0L-qipXUgLnyKYU6ZknMSqryB8_hVva0G7yzl8rzaOO0vjU68bRdFEfPyLkdXbcF8kH73oxq5mAv1bVT4uqWAhD5RMQVZS2D8cDBiNi9m7DGw6ekfYFm8dG7XqPfRrJusP-pX2Tl2h32jUdWva3yAlBl6CRHNjULBG555w%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I have a quick update for you. I'm being attacked and I need your help. As you've heard, far-left Democrat Colin Allred (pictured below) has announced he is running against me in the race for United States Senate in Texas. Now he has released a shameful video attacking me personally.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5bb3ab5aec9e4879b4243ae0611e1e1d&_e=SbpwHvO8kSHCQvrI8maVQmNYhntoXYsoNXRJ9VdtS482gPaZIQJHs6YskSGDDYzY-CvV-B37WUU1E92Rw4oXrxLqLr4IZbIW8px0r3H6TV-DPXpf1KMWn83eGfOf4HoDvvSS197Sh6LpQB0E1fo_4Qb7mEK9RSeXT88kSoDPzerjWzusHL0BU9ZQY997fxWPYLND9RXusc4-IC-MXH9jZg79wWQEsSjhTqfCvOCpaSAuJ_bOH8yZUvgzbDAibjWx-Mf71IfHRP9Zs-ehpcDj8Qp_BcjL05MF8kzoom-CK5RF2DIcfzqBxbPt7S696RlE9J2HicxR-6eoQ5EyELqKKTPzBCfIdMbSIAXUL61y7hEMuui-P-NEOjwuUGl_TtC049hUY0L-qipXUgLnyKYU6a6YVqYhltQFn5uE5g8TDeooOKBeD8K60MTEtlA-9X760xjiJT-PXUJOfPKw5rUrL4S71Drpwf2T3twHWLUhqgMXTX3EngnohBUKOR1Nju3KHY4V05QZ8__FbP6serm-K97uKpBoBu2nip61Y5f2z34%3D)
---
I'm not impressed with his video. In it he smears me and lies about my record. He also claims I don't care about Texas. It's absurd. clean_body: Colin Allred fumbled his attack on me and Texas values... | | | Fellow Conservative, I have a quick update for you. I'm being attacked and I need your help. As you've heard, far-left Democrat Colin Allred (pictured below) has announced he is running against me in the race for United States Senate in Texas. Now he has released a shameful video attacking me personally. I'm not impressed with his video. In it he smears me and lies about my record. He also claims I don't care about Texas. It's absurd. He talks trash because doesn't want to talk about how he stands with Joe Biden, as Texas gets crushed by far-left DC Democrats... Help me show Democrat Colin Allred that this type of negative hit job won 't fly in Texas by making a right now >> I 'll see you on the campaign trail soon. Thank you! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Donald J. Trump May 4th, 2023
**MEMORANDUM**
**TO:** Interested Parties
**FROM:** Chris LaCivita and Susie Wiles, Donald J. Trump for President 2024
In the last three weeks, polling from a variety of sources, each having a slightly different way of asking the head-to-head ballot question, have each shown the same troubling trend for Ron DeSantis: the complete collapse of his position in the GOP nomination for President, as well as his ability to defeat Joe Biden.
President Trump continues to grow his lead as more and more Americans from across the country are joining his effort to Make America Great Again. Voters recognize there is only one person who, ON DAY ONE, can fix the economy, secure our borders, restore respect for our country on the world stage, and deter the menacing threat that is China.
Recent national polling gives President Trump his widest margin yet over Ron DeSantis, trouncing DeSantis by 36 and 34 points according to [CBS News](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMGOgyAQhp8Gb5hhQMGDh22NyabZXnezNxRo2aISpWv69huaZk8zmX_y5cuvpxi8e7REHgji1ZuNIBL-RhBP4vB1rk-fp47e4LuhXV2JPad4JIjpEe3_64tS2kn7kK-yK0xboWNQ2JbViiM2wKG4tqaxI-LYNKCUstIxOdTKsaGulOCVagrfIiCHCgRruARRIjNcDA6HUY5auYEIMHa7Lc4ssw7mJ633KZbjMhWhvaYUt6dTT7Df970ch222-5Zzgn1eCfYIKGhc7eaNnZPXgcbVT3p90CeM_r6m08lf7pbGJQSatShUFFim894lfSG8O54_KABloPUgLcE6-Pn2bgjvkKFgIJAVa2vi7kPwWy2JgEuuKRv9BQAA___uT3Fa) and [Morning Consult](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7tu6zAYg59G3hzIv64eNJycwEuAri266ZqokSxBVhD47QsXRVfyI0HqXFMMu0LijADu0W0IAJF_COBKzx9v_Pp-vYwP_DmPF87o63DhPwLoe_V_6G_LyWcd06GKy-AUgzDhwauJSwIwY4KHu9LeWC5NsF4ar8U0WwmMecmCDlJyPUQFGAhmmE4zEZieYHKEmgDGCqtlMIhi57dHCa6sOrmv3p65nmzJQ1L33uv2s2lBsOTS1rjebFm3Z-oHgmABDHS8lTrWFrNu--iTtz2WdexN24dvCJahKVdfMaW4cYEovh2_jvx3AAAA__-dFVxy) . [Emerson](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1u6yAQhZ8G74hgjI1ZsLi5kTeRum3VHebHpsGAMFWUt69Io66QON-cbzRqz8G7h0T8jAA2bw4EgPp_CODKzh9v4_X9esE38inwZRzYvaXwHwHUR7Z_6KvlZHflQ_vll87IARwlnZV0nHoAQXrSbVIxLYxgi9Bk4orS0dCFGwFuAm7IoDovgUBPBsKo6DlhJ6CmZ4uDRXOtJrcgRow9bsmZFFUwX7V87_mk094FudWaj-dOM4LZ7rYcKeoUgl1tTiH4uDYSwXzUkuKqcvEBNyGOqvpWiBuHf-PXs3hjI1bR4KcLp4hrUfqGXSptmOFid1X19uIRzF2RJt99CP4YOWJkbZdp6p8AAAD__z6RdC4) finds Trump beating DeSantis 62% to 16%, a 16-point swing towards Trump since February. [Fox News](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kD1vwyAQhn8N3rDOBzbxwNA08hKpa6tufCY02CDjyMm_r4iqbqf3OT13etWcY_BPScSRIF6DLQSRsDeCeObHr4_h_Hk-0Rt8j_Q09HyvFN8J4vbM7n_1z9K6WYVYU3FqrOzRd9A42Q0HhjgCg-YqR69gFEwY7L0GYx0KLYaBASrdGQdNkAjIoAfejUwAb7GzjGuP2gijDl4TDtaVW_I2LSran229z7k1aW6ivG5bLq-fJoLTvu-tT4_F7aVyglPyPpigIs0pxkJw8ulBK38F9KWiZQt1TpkiIKery3cdg1ELzavzbnWLcdS6opYtFFpiyDksl2aVNu8hxlAGQThcahf17G8AAAD__-ttb78) shows Trump dominating DeSantis by 32 percent. In the general election, [Rasmussen](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxckT2P3CAQhn8N7ljhAePdwkXurG1WFyVVojQrDOM1MV9Z8Dn37yM7VopUSM_7MKB3lE_Ojh8daV8IwGRNJgCEfyIAN_Hy_bO8fbv1dGY_LrSXjVi3FF4JQPlI-E89ppzQK-s22vaV6RoYa1ZhV8szB7gwzqqpGzTKs8JWXxQ2OIramJoB0zVrGiVlU9kOGHDWMFFfeMvECWrDxTDCoFutzuNABDOY5ziaGJQzP8tz8emko69cN5WS8v6nK4FrmTDFXLx1DkOwym0WgevwRDXb8KD4W7sl23ekAVeaonM0T3HNdJ9JB1Rl0wZrMNAJlaElHucuGMwqFJtpsXrGQlcbwnYhxbQ49aTvsSDh16X4u1Y-KfsIhPdSiDMnIDfs0djFE94f1e0wx-WpkfA-aHc_uj0iHUPBUP5mdH1Vb_Lxa_7aEJD34KwhvP8P7jvlPWNx-fI2V8_OpNU6Z7NsiWCP7dmtlj8BAAD__-zjqh0) shows President Trump with a commanding 7-point lead over Joe Biden — 48 to 41 percent and the most recent [Harvard/Harris Poll](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxckcGO2yAQhp9mfEuEB4zjgw-7tdytoq3SvbTaC8KA1zTYpoAb5e0rIreHXr8Z_Xz_IGfv7HhvoX4GxMnqCIhAnwDxzJ5_fOXn7-fucCXvzaHjFbvlKX4CxHT35t_qnnI0s7Qu07ordFvhWJLCtCU_UcSGUFJMLTdmZGpQODJClOIN57ypNVenElU11IVtkSAlFWFlQ2vCjlhqyoYRB1UreRoHYESbeF1HvS7S6Z8pbLM_qnUuXDul5OPDqQfsJxl-y6AnGYKNfnUubwH2N39Q65LMkgD7zbtV5tp9fhewJwywf3m5iCcfrMtQnM39zcTNpXj0egTab2kWs9F2m4F2e2ueYVy3oAzQblFO7GfZR0rOXtqPBWiHlDAsD1lJ-GCi1WZJ4lFETDIKKWgl_GqXJJyR-m_A7vwIP_z6dnnt3j_fZwbIxeKsBtr9Bx__STtC3r5cXq9FaLW_Weds5DUw8pG980n-BAAA__8yJqSJ) has President Trump besting Joe Biden by 5.
Why should this trend be troubling for Team DeSantis and his affiliated Super PACs?
Because since April 11th - _Never Back Down_ \- the primary DeSantis Super PAC has spent:
\- Over $1 million on TV in Iowa
\- Nearly $1 million on TV in New Hampshire
\- Over $1.3 million on TV in South Carolina
\- Over $500,000 on TV in Nevada
\- Over $3.5 million on a national network cable buy
In total, _Never Back Down_ has spent more than $7.2 million in TV ads over the last three weeks.
The $7.2 million doesn’t include thousands of pieces of voter contact mail, sent to GOP primary voters in multiple states – including an 8 page “novel” — where the postage costs alone are hundreds of thousands of dollars!
The PAC has sent thousands of texts, spent hundreds of thousands of dollars in digital advertising in just a few states as well as ordering campaign swag that could fill the vacuum of leadership the Governor left in Florida while campaigning (horribly) overseas in Europe.

When Joe Biden came into office, he terminated every successful border policy that was put into place including Remain in Mexico, one of the best of them all, deliberately throwing open the borders and instituting catch and release and resettling untold millions and millions of illegal aliens into the United States. They're now your neighbors. Congratulations.
Now, Joe Biden is preparing to remove the last remnants of my Title 42 policy, just a few weeks from now, wiping out the few remaining shreds of our southern border. Hundreds of thousands of people will pour in that day. And the judge already said that's what's going to happen. This will mean complete and total mayhem and utter lawlessness, and unlimited numbers of fraudulent asylum seekers flood into the United States unchecked.
They are unchecked, nobody has any idea where they come from. They don't know if they're healthy, if they're sick, if they're insane, or if they're coming from prisons. Already, tens of thousands of illegal aliens have massed on the Mexican side of the border. They're getting ready to storm across the moment Title 42, which is so important, is officially gone.
Can you believe they’re getting rid of it?
And when that happens, countless more will charge in from all over the world. They're coming from all over the world. And some of the states like California saying, “come in and we give you free health care, free education.” People hear that from other countries. They say, “well, that sounds good to me.” And they're making a mass charge toward our border. It's absolute lunacy.
It will be a mass resettlement of millions and millions of illegal aliens into your communities. And the invasion will be aided, abetted, and facilitated by the Biden administration every step of the way. Every path they take will be made easier by Biden. Congress should move immediately to choke off and terminate all funding for catch and release.
We should ban Joe Biden and the Communists and the administration from using a single federal taxpayer dollar to set loose illegal aliens into the United States. Now is the time we have to fight to make sure our country survives because our country cannot take two more years of this invasion.
And when I take the oath of office on January 20, 2025, we will immediately begin the process of fully securing the border and removing the illegal aliens Joe Biden has unlawfully allowed to break into our country.
Thank you very much.

Prayer Meeting, Trump Doral May 11 at 7:00pm Eastern with General Flynn, Roger Stone and Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
Christians, Friends and Media, I wanted to personally invite you to join us for a very special event: the Pastors For Trump prayer meeting, taking place on May 11th from 7-9:00pm at the Trump Doral in Miami, Florida. As a member of our community, you know how important it is to come together in prayer and support for our President and our nation. That's why we're bringing together some of the most influential pastors, speakers, and musicians to lead us in a powerful time of worship and prayer. We'll be joined by Jimmy Levy from American Idol, as well as General Flynn, Roger Stone and David and Stacy Whited from Flyover Conservatives. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to stand with fellow believers and pray for our nation and its leaders. And what better place to do it than at the luxurious Trump Doral resort? Don't miss out on this incredible event. Space is limited so please click the link below to reserve your spot today (there are no walk-ins allowed). subject: My reaction to conservatives who attended the WHCD
body:
and why they SHOULDN'T have gone | | | | | |
---

|

|

# Why conservatives shouldn’t have attended the White House Correspondents Dinner ...
I talked about this last week on Instagram (watch [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a9db2e09e7&e=f6564bbe3b)) and then after seeing who attended this weekend, spoke extensively about it on my podcast on Monday. Listen to the full episode [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fca7bd7f08&e=f6564bbe3b).
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1cc17c7e1d&e=f6564bbe3b)
Also have a brand new episode today with the former spokesperson of the State Department, Morgan Ortagus. I’ve known Morgan a long time, but didn’t know that she competed in pageants through college. Also learned a lot about her career and how she got expertise in countries around the world. Make sure to check it out [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b6ce82ea6f&e=f6564bbe3b).
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8ed30f5d8e&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
# My trip to Florida...
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
I was down in Florida over the weekend meeting so many great grassroots supporters of the Republican Party. It’s through work like theirs that we will win in 2024.
I love getting the chance to travel and help raise money for County and local parties, if you’ve got a group that might need some help, send me an email at contact@seanspicer.com.
|
---
# Stories I’m Reading...
[Prosecutors near charging decision in Hunter Biden case](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=789f808f8d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Post
[Is the Debt Limit Constitutional? Biden Aides Are Debating It](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d841f9793d&e=f6564bbe3b). — via New York Times
[Hunter Biden must answer more questions about his finances and art sales in paternity case, judge says](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=23dd3d8786&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CNN Politics
[DHS will slow legal immigration work to handle border surge](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=67521146a0&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Times
[NBC’s Todd Claims Scientific Research Proves There’s More Than Two Genders](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=cb4f3b7804&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NewsBusters
[The secret delegate battle that will decide the 2024 Republican nominee](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=813aa4a57f&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Vox
[RNC Chairwoman: ‘China Is Running This White House’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dd461f7f1c&e=f6564bbe3b) — via DailyWire
[Biden Begins Reelection Bid at Low Point in His Presidency](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=27a0f19162&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Gallup

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b80fb8fc3e&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.

name: Ryan Deeter
subject: an abortion ban in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.

| Peter,

This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature are passing an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours.

**Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.**

[_**Will you rush a split contribution to the North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus and Fight for Progress today to help us fight back against Republican extremism?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62803466/404611693/-521271168?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230504-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDNkOGUxLWIzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=patLm9N6NIjJAqpqY109jBU5Lq9u2tHEXpZLvQbJN_Y=)
---
| [SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62803467/404611694/-521271168?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230504-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDNkOGUxLWIzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=patLm9N6NIjJAqpqY109jBU5Lq9u2tHEXpZLvQbJN_Y=)
---
This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until late Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda.

North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent.

We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state.

[_**Will you split a contribution between the North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus and Fight for Progress to join our fight to protect abortion rights in North Carolina?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62803468/404611695/-521271168?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230504-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMDNkOGUxLWIzZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=patLm9N6NIjJAqpqY109jBU5Lq9u2tHEXpZLvQbJN_Y=)

clean_body: Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back. | Peter, This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature are passing an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours. Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back. = | = This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until late Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda. North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent. We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with us, Ryan Deeter Executive Director, North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Peter, as the 2024 Presidential Election draws nearer, the stakes for our nation's future have never been higher.

Donald Trump spent four years nearly destroying our democracy, spreading hatred and division, and even inciting a deadly insurrection.

**And to top it off, he's now been indicted or is under investigation for multiple crimes in both federal and state courts.**

In short: Trump is too dangerous and unfit to serve as our commander-in-chief.

On the other hand, President Biden entered the oval office with a multitude of crises. The raging COVID pandemic, a broken economy, and our democracy in peril put our nation on edge by Trump’s extreme policies.

But that didn’t stop Joe from rolling up his sleeves to build America back.

His efforts have resulted in a stronger, more hopeful America today. And he’s delivering on his bold agenda. But all of this could be undone by a Trump re-election.

That’s why the potential 2024 rematch between Trump and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for.

It's time to ask ourselves: who do we want leading our country? Who will stand up for our values and protect the progress we've made?

**We must act now to show our support for President Biden and his bold agenda. That's why we're urgently polling voters in your area and counting on you to respond.**
Who will you vote for in 2024?

subject: Join me in REJECTING the House’s PAY RAISE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
Stop The Taxpayer Theft! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba6d608d0040/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-5810729?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=fb3c234440&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | I just learned that the Democrat-controlled House made a backroom deal in December that amounts to an annual $34,000 pay raise for each Representative.

**House Representatives are now able to claim an automatic reimbursement of $258 a night for lodging expenses and $79 a day for meals in DC** _**even if they didn’t spend such money on hotel stays or meals. **_

This pay raise for politicians will cost Americans almost $15 million dollars each year!

Meanwhile 70% of the nation's firefighters save lives as volunteers. Student teachers learn their craft in helping our students grow academically without pay. Young adults cannot afford to purchase homes. Families are struggling to put food on the table.
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=31a6e5c433&e=d6699466fe)
---
| While inflation continues at the highest levels in 40 years, the governing body of Democrats who were responsible for establishing a national budget took advantage of their position in Congress on the dime of American taxpayers.

They passed this measure in December without a debate or vote, and with no oversight from any other body of government.

It’s time to set the record straight and let every House member know that we oppose sneaky backroom deals that enrich politicians at the cost of American taxpayers! [**Peter, join me in telling HOUSE members that we REJECT their self-serving PAY RAISE:**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=e92575c079&e=d6699466fe)

name: Team Pramila
subject: It’s time to get dark money out of our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.
#
**Peter, it’s time to get dark money out of our elections.**
Since the Supreme Court ruling in _Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission_ , we’ve seen the influence of political spending and dark money increase drastically in our elections.
**That’s why Pramila introduced the We The People Amendment to finally kneecap corporate political spending.** By stipulating that the First Amendment applies only to “natural persons” rather than corporations, this amendment would effectively reverse the U.S. Supreme Court’s final ruling in 2010.
**Peter, if we want to make sure our upcoming elections are free of dark money and accurately represent the voice of the people, we need to overturn _Citizens United_ and support the We The People Amendment. [Add your name today to build momentum and power for our fight to end the influence of dark money in our elections. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230504-2444&t=1&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230504-2444&t=2&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)**
**Corporations are not people, and money is not speech****, Peter.** And in every cycle since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision, we’ve seen more and more special interests pour dark money into campaigns across the country. This has to stop.
Through television, radio, and digital ads, interest groups have been able to spend an unruly amount of money to influence our elections. An estimated $8.9 billion dollars was spent during the 2022 midterms making it the most expensive Congressional election cycle. And Super PACs have infiltrated our politics to disregard campaign finance laws and ethics.
We can no longer ignore the immense growth of corporate power and corrupt political influence from the endless sums of dark money in our elections. **And as a champion of the people, Pramila understands how vital preserving the integrity of our elections is to ensuring that our democracy accurately reflects our country.**
Pramila is committed to breaking down the pillars of injustice that have upheld our government for far too long. And the We The People Amendment is the systemic and tangible solution that matches the urgency of this moment.
[**Sign on to our petition today to support Pramila as she fights for us in Congress and finally end the predatory influence of dark money in our elections.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230504-2444&t=3&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-we-the-people-amendment-petition/?source=em20230504-2444&t=4&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230504-2444-footer&t=5&refcode2=2444_420207_x8i3HO&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2444%2E420207%2Ex8i3HO)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In less than two weeks, 13 million Americans may be in serious danger, and we can stop it.
body:
12 days to crucial special elections!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td95c8308-1490-44a0-a095-695d96711d07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[In less than two weeks 13 million Americans may be in serious danger, and we can stop it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63aee2fa-01c2-4413-8f77-0c55db036b99/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _Some of our biggest midterm victories were in Pennsylvania. Democratic Governor Josh Shapiro. Senator John Fetterman._ **_We even, unexpectedly, took back the state house by a 101-100 margin, _****_creating opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better. Yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics like Silicon Valley Bank, don't recognize state lines. _****_With PA the fifth most populous state, bordering big states such as New York, New Jersey & Ohio, what happens there will help or harm a large percentage of Americans._** [_**That's why, with special elections for two open state house seats in PA on May 16th--ONLY 12 DAYS AWAY--we absolutely can't let Repubicans win.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8df17fd-3bf0-4fb4-9a62-80586e471c29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Remember that 101-100 margin? If the GOP takes both seats they'll have a 102-101 margin, we'll lose the state house and with it any ability to pass good policy on abortion rights, voting, gun safety, climate, LGBTQ rights and much more. It'd be a disaster. A direct attack on our liberty.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb83ee251-32d1-43f7-b30d-b76bd091b8fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrat Heather Boyd's been clear that "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is THE reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn's said he'll block permitless carry of guns to protect our children. Both of their GOP opponents will give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. They'll join efforts to attack our democracy._ [**_We can't let this happen, or millions of children, women, Americans in general, will suffer. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to expand our rights, instead of letting MAGA Republicans force policies on us that nearly ended our republic?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1d44100-beee-4599-8106-6bcaac5fb268/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/paspecialelectionsinlessthantwoweeks-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b148c8b-0191-4e83-9603-1ba710e13282/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It'd be a disaster. A direct attack on our liberty. Democrat Heather Boyd's been clear that "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is THE reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn's said he'll block permitless carry of guns to protect our children. Both of their GOP opponents will give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. They'll join efforts to attack our democracy. Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Andy Kim
subject: Deeply out of touch with what it means to be a public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
We deserve to have leaders and institutions that we can trust. In fact, our democracy depends on it.

Unfortunately, Justice Clarence Thomas has repeatedly betrayed this trust.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-04-thomas&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=facd152f-b6ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-05-04-thomas&recurring=0&amount=5&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=facd152f-b6ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

The revelation that a billionaire has been paying for lavish vacations for Justice Thomas and his family members to attend private school profoundly damages Americans' trust in the Court. Americans need to know that justice, justices, and Supreme Court rulings can't be bought.

As public servants, our ultimate responsibility is to prioritize the well-being of those we serve. We are expected to uphold ethical standards and serve with integrity, putting the needs of people above any personal interests or outside favors.

Justice Thomas either knows better and doesn't care, or he is utterly oblivious to what it means to be a public servant, or even worse, both.

Regardless of the reasons behind Justice Thomas's actions, his brazen disregard for ethical standards is unacceptable and cannot be ignored.

It's high time that Justice Thomas is held accountable for his actions and the damage he has caused.

More soon,

Andy

body:
Our nation has surpassed 200 mass shootings for 2023 – and it's only May.
| | |
---

---
**I urgently need you to confirm that you're still standing with me in this fight, Peter:**

---
Peter, our nation has surpassed 200 mass shootings for 2023 – _and it's only May._ If this year follows the trend of 2020, 2021, and 2022, **the number of mass shootings will surpass 600 by New Year's Eve.**
How many mass shootings will our nation have to suffer through before we decide that enough is finally enough? How many children killed in their classrooms, parents killed at grocery stores, and loved ones killed in places of worship will it take before we _finally_ get assault weapons off the streets of America?
**Politicians who are in the pocket of the gun lobby may be waiting to see where our nation's breaking point is, but I _refuse_ to sit here and let the next tragedy roll by without action. **That's why I have spent my entire career fighting to end the gun violence epidemic – and, through programs like my gun buyback initiative in New York, we have already gotten _thousands_ of guns off the street.
**Peter, I will never stop fighting to protect my people, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why, in the face of this latest poll, I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to tell me where they stand on the gun violence epidemic.**

So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action?

clean_body: Our nation has surpassed 200 mass shootings for 2023 – and it's only May. | | | | | BREAKING via Monmouth poll: "Drop in Assault Weapon Ban Support" I urgently need you to confirm that you're still standing with me in this fight, Peter: | | | | Peter, our nation has surpassed 200 mass shootings for 2023 – and it's only May. If this year follows the trend of 2020, 2021, and 2022, the number of mass shootings will surpass 600 by New Year's Eve. How many mass shootings will our nation have to suffer through before we decide that enough is finally enough? How many children killed in their classrooms, parents killed at grocery stores, and loved ones killed in places of worship will it take before we finally get assault weapons off the streets of America? Politicians who are in the pocket of the gun lobby may be waiting to see where our nation's breaking point is, but I refuse to sit here and let the next tragedy roll by without action. That's why I have spent my entire career fighting to end the gun violence epidemic – and, through programs like my gun buyback initiative in New York, we have already gotten thousands of guns off the street. Peter, I will never stop fighting to protect my people, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like you to stand with me. That’s why, in the face of this latest poll, I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to tell me where they stand on the gun violence epidemic. So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action? | | | | | | Thank you, Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Barack Obama
subject: This is how real change happens, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team,

Last month, Wisconsin voters resoundingly elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz, a fair-minded justice, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court by a commanding margin. **It was an incredibly important victory for our democracy – and I couldn’t be more proud that A.G. Holder and the NDRC helped make it possible.**

For more than a decade, Republicans have relied on anti-democratic tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to hold onto power in Wisconsin. The NDRC has tried to change that, making Wisconsin a top priority.

Since 2018, the NDRC has helped break total Republican control of Wisconsin's government – successfully mobilizing Wisconsin voters and advocates, investing in democracy defenders and champions of fair maps running for office, and supporting fair-minded candidates for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. And now Judge Protasiewicz’s victory broke Republican control of the state’s supreme court for the first time in 15 years.

All of these victories add up. This is what progress and protecting democracy looks like.

**I’ve often said that real change happens one person and one community at a time – and we’re seeing that in Wisconsin. By donating to the NDRC today, you can take concrete action to help continue strengthening our democracy nationwide. Will you contribute today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Congressman Dwight Evans
subject: Giving voice to the underserved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Voting rights are the glue to our democracy.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62808450/404620686/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230504Evans_N_DE_90DO_5_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODdiOWRkLWI4ZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OmabCiSajS5KagHPBUg2A-lPtW0RtnlUjHCFNE816pM=)
| Team, it’s Congressman Dwight Evans.

I have dedicated my life to the cause of urban renewal, working to give a voice to those who too often live in the shadows, the poor and underserved.

One of the biggest obstacles in this fight – by far – is voter suppression. The GOP have attacked our freedom to vote for years — including restricting mail ballot drop boxes, preventing election officials from sending absentee ballots, and disenfranchising voters for the smallest errors.

That’s why I’m asking you to support the New Pennsylvania Project. **Their constant, year-round work to empower our Commonwealth’s underserved and historically underrepresented communities to overcome these attacks is vital to rebuilding our communities and defending our democracy.** **[Will you consider pitching in $10 today to help them expand the electorate and protect our voting rights?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62808451/404620687/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230504Evans_N_DE_90DO_5_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODdiOWRkLWI4ZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OmabCiSajS5KagHPBUg2A-lPtW0RtnlUjHCFNE816pM=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62808452/404620688/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230504Evans_N_DE_90DO_5_NG_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODdiOWRkLWI4ZWEtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OmabCiSajS5KagHPBUg2A-lPtW0RtnlUjHCFNE816pM=) Voting is the foundation of our democracy. _Doing my best Adele album cover impression!_ Hello, friend, it’s me, Susie Lee. What do Adele and I have in common? It’s _(unfortunately)_ not our singing voices. We’re both current Las Vegas residents...well, Adele’s only staying a year. I’ve been here for three wonderful decades! **I have some quick campaign updates for you – but I know those can be a little dull, so I threw in a few Adele references. Read on:** I’m not going to sit here and tell you we’re in the middle of a __Skyfall.__ But the honest truth is that NV-03 is the most competitive district in Nevada, and one of the most competitive in the nation. **__Rumor Has It_ _that the GOP is desperate to unseat me because I’m an unapologetic defender of public education, voting rights, and working families.** They came very close last November and spent millions to boost my right-wing opponent; in fact, I won with one of the narrowest margins of victory of any Democrat nationwide. That may be __Water Under the Bridge__ for now, but national Republicans want revenge – and I can be sure they’re not going to make any of this __Easy on Me__ : **The NRCC has already named me as a top target for 2024.** We need to start __Turning Tables__ to prove that we’re ready for their underhanded tactics, but I can’t do it without __Someone Like You__. [**So please,__All I Ask__ is that you pitch in $5, $10, or $15 to help us build up a winning campaign operation and keep NV-03 bright, bright blue. clean_body: | | | = Doing my best Adele album cover impression! Hello, friend, it’s me, Susie Lee. What do Adele and I have in common? It’s (unfortunately) not our singing voices. We’re both current Las Vegas residents...well, Adele’s only staying a year. I’ve been here for three wonderful decades! I have some quick campaign updates for you – but I know those can be a little dull, so I threw in a few Adele references. Read on: I’m not going to sit here and tell you we’re in the middle of a Skyfall. But the honest truth is that NV-03 is the most competitive district in Nevada, and one of the most competitive in the nation. Rumor Has It that the GOP is desperate to unseat me because I’m an unapologetic defender of public education, voting rights, and working families. They came very close last November and spent millions to boost my right-wing opponent; in fact, I won with one of the narrowest margins of victory of any Democrat nationwide. That may be Water Under the Bridge for now, but national Republicans want revenge – and I can be sure they’re not going to make any of this Easy on Me : The NRCC has already named me as a top target for 2024. We need to start Turning Tables to prove that we’re ready for their underhanded tactics, but I can’t do it without Someone Like You. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . name: Team Gillibrand
subject: The latest from Fox News:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Take a look at the latest headline from Fox News:
Lee Zeldin nearly won New York's governor's race in November, all while New York Republicans had their best election cycle in two decades — flipping enough House seats red to retake the majority. Now, the GOP is targeting Kirsten for defeat to turn New York red and deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell.
Make no mistake: GOP megadonors will POUR money into the state to prop up Lee Zeldin and defeat Kirsten. That's why it's critical to reach our $50,000 rapid-response goal by midnight, but we're still coming up SERIOUSLY short.
Please, rush a donation to help us reach our rapid-response goal, keep New York blue and save our Democratic Senate majority.
Lee Zeldin is an extremist Republican whose voting record is out-of-step with New Yorkers:
- He called on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v Wade , and voted to defund Planned Parenthood
- He voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election
- He voted against universal background checks, despite the fact that an overwhelming majority of Americans support the requirement
- He voted against a bipartisan bill to lower prescription drug costs
- And he voted against the Equality Act , which would protect the LGBTQ community from discrimination
Not to mention, he just endorsed Donald Trump for president last week.
New York can no longer be considered a “safe” blue state. Lee Zeldin and extremist Republicans proved that in 2022.
Kirsten refuses to accept a single cent from corporate PACs—she's relying on grassroots support from folks like you to defeat MAGA Republicans like Zeldin and keep her must-win seat blue. That's why we set a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight to show the full strength of this grassroots campaign, but we're still way short, and time is running out.
Please, will you rush $5 or more now to help us reach our critical rapid-response goal, keep New York blue and defend the Senate for Democrats?
Thank you for stepping up when it matters most.
-Team Gillibrand
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Working Families Party
subject: Bernie Sanders is endorsing Helen Gym for Philadelphia mayor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This is big news, Peter. | | | We have big news, Peter. **Bernie Sanders is endorsing Helen Gym in her race for mayor of Philadelphia!** Bernie joins U.S. Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Pramila Jaypal, Jamaal Bowman, Greg Casar, and a growing movement of grassroots leaders and organizations backing her campaign. Some of the biggest fighters for working people all agree that Helen is THE candidate to bring _real_ , _transformative_ , and _enduring_ change to one of the biggest cities in the country. With just twelve days to go, Helen needs you on board too. [**Can you split a donation between Helen’s campaign and WFP to fuel our organizing efforts, and make sure every voter knows why Bernie Sanders, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, and more are all-in to make her the next mayor of Philadelphia?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUYy_mOdGyzw8BBfNNVruTBqJ0mC5CWKGRY_tN-nSwHed3vJxfTx2PTLAzRh_IRec-8NtM1-45Vkmfvt0VTyW7Ia3rFku9O1Q1tEnd9ox-bgrXHYzUQtk7XwgOuDR34RoMyRBS5M-IN5u8MY8jcctzUUaomxeWn_6YYoidfFUUORvku72mDA4Vyz66hq_maNdsCb-O2a2e3TT5D-bNMfRj3v0WzInRVcfGP_OMx8Z0rO_m3uVYOeatlVSptd0a0_LzG-5d4LIOmsktJihilqB08TSg24b0AYi3GiEhvQfjW9QVyiMpPd_Hh-fI5QHeGquOUY9QvqJW1Jjno_lqSDyhrsEveR2uo106HtpJfZ5njVqKmkdbD-B6LRYj8Q0DkUf0/3vw/huXGs6bBR1ymcWnVJ-dekA/h0/t6oBaoaKO2gFANmczc3FQvkTAq0130SoK7IgelEAVCI) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUYy_mOdGyzw8BBfNNVruTBqJ0mC5CWKGRY_tN-nSwHed3vJxfTx2PTLAzRh_IRec-j0MnNiwS9t1NNtW1eooGiY9pvzNQB3FOFp2CjTvS_HHR33bF-r_HBpENFKPJKFhR3q0Oz-sYayCXTb9NJH8nAyB7R8tDzSIE7e4DeEoC0xpaVhYq0-7gJ3ebYLeQcqMUUUIAnum5X8_OQlPQf5u3fWOAYqGgdhon_UoObTE4CCHQNMlF_yOIQeqXATCR9zUuS_FHLrNzMn1l7B8ZvK7GAGe2Xsv870CWaDAfUKytvXvEMfJaFZtQgywoCvxes087iTnq_PVaRyblciqO4IA6AjeXxKyPy5zB1zQJpEG5rNiwYD43iPXyFL53uWaPnNew/3vw/huXGs6bBR1ymcWnVJ-dekA/h1/pdrXx_92p8GUoCcaPDca1AogJc2tMt5J3LLlxys5TrA)** Helen wants Philadelphia to lead the nation in local, transformative policy-making that supports youth, houses neighbors, empowers workers, and provides communities with all of the resources they need to thrive. **But the challenges of this election still remain the same:** Helen’s running in a crowded Democratic primary field, and the latest polls have her in a five-way tie — which means we have to ramp up our get-out-the-vote plans fast. Some of her opponents even have GOP mega donors backing them, like billionaire Jeffrey Yass, who’s already pouring an eye-popping amount of dark money into TV ads falsely attacking Helen. But while deep-pocketed donors and outside groups spend a fortune trying to buy this election and advance their corporate agendas — **Helen has dedicated supporters like you on her side who believe in her vision for a government that has working people’s backs.** [**With just twelve days left until Election Day, can we count on you to split a donation between Helen Gym’s campaign and WFP to help us pull off this major victory?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUYy_mOdGyzw8BBfNNVruTBqJ0mC5CWKGRY_tN-nSwHed3vJxfTx2PTLAzRh_IRec-tCc7o_jmpuvUJDwnpCKYi2dPtyb2v5EzfGoxeBknRxosP-4Myop3Q6OVKcEal99v578idL3iziUwME3dU8hVqTTuYEqyO4rONH3bWuHQi7q0WjyKLWhOC89Qgp5tEkbYzctXcuCvFNa7Cu-HhEBgsZwSJt4tJYIkYN0YGlEo_D7PQT7zNRunXc5aTFZHtzDPxqSogAmUNPFEFDhkjnLHPZCFe4155cG7gcuRd0zfia2f_BGfQCGqu7sSRZvlKSOmlgbNynHuyKq3MA9x6jeSnqT_GPI0TxYUXT4BKJoFMHkjyAfDgnPPctumLBKk49b2/3vw/huXGs6bBR1ymcWnVJ-dekA/h2/h8hLSart1fNH6MfdniK11KG6bEnplcP1BRpwxoVfK8I)**** clean_body: This is big news, Peter. | | | We have big news, Peter. Bernie Sanders is endorsing Helen Gym in her race for mayor of Philadelphia! Bernie joins U.S. Representatives Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Pramila Jaypal, Jamaal Bowman, Greg Casar, and a growing movement of grassroots leaders and organizations backing her campaign. Some of the biggest fighters for working people all agree that Helen is THE candidate to bring real , transformative , and enduring change to one of the biggest cities in the country. With just twelve days to go, Helen needs you on board too. Helen wants Philadelphia to lead the nation in local, transformative policy-making that supports youth, houses neighbors, empowers workers, and provides communities with all of the resources they need to thrive. But the challenges of this election still remain the same: Helen’s running in a crowded Democratic primary field, and the latest polls have her in a five-way tie — which means we have to ramp up our get-out-the-vote plans fast. Some of her opponents even have GOP mega donors backing them, like billionaire Jeffrey Yass, who’s already pouring an eye-popping amount of dark money into TV ads falsely attacking Helen. But while deep-pocketed donors and outside groups spend a fortune trying to buy this election and advance their corporate agendas — Helen has dedicated supporters like you on her side who believe in her vision for a government that has working people’s backs. ** Our GOTV efforts depend on the resources we’re able to put behind them — and we still have a lot of door-knocking, texting, and phonebanking to do between now and May 16 to elect Helen as Philadelphia’s next mayor. Together, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

body:
sign our letter by midnight >>
| **BREAKING: Four Proud Boys Found Guilty of Seditious Conspiracy** This is HUGE! Four members of the far-right extremist Proud Boys group were just found GUILTY for their role in the deadly January 6 insurrection.

**Donald Trump and the MAGA mob are SEETHING over this news — they know they can no longer get away with their treasonous crimes!**

[**So we’re sending an urgent letter to the Proud Boys to condemn their attack on our Capitol and tell them good riddance! We only have 100 signature spots available, so confirm yours by MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44543?t=6&akid=7505%2E878179%2EO3rOLN) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44543?t=7&akid=7505%2E878179%2EO3rOLN)
---

**TO:** Proud Boys
**FROM:** An elated Democrat Willis
**SUBJECT:** A victory for our democracy!

**_To the Proud Boys — we’re THRILLED you were finally found guilty!_**

**Donald Trump’s violent attempt to overturn President Biden’s 2020 victory was a horrific, unacceptable attack on our democracy.**

Now that you’re _finally_ being held accountable, we’re one step closer to seeking justice for the deadly January 6 insurrection and stopping Trump for good!

[**So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to condemn your vile actions and to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will defend our democracy and stand up to MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44543?t=8&akid=7505%2E878179%2EO3rOLN) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44543?t=9&akid=7505%2E878179%2EO3rOLN)
---
X A PROUD DEMOCRAT
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Mariah Morgan
subject: Not the North Carolina I know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-rr?refcode=230503-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-rr?refcode=230503-email]Peter,
The North Carolina State Legislature has officially passed a bill further restricting access to abortion. I’m reaching out today not only as Wiley’s Finance Director, but as a woman and a North Carolinian.
For decades, women have fought for the right to make their own choices about their bodies. But now, in a post-Roe world, we’re facing a dark and uncertain time where these hard-won rights are being steadily taken away. It's heartbreaking to see our voices silenced and our bodies controlled by politicians who don't know us, our struggles, or our needs.
This bill will severely limit women's access to reproductive healthcare. It puts a ban on abortions after 12 weeks of pregnancy, a 20-week ban in cases of rape or incest, and a 24-week ban for life limiting diagnoses.
Women seeking an abortion after the first trimester for one of the approved circumstances will be forced to see an ultrasound and have a 72-hour counseling session ahead of the procedure. As if the trauma they went through wasn't enough.
Wiley has stood with North Carolina Democrats against this bill, and he will keep fighting for us to have autonomy over their own bodies. Chip in to his campaign today to help him keep up the fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-rr?refcode=230503-email]
The fact that this bill passed at all is alarming, but the fact that it passed so quickly and easily truly shows just how little the representatives in North Carolina care about my rights and the rights of my fellow North Carolinian women. This is a huge step backwards for reproductive rights, and it is past time to take action.
If you’ve been waiting to get involved in our race, take today’s decision as a sign that now is the time. We must support pro-choice leaders at every level of government. We need fierce defenders of reproductive rights, and representatives who will fight for women to make their own decisions about their bodies and their futures. Wiley has and will continue to fight to protect the right to choose and ensure that every woman has access to the healthcare she needs.
But we can't do this alone. Can you rush in a donation today to help fund our grassroots efforts, reach voters, and make sure that our voices are heard and our values are being fought for? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2305-q2-wn-rr?refcode=230503-email]
Today's decision does not reflect the North Carolina I know and love. These representatives do not reflect the values I stand for. We need to ensure that this dark time in our state’s history, where women’s bodies are controlled by the government and their lives and livelihoods are in danger, is not the longterm story we tell.
Thank you for your support.
Mariah Morgan
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
