[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62813958/404627724/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2RjYWY5ZS1iZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysYl6_fgdSUu66SS1EtULQIxnVbW1-rCUY87O5yrNCQ=&emci=f93b9f8a-c7e9-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=73dcaf9e-bfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter — The list of Republicans who could be gearing up to try and flip Tammy Baldwin’s Senate seat in Wisconsin just keeps on growing. Let us bring you up to speed:

**FIRST:** The National Review named Paul Ryan as a potential Republican challenger. Yep, the former Speaker of the House who helped usher Trump’s MAGA agenda through Congress and even tried to cut Social Security.

**THEN:** Sheriff David Clarke Jr. confirmed he is strongly considering running, too. In case you haven’t heard of him, here’s what you need to know: he supported Steve Bannon’s scam to “build the wall,” defended January 6 insurrectionists, **and is so extreme that he was even banned from Fox News!**

**NOW:** Far-right Congressman Tom Tiffany is just the latest to reveal that he could be preparing to run for this seat. From denying the outcome of the 2020 election to signaling support for his support of the GOP’s dangerous nationwide abortion ban bill, he is about as extreme as they come.

No matter who challenges Tammy, there’s no way they have a record of fighting for hard-working families the way she does. But one thing they will have? Unlimited dark money from shady Republican super PACs and right-wing mega donors. That’s why we’re asking:

[**_Will you split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign? With MAGA-extreme candidates lining up to run for Senate, we need all the resources we can get to hold onto this seat and protect control of the Senate._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62813959/404627725/2063583167?refcode=20230504.2_TB_5H&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2RjYWY5ZS1iZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysYl6_fgdSUu66SS1EtULQIxnVbW1-rCUY87O5yrNCQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Sender: Colin Allred
Date: 05/03/2023
Subject: I’m running

Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?** [Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cRYguM6dPmz-ie5ttM77WmgAPmVIfjRQ-iU_VXXnWFVW4V6L6JpK3K-9fTyVcecZJ2OrV5Hd3oLERW-eAzZaMXB9_RtrtgMp6CqHrboIiLywAJPVxXCKcmEsG7ORCluOusPCXGUhTrMvty3P1DQWwevtzHTw7c8PCHM3gBVOwrkyo37imIt6SAfBuefaiyJn0WwuV0rW_EVWuFwAgwjDFw4OMXOMpRXNw82hkDjJkfcbe6ROi5xWTPzPZp_5bt12Pl0-0nAlTkBpOGMvIFutkcVflL4Az_6o_9M3kC5nOi_ZKOa6ARj4FvfZBKLfCA6pmfeWV_ap_UDI6v9s7KPxNqg/3vw/z5RnJH_NTDmm0lCfeEJJcw/h11/okujs3NSs7qpFP7xLDaPOjAdQlMGJP2opGVU0Ekmaqs)

name: Team AOC
subject: Tax the Rich.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Meet the union cooperative behind our campaign store.
#
All of Alexandria’s merchandise is **made in the USA and printed by a 100% union supply chain.** Today, we wanted to introduce you to Kevin O’Brien, co-founder of the worker-owned union cooperative that prints Alexandria’s Tax the Rich Collection:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18217?utm_source=em20230504-4269&t=1&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)
_“I’ve been in the garment industry since 1995, but I joined my first union in 2001. The project ended in 2004 and I worked in the industry for another decade as a non-union worker making and distributing union merchandise. Over the years, I have seen the worst of the worst of how non-union corporate print shops and warehouses are run — from wage theft and toxic chemicals, to rampant bullying and harassment._
_Right now, [Worx Printing Cooperative] is working with so many agents of change like the Amazon Labor Union, Starbucks Workers United, [Ben & Jerry’s] Scoopers United, UNITE HERE!, Working Families Party, DSA, and the broader labor and cooperative communities._
_Every person at Worx is a member of the United Steelworkers Union, a vital partner in our commitment to civil, human, and workers’ rights.**The United Steelworkers have revived the modern union co-operative movement in the US, and we’re lucky that we have joined with others like AOC who see the value in that.** Ethical labor and high quality is at the center of everything we do — from our worker owners to our environmental impact._
_When we say ‘Tax the Rich’, it also means that we need to recognize the essential role that working people play in creating wealth. Everyone should see the benefits of the successful business they help to create._
_**[Stand not just with AOC, but the Labor and Cooperative movements with your purchase — and directly support a worker-owned, union cooperative.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18217?utm_source=em20230504-4269&t=2&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)”**_
**[Shop the Tax the Rich Collection→](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18217?utm_source=em20230504-4269&t=3&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18216?t=4&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)
Thank you for standing with fair wages and the direct support of American businesses.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/https%3A//shop.ocasiocortez.com/collections/tax-the-rich/%3Futm_campaign%3Demail%26amp%3Butm_source%3Dem%7B%7B%20date%20%7D%7D-%7B%7Bmailing_id%7D%7D?refcode=em20230504-4269-P_MER_MER_MER&t=5&refcode2=4269_2526796_4LwosC&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230504-4269-P_MER_MER_MER&t=6&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=4269%2E2526796%2E4LwosC)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Over the years, I have seen the worst of the worst of how non-union corporate print shops and warehouses are run — from wage theft and toxic chemicals, to rampant bullying and harassment. Right now, [Worx Printing Cooperative] is working with so many agents of change like the Amazon Labor Union, Starbucks Workers United, [Ben & Jerry’s] Scoopers United, UNITE HERE!, Working Families Party, DSA, and the broader labor and cooperative communities. Every person at Worx is a member of the United Steelworkers Union, a vital partner in our commitment to civil, human, and workers’ rights.The United Steelworkers have revived the modern union co-operative movement in the US, and we’re lucky that we have joined with others like AOC who see the value in that. Ethical labor and high quality is at the center of everything we do — from our worker owners to our environmental impact. When we say ‘Tax the Rich’, it also means that we need to recognize the essential role that working people play in creating wealth. Everyone should see the benefits of the successful business they help to create. ” Thank you for standing with fair wages and the direct support of American businesses. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

2023 is off to a great start!
It's been a busy but incredible beginning to 2023.
We're excited to share a few of the highlights with you.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/7txcochair [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/7txcochair]
Congresswoman Escobar was one of only 7 people chosen by the President to help lead his re-election efforts. The Congresswoman ". . . was floored but obviously honored, thrilled, and excited when the president called me on Sunday. " Her role as Co-Chair puts El Paso at the forefront of this high-stakes election.
Help Veronica Campaign Nationally [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/7txcochair]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/4%20El%20Paso%20use.jpg]
"From new electric vehicles to airport upgrades and renovations, the investments we’ve seen in our community from the federal level have been historic," said Congresswoman Escobar during Department of Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg's visit and tour of the El Paso International Airport.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023castnerrange [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023castnerrange]
For centuries, the Castner Range has been a meaningful part of our heritage. Its designation as a national monument was a top priority of Congresswoman Escobar's when she was first elected, and we did it!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dc_fellowship [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dc_fellowship]
We can't forget our amazing Frontera Fellows! We will share more about our new class of interns for this paid summer fellowship. Stay tuned!
Chip in to Support Our Paid Frontera Fellowship Program [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dc_fellowship]
Congresswoman Escobar is a strong voice for El Paso. Her leadership on the national stage is exactly what we need during this critical election.

Veronica Escobar for Congress
P. O. Box 3961
El Paso, TX 79923
United States

name: Michael Bennet
subject: May the 4th Be With You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
It’s Star Wars Day |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62814954/404631368/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFkODQwMi1jM2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r1DYgcyNg02M2P9Ysn2NYsIvrbYDZLIeqIy215f0pOM=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62814955/404631369/-1033990360?refcode=X_050423_May_4_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDFkODQwMi1jM2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r1DYgcyNg02M2P9Ysn2NYsIvrbYDZLIeqIy215f0pOM=) Hey team, Michael here. As someone who loves the original Star Wars movies, I couldn't help but think about this Yoda quote from The Empire Strikes Back today on May the 4th — Star Wars Day: _"__Always with you what cannot be done. Hear you nothing that I say?...You must unlearn what you have learned....Try not. Do. Or do not. There is no try."_ We know what we have to do. On January 6th, 2021, our country faced one of its darkest days. Defending and strengthening our democracy against the dark forces of tyranny is the urgent work of our lifetimes. And the lesson of Star Wars is that freedom is always worth the fight — even if the odds can sometimes feel like **3,720 to 1. ** As Republican politicians across the country work hard to roll back the voting rights of millions of Americans, especially people of color, we have to stand for democracy. As they roll back reproductive rights for millions of women, we have to stand for freedom. **And we have to remember what Yoda said****— there is no try. We need to leave our children and grandchildren a stronger democracy than we inherited. We need to build an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top. clean_body: It’s Star Wars Day | = = Hey team, Michael here. As someone who loves the original Star Wars movies, I couldn't help but think about this Yoda quote from The Empire Strikes Back today on May the 4th — Star Wars Day: "Always with you what cannot be done. Hear you nothing that I say?...You must unlearn what you have learned....Try not. Do. Or do not. There is no try." We know what we have to do. On January 6th, 2021, our country faced one of its darkest days. Defending and strengthening our democracy against the dark forces of tyranny is the urgent work of our lifetimes. And the lesson of Star Wars is that freedom is always worth the fight — even if the odds can sometimes feel like 3,720 to 1. As Republican politicians across the country work hard to roll back the voting rights of millions of Americans, especially people of color, we have to stand for democracy. As they roll back reproductive rights for millions of women, we have to stand for freedom. And we have to remember what Yoda said— there is no try. We need to leave our children and grandchildren a stronger democracy than we inherited. We need to build an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top. I will never stop fighting to leave our democracy and economy stronger for generations to come. = = May the force be with you, always, Michael = | Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you (and a friend!) can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. | |
---
Did you know, Derek? **The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City.** The winner will get two tickets to the convention (bring a friend or loved one, Derek!), travel to and from Chicago, and a fully covered hotel stay. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! [All you have to do to be automatically entered for a chance to win flights, a hotel stay, and convention admission is show your support for Democrats nationwide with a $7 donation today. The 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago next August, and you can enter to win a chance to join Democrats from across the country in the Windy City. Grassroots supporters like you are the heart of our party. In appreciation of all you do, we want every Democrat to have the chance to witness this historic moment in person! name: Katie Porter
subject: We need to maintain control of the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)
Hi Derek,
Maintaining and expanding Democrats’ Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to protect our environment, make child care affordable, expand and protect abortion access, and build a strong, stable, globally competitive economy that works for working people.
That’s why my team assigned supporters like you to **Jacky Rosen, who is running for re-election in Nevada. Holding this swing seat is the only way we’ll be able to hold the Senate majority.**
**[Can you split a donation between our campaigns today? Your contribution will make a huge difference in our competitive primary and Jacky Rosen’s re-election.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17460?t=8&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)**
**[Split a donation ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17460?t=9&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)**
We can’t let Mitch McConnell control the Senate again. We’ve seen what that looks like. He packed the courts which have eroded our fundamental rights, and further rigged the rules _against_ working people. We need to build a strong and durable majority, and that’s why we assigned you this crucial campaign. Only through early grassroots support can we guarantee we’ll stand a chance next November.
**[Please consider splitting a donation between our campaign and Jacky Rosen’s campaign today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/17460?t=10&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)**
Thank you so much, Derek.
--Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH04_1_SEN_20230504_V1_F&t=17&refcode2=22320_3422442_esd8bw&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=18&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=22320%2E3422442%2Eesd8bw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: Come and Take It!
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qukklul-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday! TV and movie writers have gone on strike, but[Gutfeld! will carry on with their non-union writers](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-y/).**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-t/) **Proof of Bribery Scheme** The FBI may have in its possession **[a document showing a pay-to-play scheme between then-VP Biden and a foreign national](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-i/).** **Failed Attack or False Flag?** Russian government officials are claiming Ukrainian forces**[attempted to kill President Vladimir Putin with a failed drone attack](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-d/).** **Snakes on a Plane** **[Trump reportedly grabbed an NBC reporter's phone and demanded he be removed from his plane](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-h/) **after he was asked about the criminal probe by Manhattan DA Alvin Brag.

**Will This be The Last Time?** The Federal Reserve announced Wednesday that **[it was raising short-term borrowing rates another 0.25%](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-k/)** , bringing the rates to a 16-year high. **Navy Recruitment Drive** **[The US Navy invited an active-duty drag queen to be a"Digital Ambassador"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-u/) - **as part of a recent drive "to attract the most talented and diverse workforce" and combat plunging recruitment. **Come And Take It!** The **[NRA has released a new video taunting Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-o/)** over his 2020 pledge to defeat the 2A group. _Have you seen this video?_ **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* **[Take me](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-m/)** back.
* Campaign **[promise](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-c/).**
* They are**[listening](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* They just**[make stuff up](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qukklul-trhiujldw-a/) **anyway.

| Just Two Days to the Convention!
---
|

| We need you! If everyone shows up, we have enough delegates to win the convention Saturday on the first vote; if that happens everyone could go home early. Please spread the word, carpool, and make sure your friends show up!
Let's win this convention and then let's help Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow Republicans un-California Virginia.
We are excited to have received the following endorsements:

* Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwRWiiIOoAb1BSkDtPaWCP5i9PCb0BIiRHB4LJgShhicXLyjXI27_wtHyV2GuMu3ufff_8Muwx7zDdZPtAhWVm0KksK33DvEdK0nwwJjKj51m2-BFkvwlGYEDssoX1q1kQHrOlQUUIbLZIAvPk_ODvieI9wkhZPCxb1agtvysFBMv-q6JI5LojNEVDkQo_PeR_4kGHsjM2qsopseRJQTawNwx_01T01cfttLfUB333DfLtADAQ1b8H29kr42MIdjDRg7A_9aDekbky1rIRvOZB1qbDOmxy2nqKBTDsYuwMch3cDFsdtKqJ3e0vNA64IQ8wyvKpuu6nGTHFn9Z7TW_A==&c=ot6THD4T4AU1iNXhKIC_BfpZv64mETqpEpjBtUI8s-EZnDtcwE1bCw==&ch=_DB9OBFjmDVgQQ-tYPuepdpA-ooEaWMRJmwW8n9MRvroIocCFKWiIg==)

| Charlie Luck Celebrates 100 Years of Luck Stone
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I had the honor of attending the Luck Companies 100 Year Celebration here in Goochland County. I have known Charlie Luck IV for over twenty years. Our daughters went to school together and I have observed his emphasis on leadership and community. Soon after I left the Navy SEALs, I met Charlie Luck and he actually let me drive one of those huge dump trucks and a loader at one of his rock quarries. That was fun!
Luck Companies has a people-first perspective that has been embraced by three generations of leaders: • Charles Luck, Jr. was known for saying, "If you take care of your people, they will take care of you." • Charles Luck III, who led the company from 1965-1999, expressed that same belief through the company's slogan and promise to people: "We care." • Charlie Luck IV broadened the scope of the company's mission by stating, "We will ignite human potential through Values-Based Leadership and positively impact the lives of people around the world."
It really is amazing how much his company has impacted lives all over Virginia and several other states.
Learn more [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DwRWiiIOoAb1BSkDtPaWCP5i9PCb0BIiRHB4LJgShhicXLyjXI27_8TorSxECXv76ngK21ZTHdasga6kiygthEiSi3vO-MnS9HqbmzgCnxoANcuPuufGV0wQy5-RWCrwnkNL74QcP3_GlHlWgk8yujr0emTtI_tOgZ7MbXkMSQI-ZXoU8y-OTSak1sEioqmCu1RJvEr0v13fN2xNn1YCDgnvdjfNudiOr6TVoWHJWz5rrz1chmMCKxFP_kWgzfy6lsgG2no-5PYUG8cHd5I8BjQ-OH509OteHMJ9G8cwZ7kDNaEBfrohxp50tATBReBhTpXUAjl72CCDnXSj1g_LpEIf8WDb-vkNNqyHJUS-7AAEFx4pQije-njdcTMICgT6eJizzYv0UNOlHtcawSkNNIgDkonVdmdZ6xEj8GLVGtEG9BiSISpAM4lLIDfqczB8jVcbBi_vYVfAwkxj4CLX8Dndw7LPj9XpTh90co4nXku0KlQUA4oUJw==&c=ot6THD4T4AU1iNXhKIC_BfpZv64mETqpEpjBtUI8s-EZnDtcwE1bCw==&ch=_DB9OBFjmDVgQQ-tYPuepdpA-ooEaWMRJmwW8n9MRvroIocCFKWiIg==)

| You will not have to guess how I will vote as your State Senator. I am one of just nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators in the General Assembly, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, "Conservative Excellence". I have a perfect six-year pro-life voting record, a perfect six-year pro-gun voting record, a 100% Family Foundation score, 100% VCDL score and endorsement, and a 100% NFIB score. Again, you will not have to guess how I will vote. Last year, I was responsible for the largest tax decrease in Virginia history for our veterans, when Governor Youngkin signed my bill, HB 1128.
---
| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin Endorsement == | | Just Two Days to the Convention! | | We need you! If everyone shows up, we have enough delegates to win the convention Saturday on the first vote; if that happens everyone could go home early. Please spread the word, carpool, and make sure your friends show up! Let's win this convention and then let's help Governor Glenn Youngkin and other fellow Republicans un-California Virginia. We are excited to have received the following endorsements: Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. == The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL), the Virginia pro-life affiliate of the National Right to Life Committee has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far: John McGuire for State Senate District 10. == The Virginia Citizen Defense League (VCDL), Virginia's premier pro-gun organization, has only endorsed one Republican in Virginia so far: John McGuire, because of my "hard hitting pro-gun legislation". == Hanover Sheriff Stuart Cook (Retired) endorsed John McGuire for State Senate. == 70 Plus Endorsement List == | The Farmville Herald | | This Letter to the Editor was printed in the Farmville Herald today. I will share a link in our next email. Thank you, Howard Gregory, for your support, and thank you for your lifetime of service to our country, our Commonwealth and your church! | Re-elect Delegate Buddy Fowler District 59 | | Delegate Buddy Fowler is working hard to continue fighting for our conservative values in Richmond. We are putting our signs up now. Let us know if you have a good spot for a big sign or a yard sign at john@mcguireforvirginia.com | Charlie Luck Celebrates 100 Years of Luck Stone | | | | | I had the honor of attending the Luck Companies 100 Year Celebration here in Goochland County. I have known Charlie Luck IV for over twenty years. Our daughters went to school together and I have observed his emphasis on leadership and community. Soon after I left the Navy SEALs, I met Charlie Luck and he actually let me drive one of those huge dump trucks and a loader at one of his rock quarries. That was fun! Luck Companies has a people-first perspective that has been embraced by three generations of leaders: • Charles Luck, Jr. was known for saying, "If you take care of your people, they will take care of you." • Charles Luck III, who led the company from 1965-1999, expressed that same belief through the company's slogan and promise to people: "We care." • Charlie Luck IV broadened the scope of the company's mission by stating, "We will ignite human potential through Values-Based Leadership and positively impact the lives of people around the world." It really is amazing how much his company has impacted lives all over Virginia and several other states. Learn more == | National Day of Prayer | | | | | It was an honor to attend the National Day of Prayer in Louisa County. Our country will not be saved by an elephant or a donkey, we will be saved by a Lamb! | Campaign Photos | My team and I have been knocking doors in ten counties and I have really enjoyed talking with many of you on the phone and at your home. We have much work to do. Let me know if you need a ride to the convention, because Saturday, May 6 will be here before you know it. I am fighting to protect everyone's right to Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness. For a ride, email britton@mcguireforvirginia.com The following are a few photos from the last two weeks in and around the district! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Convention Updates go to == | Just 2 days until May 6! All delegates are asked arrive at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. You must be in line by 10:30am to vote. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. Please send an email to john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you have any questions. | == | You will not have to guess how I will vote as your State Senator. I am one of just nine, out of one hundred and forty legislators in the General Assembly, to earn the highest award for conservatism in Virginia, "Conservative Excellence". I have a perfect six-year pro-life voting record, a perfect six-year pro-gun voting record, a 100% Family Foundation score, 100% VCDL score and endorsement, and a 100% NFIB score. Again, you will not have to guess how I will vote. Last year, I was responsible for the largest tax decrease in Virginia history for our veterans, when Governor Youngkin signed my bill, HB 1128. | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 & Endorsement == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

| | There’s no denying it, Co-Pilot. Joe Biden has our country on a dangerous path – and all of this is being done on purpose. Think about it... **OUR pain is part of his plan.** He wants you to spend more on gas and groceries because it’s the **ONLY way** the Democrats have a shot at implementing their woke ESG agenda. _[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69c1c364b5df4ae99a8a16573b6714df&_e=aBKusLJRKUhWwE_TwY_e9RML02Gpc8N5tRZvt53uN3fKxFq_5UUQ1qCPZZeDwo3qAxDVDo94xts1PHEpoytjmOTIAU3MPatNeBr6yyQOnyhYhBfxcP31p1BPmFt3027d9M8le4WKnswU1Gd5qgmvJgGgRhPEWryjEILdfcCJe60UHzRCQoJ7JxgUKqt5ysxTSn2h8EpBAUB2soJKBOZ_s8t3a-VL6Qvo33woZ_3TIVS3QBGkTEsjpIURLVeOntbTjYNVG3TG0b_OzXFNmklrqSvpUUjFj5anuMG2hpPQL4appZjckGHRkpY3v4qbJ28oOPckl5RxDefiKaUtFNTqKrZnRmZ8qg-2uhkgEv1OyMM%3D)_ But Co-Pilot, you and I both know we can’t continue along this path. Conservatives in the House are working around the clock to block Joe Biden’s radical agenda that transforms our country into their liberal dystopia. **And the Democrats HATE IT.** Co-Pilot, my seat was _[**one of just FIVE seats**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=69c1c364b5df4ae99a8a16573b6714df&_e=aBKusLJRKUhWwE_TwY_e9RML02Gpc8N5tRZvt53uN3fKxFq_5UUQ1qCPZZeDwo3qAxDVDo94xts1PHEpoytjmOTIAU3MPatNeBr6yyQOnyhYhBfxcP31p1BPmFt3027d9M8le4WKnswU1Gd5qgmvJgGgRhPEWryjEILdfcCJe60UHzRCQoJ7JxgUKqt5ysxTSn2h8EpBAUB2soJKBOZ_s6vTZTvarcXcK_rqDtPXAABTOP5_Ewc8YYk2_NcXZ9nQ5_yOX7DOHK0yeKO7gFqp-WuCeMyduNGoyYvSpNd302eBAI4zMDar9-Y3asN_aCqgIVB8WrKHapiFxNR7aCsW0flGhQ2MpFGRKBo0Lex6J0o%3D)_ that flipped the House, giving conservatives the majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Maggie Hassan’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62815918/404634950/1987603654?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2276-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGMzZDIwMy1jN2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5U2eso_zlnnxpqbfKu_kvbtyggKjfwlm2-BzoGltaKQ=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Colin Allred

**I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**

We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.

Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office. **

Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.

I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because******it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[ If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Sherrod Brown's >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816121/404635957/-1585541339?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk186-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIyZTZiOC1jN2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpQniYsH8drzt3TzIqoyWtKXi8EARida3i8xdLGzZls=)**
| | [Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816122/404635959/-1585541339?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk186-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmIyZTZiOC1jN2VhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpQniYsH8drzt3TzIqoyWtKXi8EARida3i8xdLGzZls=)
---
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.

— Martin

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: An insider’s look on our candidate recruitment 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter! I wanted
to personally reach out to share an update on our candidate recruitment
efforts for this 2024 cycle.

But first, I want to thank you for being a part of this organization. We
don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your support means a whole lot
to us, especially now as it’s a tough time financially for many grassroots
organizations and nonprofits.

Now, to share some updates about what we’re focused on right now. We have
been laser-focused on candidate recruitment:

* Last cycle, we spoke with 3,990 local leaders about our races and
vetted 1,653 potential candidates to ensure we backed the best
possible leaders. This is what we are in the middle of doing right
now!

But, unfortunately, right when our work and need for resources is ramping
up – donations to JD have started to slow down. Our work right now depends
on our ability to fundraise in order to execute on our ambitious plans to
build progressive power.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134296?refcode=em20230504-28799&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to support our
candidate recruitment efforts?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134296?refcode=em20230504-28799&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW ]Contribute $3

AOC in 2018; Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush in 2020; and most recently Summer
Lee in 2022 all came out of our candidate recruitment program. And
everyday we are talking to potential candidates who could join them and
the rest of the squad in 2024!

But it can only happen if we are able to reach our fundraising goals.

So we’re asking everyone who cares about JD’s existence and the soul of
the Democratic Party to chip in whatever they can. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134296?refcode=em20230504-28799&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW ]Will you make your
best gift right now?

Thank you so much for your support,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230504-28799-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28799_1203867_6U9dQW&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28799%2E1203867%2E6U9dQW

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
It's Star Wars Day, and we're coming to you with a quick request:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816408/404637110/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=&emci=3ce02af7-95ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816409/404637111/1071353790?refcode=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=)
Happy Star Wars Day, Peter! As you probably already know, Derek is a _**huge**_ Star Wars fan. _The Washington Post_ named him the biggest Star Wars nerd in Congress (and while we might push back on the "nerd" thing, Derek did seem irrationally excited about meeting Mark Hamill a few years ago).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816410/404637112/1071353790?refcode=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=) (Yes, that really is Mark Hamill.)
Believe it or not, the 2024 election is _zooming_ at us faster than the speed of light. And House Republicans are already garnering millions of dollars from dark money PACs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816411/404637113/1071353790?refcode=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=)
But, our team has a plan to fight back. We're looking for 180 supporters from PA to step up as monthly donors by TONIGHT at midnight to help Derek build another winning campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816412/404637114/1071353790?refcode=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=)
We're asking, Peter: **[Will you become a monthly sustaining donor today to help Derek continue fighting for you in the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62816413/404637115/989461907?refcode=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230504_strwar_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=57c8b520-c9ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdjOGI1MjAtYzllYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RPB9Wb75MaQrcqAm4qu43kwXfp7DhegXaW252KtR0zQ=)**

clean_body: It's Star Wars Day, and we're coming to you with a quick request: = Happy Star Wars Day, Peter! As you probably already know, Derek is a huge Star Wars fan. The Washington Post named him the biggest Star Wars nerd in Congress (and while we might push back on the "nerd" thing, Derek did seem irrationally excited about meeting Mark Hamill a few years ago). = (Yes, that really is Mark Hamill.) Believe it or not, the 2024 election is zooming at us faster than the speed of light. And House Republicans are already garnering millions of dollars from dark money PACs. = But, our team has a plan to fight back. We're looking for 180 supporters from PA to step up as monthly donors by TONIGHT at midnight to help Derek build another winning campaign. = We're asking, Peter: = = = Monthly contributions are resources Derek can count on. While he works to defend our democracy and strengthen our economy, every dollar you chip in will help power his campaign and lift vulnerable Democrats in the House. In 2020, we expanded our Democratic majority because of grassroots movements like ours. We can beat the odds and win in 2024, but it won’t be an easy fight. = Can Derek count on you? Start your monthly recurring donation today! = = Onward to victory — and May the Fourth be with you. = — Derek Kilmer Finance Team Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

**
❌ _They’ll slash healthcare benefits to military veterans_ by slashing **81,000 jobs** at the Veterans Health Administration, **meaning veterans will be unable to get appointments for wellness visits, cancer screenings, and mental health services.**

❌ _They’ll gut food assistance programs to**1.7 million women, infants, and children** , and over 900,000 seniors_ through drastic cuts to nutrition assistance programs like SNAP, WIC, and Meals on Wheels.

❌ _They’ll jeopardize the healthcare coverage of**21 million Americans.**_

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | ****Friend, here’s what you need to know about the House GOP’s plan to gut key programs: ❌ They’ll slash healthcare benefits to military veterans by slashing 81,000 jobs at the Veterans Health Administration, meaning veterans will be unable to get appointments for wellness visits, cancer screenings, and mental health services. ❌ They’ll gut food assistance programs to1.7 million women, infants, and children , and over 900,000 seniors through drastic cuts to nutrition assistance programs like SNAP, WIC, and Meals on Wheels. ❌ They’ll jeopardize the healthcare coverage of21 million Americans. Folks, the GOP is trying to ram through massive cuts for millions of hard-working Americans, all while they try to give huge handouts and tax breaks to the mega-wealthy. So we’re asking for your help to fight back! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you! Friend,

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: We’re counting down the seconds until Taylor’s tour stop in Nashville ⌛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
Did you know that nearly 180k people will attend Taylor Swift’s Eras Tour concerts at Nissan Stadium this weekend?
Hundreds of Swifties were lining up as early as 2:30a.m. this morning to purchase exclusive tour merchandise.
Peter, it’s totally okay if Taylor stans want to wait in line for hours to purchase merch. But Nashville music fans don’t want a repeat of what happened with the Eras Tour ticket sales on Ticketmaster.
As a former singer and songwriter myself, I firmly believe that Nashville concertgoers should be able to buy concert tickets without needing to wait in online queues for hours or pay unreasonable service fees.
That’s why I sponsored SB1043, a bill to create more transparency in online ticket sales so that next time, you can see Taylor perform without the stress of overpaying for lucrative tickets.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, I’m ready to help our city say “haters gonna hate” and #shakeoff Ticketmaster-Live Nation’s corrupt monopoly influence. Will you help me bring Nashville into a new, better Era with a donation to my campaign for Mayor today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230504_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.

clean_body: [] Peter, Did you know that nearly 180k people will attend Taylor Swift’s Eras Tour concerts at Nissan Stadium this weekend? Hundreds of Swifties were lining up as early as 2:30a.m. this morning to purchase exclusive tour merchandise. Peter, it’s totally okay if Taylor stans want to wait in line for hours to purchase merch. But Nashville music fans don’t want a repeat of what happened with the Eras Tour ticket sales on Ticketmaster. As a former singer and songwriter myself, I firmly believe that Nashville concertgoers should be able to buy concert tickets without needing to wait in online queues for hours or pay unreasonable service fees. That’s why I sponsored SB1043, a bill to create more transparency in online ticket sales so that next time, you can see Taylor perform without the stress of overpaying for lucrative tickets. [] Peter, I’m ready to help our city say “haters gonna hate” and #shakeoff Ticketmaster-Live Nation’s corrupt monopoly influence. Will you help me bring Nashville into a new, better Era with a donation to my campaign for Mayor today? clean_body: The Dems must be stopped | Friend, Our country is facing an extreme and radical threat: WOKE LIBERALISM! Woke transgender ideology is destroying our culture, and it's putting the very fabric of our society at risk. As a Republican, I believe in the importance of standing up for our values and protecting our country from the dangers of the radical Left. | Americans are outraged by Bud Light’s recent partnership with radical transgender influencer Dylan Mulvaney. Frankly, I don’t blame them. Promoting influencers who advocate for men to participate in women’s sports harms our society. We cannot let the Leftists have their way! We need a concerted effort to stand up to corporations gone woke and hold them accountable. Congress is attempting to pass a bill that protects women’s sports — but Joe Biden has already pledged to VETO IT. This upside-down administration is going out of its way to undermine women and erase fundamental truths. Thank you, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
Last year, Kirsten's campaign was outspent 6:1. A lot of that came from outside groups, pouring in money to attack Kirsten with baseless claims.
This race will be different.
Kirsten proved that she's a serious challenger for this seat — and Juan Ciscomani has shown his true colors.
People are taking notice — including the League of Conservation Voters, which just released a new ad calling out Ciscomani for his anti-job votes. You can watch the 30-second spot here >> [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WNTdFBIPSyg]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WNTdFBIPSyg [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WNTdFBIPSyg]
Instead of supporting good-paying clean energy jobs for his district, Juan Ciscomani stood with MAGA extremists. That's because Ciscomani is more concerned about partisanship than his own constituents.
Kirsten will actually fight for the people who elected her.
People across the country are already talking about our race. Will you make sure we can continue to show the truth about Kirsten's opponent and win this ultra-competitive seat by rushing a donation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050423_LCVSpot]

name: Team Helen
subject: Undecided voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
ICYMI: The first public polling of this race shows Helen and our movement in a five-way “statistical tie” with less than two weeks left.

THE PHILADELPHIA MAYOR’S RACE IS ESSENTIALLY A FIVE-WAY TIE
"Many respondents — about 20% — said they were still making up their mind."
— Philadelphia Inquirer

With a full 20% of Philadelphia voters still undecided, what we do in the next 12 days will truly decide who leads our city for the next four years.

That’s why we have a strategic plan to reach, persuade, and mobilize undecided voters to support Helen in this final stretch: dialing up our TV ads, knocking tens of thousands of doors, texting and calling voters across the city, and doing everything we can to get out the vote.

With 12 days left in a tied race, please chip in $10, $20 or whatever you can, to power our team through the final stretch →

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $20 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=20]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em]

Folks, we can win this race because we have the strongest grassroots team, the biggest vision, and a proven fighter to rally behind, but victory may depend on grassroots supporters like you pitching in to help put Helen over the top.

Thanks for your continued support.

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States

subject: re: I'm running against Ted Cruz -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.

The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been _incredible_ , and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz, flipping Texas Blue and expanding our Democratic majority!

Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. _We’re so close now to hitting our**expanded** $2,500,000 launch goal!_

**[Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz and defend the Senate without you — and we just need $26,293 more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $5 to power my Democratic campaign and the DSCC? Let’s do this →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)**

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)
---

\---------Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Colin Allred
Date: Wednesday, May 3, 2023
Subject: I’m running against Ted Cruz.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)
Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and the DSCC to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?[Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Colin Allred and the DSCC.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)

| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=11&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)

| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=12&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)

| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)
---

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and the DSCC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=14&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
U.S. Representative (TX-32)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Texas

Colin Allred is a 4th generation Texan running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. After playing in the NFL and serving as a civil rights attorney, he was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where he fights to protect the fundamental values of our democracy.

_**[Chip in now to help Colin Allred flip Texas blue, defeat Ted Cruz and help the DSCC expand our Democratic Senate majority →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)**_
| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230504-ColinAllred-AllredTandem1Bump-Pros-sl1&akid=10675%2E9716520%2E6V1El4)

name: Lila Zucker, Fair Fight Action
subject: Will you sign your name to support and empower young voters?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Lawmakers should make it easier for college students to vote, not more difficult. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817210/404639876/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODJmZTIwOS1jZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbdW8lKOiEllDatKN1sixptNTttl7R82Eq0nq3B_Ucg=&emci=3ed8b703-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=682fe209-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Across the country, families are celebrating the accomplishments of students this graduation season. At the same time, this joyous occasion is following a rise in anti-democratic attempts to target and suppress young voters. These attempts include tightening voting laws in districts with college campuses, banning student IDs as a form of voter identification, and eliminating polling places on college campuses. This is no coincidence; young people turned out in record numbers in the midterm elections and will continue to show up in force in elections to come. **It’s clear: Young voters are more civically engaged than ever before, and that’s why extremists want to make it harder for students and young people to vote.** That’s why Fair Fight Action is working hard to mobilize young voters by educating them about the voting process, rallying them around civic engagement, and deepening engagement amongst those who are often overlooked between elections. This work to protect free and fair elections will help ensure young people are able to truly participate in our democracy. [_**So today, we’re asking you to take this important advocacy action if you agree that lawmakers should be making it easier for college students to vote — not more difficult. If you agree, please sign your name right away to show your solidarity with young voters >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817211/404639877/1932145941?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODJmZTIwOS1jZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbdW8lKOiEllDatKN1sixptNTttl7R82Eq0nq3B_Ucg=&emci=3ed8b703-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=682fe209-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817212/404639878/1932145941?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230504_e_youngvoters1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODJmZTIwOS1jZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbdW8lKOiEllDatKN1sixptNTttl7R82Eq0nq3B_Ucg=&emci=3ed8b703-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=682fe209-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

name: Bob Casey
subject: My home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817217/404639912/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTY4NjIyMC1jZmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N6-IbrxfU9GBumx4p1tXp1APiVlEpkUzEjoI_8oqBME=&emci=144422d2-c5ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6e686220-cfea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter, I’m a lifelong Pennsylvanian. From growing up in Scranton, to coaching eighth-grade basketball in Philadelphia, to my wife, Terese, and I raising our four daughters in the same town where I grew up — Pennsylvania is my home. That’s why I’m a tireless advocate for Pennsylvania’s hardworking families in the U.S. Senate. Because I know how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for their kids, save for their families’ futures, and give back to their communities. They deserve a Senator who works just as hard to represent their voices in Washington. But here’s the reality: National Republicans are coming for this seat in hopes of regaining Senate control. These are the same folks who want to make cuts to Social Security, which nearly 3 million Pennsylvanians rely on to get by. _The people of our state can’t afford a Republican Senate majority._ **That’s why I need to ask for your early support in our re-election fight.[I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the U.S. Senate, but I won’t be able to win without your support. Friends,

It has been one year since the _Dobbs_ decision was leaked to the public, and we learned that the Supreme Court would overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

While millions of women lost the right to choose in a matter of weeks, the overturning of _Roe_ didn't happen overnight.

Anti-choice Republicans fantasized about this day for decades, and they worked around the clock for years to bend the rules, block Merrick Garland, and steal a Supreme Court majority.

The anti-choice _minority_ made a huge stride forward in their crusade to strip women of a fundamental right — _but this is only the beginning_.

**So, we're not backing down. Democrats can't be afraid to do whatever it takes to protect reproductive freedom, even if we must bypass the filibuster.**

[**I will not stop fighting until reproductive rights are protected by federal law, but I need supporters like you in my corner to make it happen. Democrats can't be afraid to do whatever it takes to protect reproductive freedom, even if we must bypass the filibuster. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Jared Moskowitz Congressman, FL-23 | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. From: Martin Heinrich
Date: Thu, May 4, 2023
Subject: I’m running_
I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks:
**I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**
We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.
**It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.**

---
Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.
**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**
Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.
I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.
After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.
I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.
And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**
From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.
But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.
**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.[If you’re all in on this fight, pitch in with a grassroots donation of any amount >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817693/404641710/995242207?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230504_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDhiNjU0YS1kMmVhLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LEcwgnfHGNXOc8AhPR4kq3491AJ3QHAm4h9vFQH_L68=)**
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going all in for the fights that matter most. That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office. Last year, against the odds, I went all in to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18. I went all in to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service. After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went all in to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires. I went all in to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water. And now I’m all in to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long. From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight. But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security. You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.= Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States
