Friend,

In 2010, two of the largest ticket sellers dominating the market -- _Live Nation_ and _Ticketmaster_ \-- merged. Ever since, event goers have seen an eyebrow-raising spike in ticket prices to see their favorite artists and sports teams.

You may recall that this issue came to a head recently after the botched presale for Taylor Swift's Eras Tour last year. Fans were blindsided by long waits, absurd hidden fees, and murky refund policies.

_Ticketmaster_ is one of the only places people can go online and purchase tickets for shows across the country. They've abused that near-monopoly with excessive wait times and expensive hidden junk fees.

Los Angeles has always been a leader in the entertainment industry. Buying tickets needs to be more straight-forward and transparent for consumers. That shouldn't be too much to ask for.

**[I recently introduced AB 8 in the State Assembly to provide greater transparency in ticket pricing. Add your name to support this legislation using this link.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62817741/404641930/-1235440754?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODlkOGQ5MmUtZDNlYS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9nNzlSzonUilVA_OZZWBxjgkuu67hcLxaOOPrZLx86g=&emci=b66a7b6f-d2ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=89d8d92e-d3ea-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**

Thanks,

Laura

clean_body: | = | | ** Friend, In 2010, two of the largest ticket sellers dominating the market -- Live Nation and Ticketmaster \-- merged. Ever since, event goers have seen an eyebrow-raising spike in ticket prices to see their favorite artists and sports teams. You may recall that this issue came to a head recently after the botched presale for Taylor Swift's Eras Tour last year. Fans were blindsided by long waits, absurd hidden fees, and murky refund policies. Ticketmaster is one of the only places people can go online and purchase tickets for shows across the country. They've abused that near-monopoly with excessive wait times and expensive hidden junk fees. Los Angeles has always been a leader in the entertainment industry. Buying tickets needs to be more straight-forward and transparent for consumers. That shouldn't be too much to ask for. Thanks, Laura =** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1009&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

In April, with your help, Our Revolution
mobilized our 100,000 members in Chicago to power Brandon Johnson to
victory over rightwing Democrat Paul Vallas in the Mayor’s race –
defeating one of the most entrenched establishment machines in American
politics!

Now, with just 12 days left until Election Day in Philadelphia, Bernie has
joined us in taking on the establishment again to help elect another
proven champion for working people, Helen Gym, for Mayor.

Our Revolution has 30,000 supporters in Philly, and with the race within
the margin of error, what we do to turn out the vote will make all the
difference.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1010&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]Can we count on you to pitch in to help us reach our goal of raising
$30,000 so we can reach our supporters, raise voter turnout, and elect
another proud progressive Mayor?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8600?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1011&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8601?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1012&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8602?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1013&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8603?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1014&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8604?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1015&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1016&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1017&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ][IMG]

Like Brandon Johnson in Chicago, Helen Gym is a former teacher and union
organizer who stands up to big money and is demanding better for her city.
Republicans and big money are so scared of Helen, they’re encouraging
voters to register as Democrats to oppose her.

In Pittsburgh, we’re also backing Sara Innamorato in her run for Allegheny
County Executive — the most powerful seat in the 2nd most populated county
in Pennsylvania — where she can make a huge impact on the lives of folks
being crushed by the current system.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly&t=1018&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]We have just 12 days to turn out the vote in PA, and with polls so
close, every dollar is going to count. Can you please rush a donation to
help us mobilize our members in PA?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230504_FR_Philly_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Philly.Ib_36j&t=1001&akid=4245%2E5885482%2EtwHhyN ]Our membership card

group in America.

establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
